Name: Coding Blocks
Description:
Coding Blocks has been built with a vision of creating Software Developers and Entrepreneurs who can shape the future of our country. India has around 15 lac engineers graduating from colleges every year, majority of which aren't employable. On the other hand most of the Software Companies aren't able to fill their job vacancies because they don't get good candidates.

The problem lies in the fact that the content and methodology of teaching hasn't kept the pace with the fast changing IT sector. Another problem is that no IT professionals want to mentor/teach these students because teaching is far less lucrative financially compared to working for IT firms.

At Coding Blocks we want to bridge this gap by enabling students with the right skills which will help them by not just securing the best jobs but also enabling them to be productive from day 1 of their corporate lives.

Name: Shikho
Description:
Shikho is the leading and category-defining Bangladeshi education technology (edtech) startup focused on building a hyper-localized digital learning ecosystem centered on modernizing the delivery of supplementary education for school, college, university as well as professionals. Combining expertise across content, instruction, media and technology the company’s products and solutions aim to make online learning accessible, enjoyable, engaging, and effective for a learning age population of 85 million Bengali speaking students below the age of 25.

The technology platform addresses each part of the Bangladeshi student journey — covering daily lessons, homework, exam-prep, tutoring, and skill development — in an affordable, convenient, and cohesive way. Shikho’s web and mobile applications include access to interactive live classes conducted by expert tutors, original animated video lessons that help visualize complex concepts, a vast library of in-app questions and solutions, personalized real-time performance tracking, and a recommendation engine that prompts users based on their strengths and weaknesses. 

The company currently operates out of four offices in Dhaka and Jessore and has 450 employees. It is backed by global venture capital firms, Learn Capital, Wavemaker Partners, Anchorless Bangladesh, Sturgeon Capital, Goodwater, Sajida Foundation, alongside strategic angels and family offices. The company has raised $7m USD of funding and was featured in Forbes Asia 100 to Watch List in 2022 and its Founder, Shahir Chowdhury was listed as a 2023 Bloomberg Catalyst.

Name: Lexia Learning
Description:
Lexia believes that strong literacy foundations have impact far beyond the classroom—that they are essential to our ability to communicate, express ourselves, and engage with the world around us. 

We believe everyone has a right to literacy, and that as educators, we have an obligation to deliver. We believe every student deserves to be taught literacy in a way that works for them, no matter who they are, where they live, what level they are at, and what learning challenges they face. We believe every teacher deserves the support they need to teach literacy confidently and effectively. 

We know that literacy is fully within reach for the vast majority of learners (both students and teachers) when instruction is based on the science of reading—with sound methodology; with engaging experiences supported by innovative, committed experts; and with a focus on the value of each individual learner.

We’re Lexia. We’re all for literacy because literacy can and should be for all.

Name: egFWD
Description:
Future Work is Digital (fwd) powered by the Information Technology Industry Development Association (ITIDA) under Digital Egypt Initiative is a technology learning and upskilling scholarship program that equips young Egyptians with the tech skills and hands-on practices for top demand freelancing and online work. 

Falling under the Human Capacity Development pivot of the Digital Egypt Initiative, fwd focuses on enabling Egyptian talented youth and professionals with technology and remote work skills and tools essential for successfully leading the future of work. fwd is powered by ITIDA as part of its talent development initiatives and its strategic plans to bridge the talent supply-demand gap and to boost Egypt’s ICT industry global competitiveness.

fwd is an 18-month scholarship program aiming at doubling the capacity of professional Egyptians active in remote tech work and at maximizing Egypt’s global competitiveness and ICT services exports. fwd targets upskilling 100 thousand Egyptians through Udacity online learning platform in 3 technology specializations Web, Data, and Digital Marketing, as well as, sharpening their online portfolios and skills in remote work successful acquisition and delivery. In each specialization, learners can apply and join in different tracks. fwd ‘s tracks vary in length and complexity based on the targeted level and depth of the IT and work skills. fwd targets different segments of Egyptians between the age of 18-35 ranging from novices with no previous IT experience to professionals and advanced workers who are thriving to acquire remote tech work skills and practices. fwd provides the learners with an integrated learning and upskilling experience which includes access to Udacity online learning classroom, hands-on-practice expert-reviewed projects, online support webinars, professional industry mentors, interactive peer-to-peer community, and continuous coaching.

Name: Identity Management Institute
Description:
Identity Management Institute (IMI) is a leading global organization dedicated to the field of identity management training and IAM certification. IMI offers professional certifications in the areas of identity and access management governance, technology, project and risk management, as well as consumer identity theft protection, workplace identity fraud prevention, data protection, and privacy. 

IMI encourages its professional members to collaborate online with various groups on LinkedIn and supports them to manage and protect the identities of their employees, customers and business partners inside and outside of information systems. As such, IMI has established identity and access management certification and training programs for educating its professional members, their employees and customers.

Identity Management Institute offers the following vendor-neutral global certifications:

Certified Identity and Access Manager/CIAM
Certified Access Management Specialist/CAMS
Certified Identity Governance Expert/CIGE
Certified Identity Management Professional/CIMP
Certified Identity and Security Technologist/CIST
Certified Identity Protection Advisor/CIPA
Certified Red Flag Specialist/CRFS
Certified in Data Protection/CDP

Visit our identity management certification page for details:
https://www.identitymanagementinstitute.org/certification/

IMI also offers a leading identity management blog with relevant identity management articles that discuss the latest topics in identity and access management. Sign up for our Identity Management Journal and explore the hundreds of articles that we offer to the community.
https://www.identitymanagementinstitute.org/identity-management-journal/

IAM certifications are among the fastest growing cybersecurity certifications due to the adoption of cloud solutions, SaaS and cloud applications, IoT, BYOD, and mobile computing. 

Join us as individuals, groups, or service provider vendors to get certified and promote your brand.

Name: Tutorac
Description:
Tutorac is a global edtech platform that bridges the gap between education and employability through innovative learning solutions, and a unique marketplace connecting learners with top-tier industry experts from across the globe. Our platform ensures that IT education is not just accessible but also tailored to meet the dynamic demands of today’s workforce. At Tutorac, we are redefining the way people learn by making it engaging, personalized, and impactful.

What Sets Us Apart?
Our approach is built on three pillars: innovation, accessibility, and outcomes. We deliver comprehensive job-oriented training programs, engaging IT video courses, and a thriving marketplace where students can select from a diverse pool of industry-expert trainers, ensuring customized learning experiences that align with their goals.

Our Key Offerings:
•	Job Assistance Programs: Equip learners with in-demand skills through hands-on training and assured placement opportunities with top hiring partners.
•	Cinematic IT Video Courses: Next-gen learning with high-quality, interactive content for deeper conceptual clarity.
•	Global Marketplace: Connects learners with industry experts for live training, mentoring, and skill enhancement in IT domains.
•	Career Support: Personalized guidance, resume building, mock interviews, and more to ensure job readiness.

Why Tutorac?
Our success lies in creating a seamless connection between IT learners and their career aspirations. We are proud to have successfully trained and placed number of students globally, empowering them to achieve their goals.

Our Vision:
To democratize education by making skill development accessible, impactful, and transformative for IT learners worldwide.

Join Us:
Whether you're a student, professional, tutor, or organization, Tutorac is your partner in growth. Together, let’s shape the future of learning and redefine success.

Name: MIT OpenCourseWare
Description:
MIT OpenCourseWare is a free and open publication of material from thousands of MIT courses, covering the entire MIT curriculum and used by millions of learners and educators around the world.

No enrollment or registration. Freely browse and use OCW materials at your own pace. There's no signup, and no start or end dates.

Knowledge is your reward. Use OCW to guide your own life-long learning, or to teach others. We don't offer credit or certification for using OCW.

Made for sharing. Download files for later. Send to friends and colleagues. Modify, remix, and reuse (just remember to cite OCW as the source.)

Please see our Help pages for answers to many common questions about OCW. https://ocw.mit.edu/help/

To support OCW, please consider making a gift: https://giving.mit.edu/give/to/ocw/?utm_source=linkedin or sharing your OCW story: https://forms.gle/KJMspThserjvcKfu6. Thanks!

Name: HR na Szpilkach
Description:
HR na Szpilkach, czyli jak wypracować wysoki poziom serwisu HR w organizacji, pogodzić interesy twardego i miękkiego HR-u i nie zapomnieć o sobie.

HR na Szpilkach to blog integrujący Społeczność Specjalistów Kadr, Płac i HR. Jego misją jest szerzenie wiedzy, rozwój kompetencji oraz integracja i profesjonalizacja środowiska zawodowego pasjonatów kadr i płac.
Stawiamy na rozwój i wysoką rangę HR w biznesie! Śledzimy trendy edukacyjne, nieustannie podnosimy jakość i efektywność procesu kształcenia, wdrażamy nowoczesne technologie, wspierające podnoszenie kwalifikacji.

Założycielką i pomysłodawczynią Akademii jest Monika Smulewicz. Jej misją zawodową jest „dzielenie się wiedzą specjalistyczną z obszaru kadrowo-płacowego w celu podnoszenia jakości usług świadczonych przez HR na rzecz pracowników i pracodawców”.

Życzeniem Moniki jest to, aby każda osoba w Polsce z najmniejszej miejscowości, z każdego zakątka kraju miała możliwość rozwoju zawodowego i skorzystania z wiedzy specjalistycznej. Dlatego właśnie powołała do życia Eduwersum Collegium Rozwoju HR, które jest Placówką Oświatową, wpisaną do Rejestru Szkół i Placówek Oświatowych Ministerstwa Edukacji Narodowej pod numerem RSPO 273974.

Monika Smulewicz jest ekspertem w dziedzinie prawa pracy z niespełna dwudziestoletnim doświadczeniem zawodowym na stanowiskach specjalistycznych i menedżerskich, z bogatym doświadczeniem szkoleniowym, doradczym i zamiłowaniem trenerskim. 

Zapraszamy do wspólnego rozwoju! >> www.monikasmulewicz.pl

#prawopracy #szkoleniaonline #warsztaty #webinary #placówkaoświatowa

Name: Neurodiversity Education Academy
Description:

Who is it for? 

The Neurodiversity Academy is aimed at anyone supporting a neurodiverse person and at self supported neurodiverse persons, looking for knowledge, tools and strategies to be more effective.
Courses are aimed at teachers, school administrators, mentors, parents, students and young adults navigating through life and education in the hope of creating and supporting more successful outcomes for a wide range of neurodiverse people. Tworzymy szkolenia on-line, które są znacznie lepszą formą zdobywania wiedzy i zwiększania kompetencji niż drogie szkolenia stacjonarne czy nudne podręczniki. Naszą ofertę kierujemy zarówno do osób indywidualnych jak i firm i instytucji.

W branży e-learningowej działamy już 15 lat i w tym czasie pomogliśmy tysiącom osób zdobyć nowe umiejętności, lepszą pracę, a nawet całkowicie się przebranżowić. Wspieramy również firmy, którym oferujmy nowoczesny sposób szkolenia pracowników i elastyczne rozliczanie. 

Dzięki naszym kursom każdy może uczyć się w dowolnym miejscu i na dowolnym urządzeniu (komputer, tablet, smartfon). Wystarczy tylko dostęp do internetu. Nasze szkolenia to przystępna forma nauki dla każdego. Dzięki nam na rynku pracy pojawiają się nowi programiści, web designerzy, web developerzy, graficy, fotografowie, projektanci CAD i marketingowcy. Nie czekaj dłużej i bądź następny!

Name: LAFAAAC
Description:
L’Académie Franco-Anglophone des Arts Audiovisuels et du Cinéma (LAFAAAC) est née d’une volonté simple : Favoriser le développement professionnel et améliorer les qualifications des professionnels et futurs professionnels des métiers des industries créatives en leur proposant une formation et un accompagnement innovant, qui s’appuie sur le meilleur des outils digitaux, sur des rencontres et ateliers en présentiel, et sur une nouvelle approche de l’échange entre pairs. 

LAFAAAC ambitionne de construire un nouvel écosystème digital et présentiel de formation, qui permet d’accroître à court terme l'employabilité, tout en contribuant également à structurer une filière professionnelle et de permettre aux talents de monétiser leur talent créatif.

LAFAAAC propose un apprentissage des industries créatives centré sur une expérience pédagogique digitale, complétée par des ateliers d’échanges et des formations qualifiantes :

•Une plateforme multimodale : des parcours métier en ligne offrant les savoirs de base et de spécialisation de chaque métier. Un lieu digital d’échanges, de partages et de réseautage entre les apprenants et avec les professionnels. Tout cela accessible via le digital-learning, un site Internet et une application mobile.

•Les Classes Virtuelles : moments d’échanges et d'apprentissage en ligne autour de projets précis animés par des professionnels reconnus.

•Les Formations : des formations physiques de spécialisation pour nos apprenants les plus aguerris, avec mise en situation professionnelle.

You'll also be able to build your portfolio in which to showcase your work, and you’ll master all the most industry-relevant tools and processes. Our courses are fully online and you can pace yourself as you gradually complete your curriculum. Name: French tweets
Description:
French Tweets offers an incredible opportunity to those who want to learn French online. Enamored by the nuances of the soft-spoken language, Dr. Dolly Setia launched an engaging YouTube channel to promote French learning for both educational and professional purposes. Live

French tweets Live online classes help and encourage people who want to learn French for DELF and DALF certifications or are eager to take French for immigration. These global classes for all time zones offer exclusive learning resources for exams like TEF Canada, TCF Canada, TEFAQ and TCFQ that test French proficiency for immigration purposes.

Our first video on basic French greetings was uploaded on 9th May 2020. Inspired by the overwhelming response it received, we took a step forward and started delivering French lessons on different topics like phonetics, grammar, phrases, expressions, and vocabulary. Learning a new language is an ongoing process; therefore, our online classes are curated in a comprehensive way to ensure that we cover almost all aspects of French learning.

Our work speaks for itself, and this is reflected in the fact that today, we are one of the most popular online French learning platforms. At French Tweets, learners get access to exclusive study material and exam strategies prepared meticulously by our founder Dr. Dolly Setia in collaboration with other global experts. Numerous TCF and TEF Canada aspirants who have benefited from our video lectures are a testimony to this fact. Numerous immigrants have cleared their TEF, TCF, TCFQ, TEFAQ, DELF, or DALF, no matter what test you are preparing for, we have well-structured online live classes designed for each session. French is a tricky but charming language; therefore our teaching methodologies have been planned to simplify the learning process. We make online classes fun and exciting for our learners by giving them a variety of exercises and activities that enhance their language skills up to the hilt.

Vor diesem Hintergrund bietet das IDLL wirkungsorientierte Konzepte, in denen Kompetenz- und Leistungsentwicklung eng verzahnt sind.

In den folgenden Fokusgebieten entwickeln wir Methoden, Tools und Kernkompetenzen und begleiten Menschen und Unternehmen in der Umsetzung:

    Digital Learning, Learning Design, Projektmanagement in eLearning-Projekten
    Strategisches und operatives Bildungsmanagement, Einsatz moderner Lern-Technologien, Konzeption von E-Learning-Content
    Innovationsmethoden für digitale Lerntechnologien, strategische Planung im Learning & Development
    Leadership Development, Organisations- und Kulturentwicklung im agilen & digitalen Zeitalter
    Agile Strategien & Methoden im Change Leadership der Digitalen Transformation

Das IDLL versteht sich dabei als Kompetenzzentrum, das in der Entwicklung und Durchführung mit einer Vielzahl von Expertinnen und Experten aus Praxis und Wissenschaft zusammenarbeitet. Um die aktuellen Herausforderungen zu meistern und die jeweils optimale Wirkung zu erzielen, schauen wir nicht so sehr auf die Erkenntnisse der Vergangenheit wie auf die Möglichkeiten der Zukunft.

Description:
Talento è un’azienda che si dedica con passione allo sviluppo di soluzioni innovative per la 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 e la 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹i. Siamo convinti, infatti, che ogni progetto di formazione e comunicazione debba essere unico e stimolante, capace di lasciare un impatto concreto. Il nostro team combina creatività, competenze tecnologiche e pedagogiche oltre ad attenzione al dettaglio per offrire soluzioni su misura. 
Realizziamo 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘂𝘁𝗶 𝗺𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗶, pensati per rendere la formazione aziendale coinvolgente e accessibile. In aggiunta, il nostro 𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗼 𝗱𝗶 𝗰𝗼𝗿𝘀𝗶 𝗲𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 spazia da soft skills a tematiche come compliance e cybersecurity, fornendo risposte pronte a esigenze formative specifiche. Inoltre, progettiamo 𝗽𝗶𝗮𝘁𝘁𝗮𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗲 𝗟𝗠𝗦 personalizzate, che permettono alle aziende di gestire la formazione e la conoscenza in modo semplice e flessibile.
Ma non ci fermiamo qui. Crediamo nell’importanza della narrazione visiva e per questo produciamo 𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗶 𝗲 𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗹𝗶 utilizzando animazioni, infografiche e storytelling per rendere ogni messaggio chiaro e memorabile. Supportiamo le imprese anche nella progettazione di 𝗰𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗴𝗻𝗲 𝗱𝗶 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘇𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲 𝗱𝗶𝗴𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗶 𝗲 𝘀𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹, curandone ogni aspetto, dalla strategia alla post-produzione.
La nostra esperienza è certificata 𝗜𝗦𝗢 𝟵𝟬𝟬𝟭:𝟮𝟬𝟭𝟱, una garanzia della qualità che mettiamo in tutto ciò che facciamo: a questa si affianca il 𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗘𝗦𝗚 che dimostra il nostro impegno etico e responsabile. 
Ogni giorno ci impegniamo a trasformare idee in esperienze, perché siamo convinti che la formazione e la comunicazione possano davvero fare la differenza nelle persone e nelle organizzazioni.

Name: Institut d'Enseignement à Distance - IED Paris 8
Description:
En 1990, le Centre National d’Enseignement (CNED) et l’université Paris 8 s’associent pour mettre en place les enseignements du DEUG de psychologie. Ce projet novateur a été réalisé sous la direction du regretté Rodolphe Ghiglione, professeur des Universités en psychologie.


A l’époque, il n’était pas facile de concevoir à distance des enseignements de psychologie, une discipline avec ses aspects théoriques mais aussi expérimentaux et cliniques. Les cours furent conçus par des spécialistes français du domaine, et des outils furent mis au point pour répondre aux besoins d’un tel enseignement. La psychologie ainsi enseignée a connu un indéniable succès couronné en 1997 par la création d’un Institut d’Enseignement à Distance.


Désormais, l’IED dispense des enseignements de psychologie en 1er, 2è et 3è cycles. L’offre de formation s’est diversifiée par la mise en œuvre des enseignements à distance de Droit (LICENCE), de Sciences de l’Education (LICENCE 3ème année et MASTER) et d’Informatique (LICENCE). L’IED accueille actuellement environ 5000 étudiants.

Name: NEWTECHWAYS
Description:
NewTechWays is an Academy for Software Architects. It is a definitive place for software professionals to learn the practical aspects of architecting and developing large-scale, high-quality software applications. NewTechWays helps Developers transition into Architects, which otherwise is a time-consuming process in general.

Architecting large-scale software applications is not a readily available skill. There are several challenges. The biggest one is the extensive technical knowledge that an architect must possess to be able to work effectively at a system scale. An architect needs to understand all complexities and challenges in different parts of a system. She needs a lot of upfront decision making by understanding various trade-offs while designing architecture. It takes years of rich experience to develop such skills.

NewTechWays was founded to help Developers acquire the necessary skills to transition them into Software Architects. It aims to make this transition process quick and easy. They gain expertise in multiple domains of technology. The focus is on learning the latest technology trends and tools that are critical in making a modern software system that is production worthy and highly scalable, reliable, secure, and performant.

We build relationships and equip people of all skill-levels with the resources and information they need to learn how to become a business lending broker. 

But we do more than help find loan brokering business opportunities for our students. We make it possible to quit your job and have a fulfilling role helping people with your services. 
That’s right, we do more than teach how to start a commercial loan broker business, we turn people into forces for good. People who literally change the world while improving their own lives.

Name: Eu Médico Residente

Fazemos parte do ecossistema Inspirali que conta com 15 escolas médicas e mais de 12 mil alunos, integrada ao grupo Ânima Educação, comprometida em transformar o Brasil pela educação. Juntos, impactamos o futuro da Medicina com inovação e excelência.

If you’re looking for clarity in learning and confidence in your career, EdLightened is your launchpad.

 www.edlightened.net

Name: Happiitude
Description:
If you are the one who often feels bad when you see others: 

not being grateful for what they have,
not showing enough compassion,
struggling in their life all the time, 

then you are going to love us. Because this is what we are changing in the world. A journey toward building a world that is full of Love, Compassion & Gratitude. It is a crazy dream but life without craziness is not a life worth living. 

But over the last 9 years, real-life experiences have made us sensible enough to realize that we can't change the world. We can only make people aspire to change by creating role models. And this is what we are doing through our Global Tribe of 1000+ Happiness & Mindfulness Coaches from 50+ countries.

We are Happiitude - the world's leading Happiness & Mindfulness company.

Name: FAMERP - Faculdade de Medicina de São José do Rio Preto
Description:
Visa a formação de profissional para a promoção, prevenção, recuperação e reabilitação do ser humano A primeira turma de Medicina formou-se em 1973. Quase 40 anos depois, a  Faculdade contabiliza a formação de mais de dois mil médicos. A Faculdade de Medicina de São José Preto é uma Autarquia Estadual de Ensino Superior, que mantém cursos de graduação em Medicina desde 1968 e Enfermagem desde 1991. Oferece 61 programas de residência médica e 26 de aprimoramento, cursos de especialização e o curso de pós-graduação em Ciências da Saúde e Enfermagem, que forma mestres e doutores. Por meio de um convênio entre a FAMERP e a Fundação Faculdade Regional de Medicina (FUNFARME), que administra o Hospital de Base (HB), a Instituição atende 460 municípios de 17 Estados brasileiros. Para formar profissionais cidadãos, os cursos de graduação em Medicina e Enfermagem  propiciam, desde o início, o contato do aluno com a população, realizado por meio de parcerias com a Secretaria Municipal de Saúde e a FUNFARME, e no Programa intitulado "Integração Ensino e Serviço".

Nestes anos de atuação em São José do Rio Preto, a Instituição tem recebido avaliações externas positivas, que reafirmam seu comprometimento com a qualidade do ensino, pesquisa e extensão de serviços à comunidade.

Our Vision
Seamless and sustainable movement of goods across borders facilitated by those empowered by knowledge.

Our Mission

3. To contribute to the seamless and sustainable movement of goods across borders.


We are actively looking for customs experts who want to share their expertise on customsclearance.net. If you are one of them, contact us info@customsclear.net

Name: Ellii Learning Company
Description:

We believe that in order to learn a language, students must be interested in the content of each lesson. We have relevant, thought-provoking materials that focus on real-world issues, historical events, and natural dialogues geared toward teens and adults. We also have kid-friendly lessons for young learners and middle schoolers as well as lessons for literacy classrooms.

Ellii (formerly ESL Library) was founded in 2002 as a resource site for English teachers. Our materials are used in thousands of classrooms in over 100 countries around the world. The lessons we develop are intended to enhance, complement, or supplement your own ideas and curriculum. Every month we create and add new materials to the site. Unlike your core textbook, our library of resources continues to grow.

Name: FrogAsia
Description:
We are a social enterprise that aims to transform teaching and learning through technology. With a mission to provide equal access to quality education for all students, we offer 21st-century learning solutions through a technology-based approach. In 2012, we started as the first in the world to connect an entire nation through a single, cloud-based learning platform. Our virtual learning environment, the Frog VLE, is an award-winning platform used by 12 million people worldwide.

Our work in transforming education through technology encompasses building learning communities, influencing thought-leadership, and enabling businesses to provide training and development.

We are honoured to have been recognised for the work we do where we have won Platinum trophies for the Excellence in Provision of Literacy and Education Award in 2017 and 2019 as well as a Gold award in the same category in 2022. Our Learn From Home initiative has also won the People’s Choice Category of the Constellation Awards by AVPN Asia which celebrates the positive impact of innovative projects brought about by social investors in 2022.  In the realm of employee experiences, our dedication was acknowledged with the Gold Award for the Best In-house Candidate Experience category at the 2023 Employee Experience Awards. Furthermore, our recent achievements include being recognized as the Best Company To Work For In Asia (Malaysia) and receiving the Most Caring Company award at the prestigious HR Asia Awards of 2023 which recognises companies excelling in HR practices, emphasizing exceptional employee engagement and fostering remarkable workplace cultures.

Name: AimHi Earth
Description:
At AimHi Earth, we’re on a mission to ensure everyone understands the full picture of the climate and nature crisis, and is motivated to be a part of the solution.

We do this by providing accessible and engaging live, online climate training and education, curated for people and organisations, backed by data and delivered at scale.

Supported by Cambridge Zero (University of Cambridge), the UN Environment Programme, the Eden Project, Climate 2025 and 1% For The Planet, we provide transformational training, insights and ideas through immersive experiences and consulting to deliver data-backed, positive impact.

Our high-quality climate leadership training and consultancy caters to a wide range of clients and provides a holistic understanding of our current crisis, how it impacts us, how to talk about it, and how we can make positive changes at all levels of society.

Whatever your needs are, reach out to us at hello@aimhi.earth and let us know how we can support you on your sustainability journey and strategy.

Name: TalkingPoints
Description:
TalkingPoints is an education technology nonprofit with the mission to drive student success by unlocking the superpower of effective family-school partnerships. The TalkingPoints award-winning Universal Family Engagement platform helps educators improve student and district outcomes through scalable, research-based best practices for family engagement. Across districts nationwide, TalkingPoints has empowered more than eight million educators and families, facilitating over one billion conversations that drive student success.

Named by Common Sense Education as “the best overall family communication platform for teachers and schools,” TalkingPoints leads to gains in attendance rates and academic performance, as shown by rigorous, externally validated causal research. Name: Shmoop
Description:
At Shmoop, we believe education should be engaging, accessible, and, yes, even fun! As a dynamic education technology company, we're redefining learning with a pinch of playfulness and a dash of depth. Our mission? To dissolve the stress often associated with education and replace it with learning experiences that students and educators love.

What We Offer:
Personalized Test Prep: SAT, ACT, AP, and more – we make test prep less daunting and more effective.

Heartbeat: Our pioneering social-emotional learning tool helps students understand and manage their emotions, contributing to a more positive learning environment.

Engaging Digital Curriculum: From Math to Mythology, our courses are designed to spark curiosity and encourage deep understanding.

Our Approach:
We fuse rigorous academic content with storytelling and humor. This unique blend not only makes learning more enjoyable but also more memorable. We’re not just about getting through the material; we’re about making it stick.

Join Our Learning Revolution:
Whether you're a student seeking to ace your exams, a teacher looking for fresh resources, or a parent aiming to support your child's educational journey, Shmoop has something for everyone. Let’s make learning something to look forward to!

Name: TechLabs
Description:
We are TechLabs, a tech community for young digital shapers of all backgrounds. Each semester we recruit a new generation of young people and support them in gaining state-of-the-art tech skills in one of our four tracks: Data Science, Artificial Intelligence Web Development and User Experience.

TechLabs offers a unique learning experience for all participants, using modern e-learning tools, individual learning paths for each participant, and experienced mentors. The community is open to everyone – independent of their background or prior knowledge (in fact, most of our new participants have no or just very limited coding experience). Beyond that, TechLabs actively supports all community members to apply their new tech skills in practice.

The world needs digital shapers more than ever before – so let's build them now!

Name: Tech Education World
Description:
𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗘𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗪𝗼𝗿𝗹𝗱 is an 𝗘-𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 platform. We are provided learning courses, internship programs and freshers jobs opportunities for students and working professionals.

The world of tech education is constantly evolving as new technologies emerge and the demand for skilled professionals in the industry continues to grow. In recent years, there has been a significant increase in the number of people seeking tech education, as well as a shift towards more accessible and affordable options.

One of the biggest trends in tech education is online learning, which allows students to access courses and programs from anywhere in the world. Many online learning platforms offer a wide range of tech-related courses, from coding and web development to data science and cybersecurity.

Another trend in tech education is the rise of bootcamps, which are intensive, short-term programs that provide students with hands-on experience in a particular field of tech. Bootcamps are designed to quickly upskill individuals and prepare them for entry-level positions in the industry.

Universities and colleges are also expanding their tech offerings, with many now offering degree programs in fields like computer science, information technology, and software engineering. Additionally, many institutions are partnering with tech companies to offer specialized programs that provide students with real-world experience and connections in the industry.

Finally, there is a growing focus on diversity and inclusion in tech education, with efforts being made to encourage underrepresented groups to pursue careers in tech. This includes initiatives like scholarships, mentorship programs, and partnerships with organizations that support diversity and inclusion in tech.

Overall, the world of tech education is dynamic and constantly evolving, with new opportunities and innovations emerging all the time. As the demand for tech professionals continues to grow, it's likely that

Name: Seneca Learning
Description:
Seneca helps 10,000,000+ students to learn better. Our homework & revision platform applies cognitive neuroscience to make learning more efficient and enjoyable. We offer 800+ free courses covering all subjects and exam boards.

In a Randomised Control Trial with 1,120 participants, we've proven that students using Seneca obtained test scores 2x higher than their peers using other revision resources. We want every student to have an equal opportunity for the best education and Seneca makes that possible.

Seneca’s algorithms are adaptive and personalize students’ education to their abilities, prior knowledge and performance. Our algorithms are based on students’ knowledge and performance, as well as principles such as the ‘Forgetting Curve’ to deliver an optimal learning experience. Seneca uses spaced repetition, active retrieval, interleaving, multimodal representations and visual memory cues to increase students’ retention of information.

Name: The Gnomon Workshop
Description:
For the last 25 years, The Gnomon Workshop has been a trusted source for high-quality CG artist training. Since launching in 2000, our mission has always been simple: To make professional-level tutorials accessible to artists everywhere.

Today, with a library of over 300 workshops featuring over 200 artists, you can learn everything from Concept Art and Entertainment Design, to 3D Modeling, Texturing, Lighting, Rigging, Animation, Game Engines and Visual Effects. Our instructors are top industry professionals working at studios from around the world, where our workshops provide the opportunity to learn practical, real-world, production-proven techniques. Whether you're just getting started or sharpening your skills, we’re here to help.

Visit thegnomonworkshop.com to browse the library and start learning at your own pace.

Name: Edutech Cluster
Description:
Edutech Cluster is a non-profit association that groups companies and entities in the ICT sector Education that create products and / or technology-based services for the improvement of teaching-learning processes. 

The Cluster aims to implement initiatives to promote and strengthen the competitiveness of the Cluster companies and encourage the birth of new business opportunities by promoting scenarios of demand for quality technological products and services, favoring the partnership between companies for the creation of new ones products or services and facilitating a more cohesive visibility of the sector to the demand.

Name: Touro University Worldwide
Description:
Touro University Worldwide is a nonprofit institution of higher learning established by philanthropic visionaries who are committed to developing a passionate, connected learning community that can help students achieve their individual academic goals. Administration and Faculty of  Touro University Worldwide are committed to social justice, intellectual pursuit and philanthropic duty. This philosophy is derived from the Judaic foundation on which the University was originally founded and a value system that welcomes all cultures and backgrounds.
Touro University Worldwide (TUW) is accredited by the WASC Senior College and University Commission, and is part of the Touro College and University System.  The online degree programs at TUW range from the undergraduate level to the doctoral level. TUW has developed its unique model designed to offer supportive high quality education and improve student success.

TUW has extremely affordable tuition and a scholarship program focused on student retention and graduation making the student cost of learning and attaining a degree well below most comparable institutions.  A complete online library and resources are included in the tuition with no student expenses on textbooks.

Name: CyberEd.io
Description:
Our founders started out as cybersecurity practitioners and CISOs. They quickly recognized the pressing need for high-quality cybersecurity training to take their teams to the next level.

That’s why CyberEd.io provides one central source for the best real-world, hands-on training just for you and your team. All training and coursework required to close the cybersecurity skills gap is available here, allowing you to seamlessly manage progress. We take out the guesswork and do it all for you.

Our mission is to close the gap in cybersecurity talent and technical ability by providing enterprises and individuals the training they need to upskill and reskill.

All of our coursework is drawn from practical, hands-on experience and has been created by some of the top CISOs in the world. Our courses and learning paths are then curated by practitioners who understand the needs of enterprise security teams today and are passionate about elevating education in cybersecurity beyond the theoretical to the real world.

Name: Mentorology
Description:
Mentorology is a digital platform that provides young lawyers and law students with the opportunity to be guided and mentored by successful legal professionals from all spheres of the industry. It is a platform where law students can sign up to be assigned a mentor, from our sizable list of willing legal professionals, to guide them and to better prepare them for what lies ahead in the profession.

Law students often find themselves confused and overwhelmed by the sheer amount of choices that are thrown on them before they even enter the profession. We believe that with the right kind of guidance these law aspirants can be much better equipped to make these decisions.

We at Mentorology aim to connect law students with professionals who will mentor them in their respective fields, as having someone to look up to and seek advice is of utmost importance during law school. We provide a personalised form of guidance to law students to prepare them for what lies ahead in the profession. Our team of mentors, with the intention to help guide these young lawyers, aims to provide insights into the profession through individual and group mentoring sessions.

 Crisp study materials aligned to the latest GATE syllabus, saving time and focusing effort on high-impact topics.
 Solved previous year questions (PYQs) with detailed explanations, enabling students to recognize important patterns and exam trends.
 Extensive practice questions and full-length mock tests designed to simulate the real GATE exam experience.
 Personalized mentorship and doubt-clearing sessions, providing individual attention to keep aspirants motivated and on track.

What makes Foodemy unique is our deep-rooted industry expertise combined with a personalized, student-first approach. We don’t just deliver content – we mentor, guide, and equip students with practical problem-solving skills and exam strategies that work.

Our commitment to continuous improvement ensures our content stays updated with the latest GATE syllabus changes and industry trends, giving students an edge in preparation.

Whether you aim to join top institutes, build a strong career in the food technology sector, or enhance your technical knowledge, Foodemy is your trusted partner in success.

Name: (re)Biz
Description:

As a leadership un/school, (re)Biz provides transformative workshops designed to explore the in-between spaces and question business-as-usual paradigms. Through two core offerings—the (re)Biz Core Course, a 28-day online program, and Project Tipping Point—leaders are equipped with un-learning processes that challenge hegemonic worldviews and introduce kinship-centered, regenerative practices. These workshops empower participants to build a post-growth, pluriversal future by fostering connection with a like-hearted, global community dedicated to healing and reshaping the world.

(re)Biz is more than just a course; it is a journey of exploration and self-discovery, encouraging curiosity, creativity, and intersectional thinking. Participants engage with self-organizing natural systems and learn practical tools to implement regenerative solutions in both personal and professional spheres. The program creates space for reflection and innovative thought while re-establishing right relationships with the Earth. Upon completion, graduates are invited to join an exclusive alumni network, continuing their work with ongoing support, feedback, and opportunities to cultivate these new ways of thinking into thriving ecosystems. 

For more information, visit https://rebiz.io.

Benefits for Partners
By partnering with Digdata, organisations invest in their future workforce while delivering meaningful social impact. Our inclusive programmes are accessible to all students, helping tackle economic inequality, widen participation, and support national upskilling priorities.
 
Through collaboration, students develop problem-solving, critical thinking, data literacy, and AI awareness, alongside genuine work experience through employer-led data challenges. Together, we strengthen the talent pipeline and shape the future of data-driven careers.
 
Benefits for Educators
Whether you are a subject teacher, careers lead, or senior leader, Digdata provides free, high-quality tools and resources, co-created with industry partners, to support student learning and progression.
 
Our programmes help students build:
• Core data literacy and analytical skills

We support schools, colleges and universities by:

• Aligning with equalex learning outcomes and supporting the Gatsby Benchmarks
• Enabling students to earn certification for every career challenge completed
 
Together, we create inclusive opportunities, future-ready skills, and a stronger data workforce.
 
Contact rachel@digdata.online for more.

Name: Reading Eggs - Blake eLearning
Description:
Blake eLearning came from humble beginnings 30 years ago in Australia, when CEO Matthew Sandblom set up a modest publishing company in a small attic in the Sydney suburb of Glebe.

Over time, the company has grown to the point where our award-winning products are used all over the world by millions of children. Now we have offices in Australia, United States and the United Kingdom, as well as partners in South Africa, New Zealand, Canada and China.  

The key to our success is simple—we are passionate about creating better ways for children to learn.

At the start, this meant publishing books that both teachers and students found easy and enjoyable to use. And while this is still a very successful part of what we do, in more recent times we’ve transitioned to digital education, which has transformed the way children are learning the core academic skills of literacy and numeracy.

Our flagship product Reading Eggs—our online reading program for ages two to 13—was launched in 2008, and today has been used by over 10 million children in 169 countries. This program is a true embodiment of everything we stand for—giving children better ways to learn by making it highly engaging, enjoyable and of course, effective. 

Following the success of Reading Eggs, we went on to create additional learning programs like Mathseeds, our online mathematics program for ages 3–9, and our latest Reading Eggs Junior, which launched in 2017 and is the most comprehensive early learning program for toddlers aged two to four.

Today, we’re proud to be a recognised leader in creating innovative and exciting learning resources for teachers, parents and children around the globe.

Name: Aljazeera Learning Arabic الجزيرة تعلّم العربية
Description:
موقع الجزيرة لتعلّم العربية:
 موقع تعليمي مجاني مفتوح يتبع لمعهد الجزيرة للإعلام، ويمثل رؤية شبكة الجزيرة في تعزيز التواصل بين الشعوب والثقافات. 
وهو موقع تعليمي مجاني مفتوح يهدف إلى تعليم اللغة العربية ونشرها لتكون جسرًا للتواصل الإنساني والتفاهم الحضاري.

المحتوى:
يحوي الموقع مواد تعليمية متنوّعة، تغطّي المستويات اللغوية الثلاثة (المبتدئ، المتوسط، المتقدم)، وتنمّي مهارات المتعلمين اللغوية الأساسية (التحدث، الاستماع، القراءة، الكتابة).

الخدمات:
يقدم الموقع لزواره خدمات إلكترونية تفاعلية متميزة منها:
- خدمة المعجم للبحث عن معاني الكلمات والعبارات.
- خدمة التحليل الصرفي لمعرفة أصول الكلمات وأبنيتها الصرفية.
- خدمة التشكيل لتشكيل النصوص وضبطها.
- خدمة الأسئلة والأجوبة التي تتيح للمستخدم إرسال الأسئلة وتلقّي الأجوبة.  
- خدمة المدونات التي تتيح للأساتذة نشر أفكارهم وآرائهم المتعلقة باللغة العربية. 

الواجهات:
يقدم الموقع مواده عبر ثلاث واجهات هي:

Name: Enriched Academy
Description:
Enriched Academy is on a mission to make financial literacy accessible to all Canadians. Over 350,000 individuals have used our programs and we also work with education officials, governments and teachers across the country to provide financial literacy education resources for use with students at schools, colleges and universities. More than 50 well-recognized corporations and associations also use our programs as part of their employee assistance programs to support financial health and overall wellness within their organizations.

Our self-guided, online programs feature practical, expert advice delivered in straightforward language specifically designed to help Canadians take control of their finances and build a solid financial future. It also includes a suite of powerful online tools. 

In addition to these online resources, we also have a team of dedicated, professionally accredited financial coaches to take clients through a customized, one-on-one financial coaching program. Unlike financial advisors, our coaching program provides the guidance and the knowledge required to take control of your own money for a lifetime of financial wellness.

At select dates and venues throughout the year, our financial experts crisscross the country to offer our live and in person, one-day personal finance bootcamps.

We also offer free livestreams at least once a week on all aspects of personal finance. Sign up for our Financial Friday newsletter (https://www.enrichedacademy.com/lp/financial-friday) to keep up with all of our events as well as plenty of informative articles, tips and resources.

Name: Learning Bangladesh
Description:
Founded by Sabbir Ahmed in March 2020, Learning Bangladesh is an innovative e-learning platform that originated from the profound need for digital education during the global stagnation caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. Our journey began unofficially in 2016 and was officially launched with an initial investment of just 5,000 BDT. Starting from scratch, Sabbir leveraged his decade-long experience across national and multinational companies, including startups like Pathao, and his ventures in the freelance marketplace Kajkey.com and animation business EndingScene Studio, to create this platform.

Today, Learning Bangladesh hosts over 30,000 active learners from 500 locations across the nation, engaging daily in over 100+ hours of skill development courses. With a rich catalogue featuring more than 20 instructors, our platform specializes in data-driven digital marketing, video editing, animation, and cutting-edge courses on AI tools like ChatGPT and Midjourney. This makes us a leading player in Bangladesh’s digital learning landscape.

Services Offered:

Customized E-Learning Solutions: Tailored for corporations, schools, and universities to enhance their educational frameworks.
Extensive Online Course Catalog: Courses are designed to align with current market trends and are available in Bengali, catering specifically to local needs.
Corporate Training Programs: Equip professionals and students with essential skills to thrive in the corporate world.
Job Portal Services: Connects job seekers with potential employers, facilitating diverse employment opportunities across Bangladesh.
With the core belief in “Learn for Better Future,” Learning Bangladesh is committed to transforming the educational landscape, making digital competency accessible and affordable to all. Join us on this journey to empower and educate, ensuring a better future for every learner in Bangladesh.

Established in 2019 by an alumnus of IIM Bangalore, VocalCode has positioned itself as a beacon of excellence in language instruction.

Founded with a vision to elevate language learning, VocalCode’s roots trace back to 2019 under the guidance of an IIM Bangalore graduate. Our headquarters, strategically located in New Delhi, serves as the hub for our operations. This central hub embodies our commitment to providing top-tier language instruction services, reflecting our mission to empower learners with the skills necessary for effective communication.

At VocalCode, excellence is not just a goal; it’s embedded in our ethos. Our commitment extends beyond geographical boundaries, transcending language barriers to offer a platform where learners can thrive. Through meticulous instruction and a focus on quality, we aim to empower individuals on their journey to linguistic proficiency, fostering a global community connected through the art of language.

Name: Global Teletherapy
Description:
Global Teletherapy provides state-of-the-art online therapy services to children nationwide. We specialize in online speech therapy, online occupational therapy, and online mental health services. Our therapists assist schools and parents throughout America in giving customized care and attention to every child in need.

If you’re a school, Global Teletherapy can help you overcome staffing shortages and lighten heavy caseloads. Your district no longer needs to rely on staffing agencies, pay transportation expenses, or worry about interruptions in the therapy process.

If you’re a therapist, you might want to consider joining our team. You’d enjoy tremendous flexibility and get to make your own schedule. You’d work from home and have the opportunity to work as much or as little as you’d like. The therapy is done entirely over the computer and our therapists tell us that the work is very enjoyable.

For years we’ve been enabling therapists to have the work-life balance they want while helping schools find top-notch therapists to patiently and professionally serve their students.

We’re helping children reach their potential by harnessing the power of the online therapy revolution. Find out more about us by going to our website or calling us today at (888) 511-9395.

Name: ECA Capacitaciones
Description:
Eca Capacitaciones es una academia 100% online enfocada en brindar herramientas claves al alcance de todos.

En un mercado laboral cada vez más competitivo nos centramos en ofrecer cursos indispensables tanto para aquellos que estén dando sus primeros pasos como para quienes deseen mejorar su desempeño en su trabajo o emprendimiento

  Actualmente contamos con más de 24.000 alumnos, 27 cursos/combos, de ofimática, programación, análisis de datos, finanzas, administrativos contables, etc.

   En ECA Capacitaciones contamos con cursos pre-grabados, dándole al alumno la posibilidad de revisar cada clase las veces que necesita, poder pausar la misma y tomar nota y/o resúmenes. Cada curso cuenta con material para descargar y así poder seguir cada clase o practicar por su cuenta el tema que se enseña. Lo más importante es que el alumno cuenta con un foro general del curso, y un foro específico para cada clase donde puede resolver dudas con nuestros profesores en cualquier momento. En caso de continuar aquellas dudas se coordina con el profesor del curso una clase en vivo para poder resolverlas de manera personalizada. 

  Es válido destacar que el acceso a cada curso es ilimitado, aún habiendo completado el curso, lo que posibilita volver a revisar los temas necesarios.

Nuestra metodología está más que comprobada, ya que las opiniones de nuestros alumnos nos avalan.

Skoove is a music technology start-up located in Berlin. We are a team of 30 certified music nuts with expert-status in technology, music education, and online marketing.

Skoove also has several venture capital firms backing the product that firmly believe in the ongoing growth of the online learning market. 
  
Our first app, a virtual piano teacher, was featured from Apple worldwide, along with “Forbes,” “The Guardian,” and “Wired!” 

Are you looking for a company where you can make a difference, have a voice, and work with a team of industry experts who are passionate, hard working and enjoy having fun? Come, join the band, and help us achieve Skoove's goal: making music learning fun, effective, and accessible to everyone!

Name: CanopyLAB LLC
Description:
CanopyLAB is an educational technology company located in Mexico City. We have built an AI-powered social learning platform for corporate training. Through personalization our platform enables all learners to realize their potential in a way that is fast, fun and future-proof. We call it "The Future of Learning- Delivered Today".

The Canopy is where we design white label solutions for corporate learning and communication. 

The LAB offers free and global learning with leading NGOs on focusing on the UN 17 Sustainable Development Goals and humanities.

CanopyLAB er en dansk EdTech virksomhed grundlagt i 2015. Vores vision om at ændre den måde, vi lærer på, blev konceptualiseret baseret på vores administrerende direktør Sahra-Josephine Hjorts igangværende Ph.D.-forskning ved Aalborg Universitet, der fokuserede på virtuelle læringsmiljøer, sociale medier og frisættelse gennem læring. Hun dannede hurtigt par med Christian Skræm Juul Jensen, som omsatte forskningen og visionen til en ny og fundamentalt anderledes digital læringsplatform.

I april 2020 opkøbte CanopyLAB det peruvianske start-up forlag, Yopublico og tilbyder nu start-til-slut løsninger inden for læring og udgivelser gennem kontorer i Columbia, Danmark, Peru, USA og Vietnam,

CanopyLAB servicerer på nuværende tidspunkt over 200 virksomheder og uddannelsesinstitutioner i mere end 20 forskellige lande med virtuel- og blended læringsoplevelser. I 2020 blev vi anerkendt af Elearning Industry på deres prestigefyldte liste over top LMS'er og LXP'er i kategorierne Kundeservice og Bedste Læringsoplevelse.

Name: Cloud Campus Treinamentos em Tecnologia
Description:
CloudCampus uma empresa com plataforma educacional na NUVEM, líder de mercado na preparação online de profissionais para a trilha de certificação CISCO (CCNA, CCNP, CCDA, etc.), detentora de metodologia simples, objetiva, vencedora e em conformidade com o padrão SCORM. 
Além das certificações CISCO a CloudCampus oferece, também, cursos preparatórios para as seguintes certificações de alto nível: MEF - Carrier Ethernet Certified Professional (MEF-CECP); CISSP  Certified Information Systems Security Professional; CCSA  Check Point Certified Security Administrator - R76; LPIC-1  Linux Professional Institute Certification Level 1 (Exam 101); ITIL - ITIL Foundation v3 (exame EX0-001); OCA  Oracle Certified Associate exame (1Z0-051,).
Em 5 anos de atuação, a CloudCampus já capacitou cerca de 12 mil profissionais nas tecnologias de Redes e Telecom contempladas em seus 100 cursos. Destes 12.000 profissionais, vários deles obtiveram sucesso nos exames de certificação profissional dos principais players do mercado.
Seus professores/instrutores são expoentes em suas áreas de atuação, todos com certificações de alto nível, autores de best-sellers e atuantes nas maiores empresas do segmento de Redes e Telecom.
CloudCampus também atua no desenvolvimento de cursos personalizados (nos formatos online e presencial); arquitetura, desenvolvimento e gerenciamento de plataformas de ensino à distância e salas de reuniões virtuais; consultoria e aluguel de salas de aula ou de reuniões virtuais. Dentre os clientes atualmente atendidos pela empresa, constam a EMBRATEL/Claro, Cisco do Brasil (projetos personalizados), NEC do Brasil (projetos personalizados), Telefónica/VIVO, T-Systems do Brasil, NET, Algar Telecom, Petrobrás, Positivo Informática, dentre outros.

Name: Erschaffe dich neu
Description:
Was könntest du aus deinem Leben machen, wenn du dein gesamtes Potential nutzen würdest?

Wir von Erschaffe dich neu verschaffen ambitionierten Menschen einen Vorsprung im Leben. Wir glauben daran, dass wir alle noch deutlich mehr zu bieten haben. Der Weg zu deinem unentdeckten Potential geht über persönliche Weiterentwicklung. Wir lieben es zu lernen, unsere Grenzen zu testen, große Ziele zu jagen und das Leben anderer Menschen zu verändern. Durch unsere Online Kurse, Coachings & Inhalte konnten wir bereits Millionen von Menschen einen Vorsprung im Leben verschaffen.

Mittlerweile zählt Erschaffe dich neu zu den größten Coaching Unternehmen im deutschsprachigen Raum. Wir sind ein Team aus 15 Leuten, schnell wachsend und multikulti, vertreten durch verschiedenste Migrationshintergründe.

Unsere Arbeit findet remote statt, so sind Laptop & Zoom unser Zuhause. Unsere Unternehmenskultur besteht aus 4 Eckpfeilern. 

1) Mehrwert bieten
2) Ehrlichkeit, Offenheit, Transparenz & Kritik
3) Große Ziele jagen
4) Mittelmäßigkeit zerstören

Auch wenn individuelle Performance gefeiert wird, so steht das Team über der einzelnen Person. Wir legen einen sehr großen Fokus darauf, wer diesem Team beitreten darf, um unsere lang gepflegte Kultur zu erhalten.

Name: One Roof
Description:
One Roof is a digital membership for female leaders & entrepreneurs. 

We began as a co-working business and over 6 years became well known as the leading co-working operator for women in Australia. In fact, we were voted top 5 co-working spaces for women in the world. We had plans to grow this co-working empire and then COVID-19 hit. 

We made the swift decision to completely pivot the business to a digital membership. In 6 months we have grown the membership and community to 400+ women (and some men) Australia-wide, hosted 200+ masterclasses, co-hosted the largest female founder pitch night in 2020 and will be back in 2021 and had great success amongst our community. 

The One Roof membership supports women to access the right professional network and community, upskill, celebrate wins, ask for feedback, problem solve their biggest challenges and connect with industry experts.

We offer a very personalised member experience including an on-boarding call, weekly networking sessions, curated introductions and regular business catch ups.  

We obsess over our members success. 

“One Roof is a fantastic emerging, virtual community for female business owners, remote workers and solopreneurs. The quality of members is amazing and I love the diversity of events. I highly recommend this membership if you want accountability, personal growth, and to feel a part of a like-minded crew.”
— Kate Kendall, Founder of CloudPeeps, Indie Labs & Atto

“I joined the One Roof tribe as I am passionate about sharing knowledge and supporting other women. I also love gaining knowledge and hearing stories from other business owners and women. I feel it is a very open and safe community to speak freely and without judgement - we all need a safe space to seek support, and this is One Roof.”
— Jessica Bilston-Gourley, Founder of PositiveHR

Name: CodeCombat
Description:
Learn to code and use AI, all through the power of play! At CodeCombat, we create innovative play experiences to make computer science engaging and accessible to all. Our learning tools combine gameplay with a standards-aligned curriculum and turnkey educator resources for an experience that students and teachers love. Our solution has helped over 20 million students enjoy learning Computer Science, and supported 320,000 educators to teach it.

Our scaffolded approach covers computer science fundamentals up through advanced courses and features College Board endorsed AP CSP, as well as web and game development modules. We build customized pathways to deliver a personalized learning experience that meets CSTA, ISTE and Common Core State Standards, with the ability to teach Python, JavaScript, C++, Lua and more. 

The turnkey teacher resource hub empowers all educators to teach on day one. Easily access lesson plans, student-facing lesson slides, rubrics, extension activities, capstone projects and assessments. Our safe AI integrations accelerate student potential and allow educators to optimize class time. For real-world practice and application, we offer competitive coding esports, Roblox game design and web design options. Additionally, educators can control student pacing with content assignment and locking features. 

We provide administrators the insight they need with real-time usage data and progress reports at the class, school, district and state level. Student level progress tracking enables educators to easily identify when intervention is needed and built in pre and post module assessments measure student comprehension.   

We follow stringent school-grade privacy regulations including COPPA, FERPA, SOPIPA, California AB 1584, CalOPPA, Fair Information Practices, CAN-SPAM, as well as GDPR.

Each of our games and resources play a key role in our K12 approach!

Visit https://codecombat.com/schools to start teaching today with free lessons and resources.

Name: Şehremini Anadolu Lisesi
Description:
Şehremini Anadolu Lisesi eski adıyla Şehremini Lisesi, İstanbul'un Fatih ilçesi Çapa semtinde "Uygulama Ortaokulu" olarak 1950-1951 öğretim yılında açılmıştır.

Kemal Kaya'nın girişimleri ile "Derviş Paşa Konağı" arsasına yapılan binada 3 Ekim 1955'te Şehremini Ortaokulu adı ile eğitim ve öğretime başlanmış [kaynak belirtilmeli]ve okulun kurucu müdürlüğüne Tahir Tezcan atanmıştır. O dönemin valisi Vefa Poyraz'ın yakın ilgileri ile 1970-1971 öğretim yılından itibaren liseye çevrilmiştir.

Kurucu müdür Tahir Tezcan'dan sonra Tevfik Ak (1975-1985 ve Şükrü Kaya Yaşar (1985-1992) okul müdürü olarak görev yapmışlardır. Ağustos 1992 tarihinden itibaren de M. Ata Özer okul müdürlüğü görevini sürdürmüştür. 1993 yılında lisenin İngilizce eğitim veren yabancı dil ağırlıklı bölümü de Şehremini Süper Lisesi adıyla açılmıştır. 2006 yılında M. Ata Özer'in İstanbul İl Millî Eğitim Müdürü olmasıyla İsmail Can okul müdürü olmuştur. 2015-2023 yılları arasında müdürlük görevini Yüksel Köşker yürütmüş, 2023 yılından itibaren bu göreve Vedat Yüksel atanmıştır.

iCanStudy is an international educational organisation teaching people to learn more efficiently. We pride ourselves on our unique combination of deep research-based systems, extensive practical testing, and best-practice training methodologies.

We work with tens of thousands of learners from over 120 countries, from adolescents to retirees. Our cognitive retraining program flips learning on its head, building an end-to-end, integrated system of learning that leverages the biological tendencies of the human brain. Our novel methods have been demonstrated to dramatically enhance memory, problem-solving, depth of understanding, and deep processing skills while reducing time spent on learning.

We work with students in formal education from adolescence onwards, up to working professionals of all ages.

Learn more about our methods: https://icanstudy.com/how-it-works/.
Contact us via LinkedIn or at https://icanstudy.com/contact/

La Escuela de Negocios y Emprendimiento Digital (ESNED) tiene cuatro objetivos principales: 

 Ayudar emprendedores a impulsar (o lanzar) sus negocios en el mundo online para que no les falten clientes, y tengan más libertad y estabilidad. Y para que puedan tener tiempo libre, viajar y disfrutar de sus negocios.
 Ayudar a empresas a digitalizar, automatizar y disparar sus ventas digitales con estrategias efectivas y probadas.
 Ayudar a profesionales que desean cambiar sus trabajos de 09:00 a 18:00 por trabajos remotos que les permita tener la libertad de vivir y trabajar desde donde quieran.
 Ayudar a jóvenes a prepararse con conocimientos que les permitan diseñar un futuro profesional que les apasione y les de la libertad de viajar y disfrutar de su trabajo.

Nuestra meta es ayudar con nuestros cursos a 1 millón de personas alrededor del mundo. De momento llevamos más de 55.000 ESNEDers... Todavía nos queda un camino largo para llegar esa meta y mientras nosotros recorremos nuestro camino, espero que te podamos ayudar a recorrer el tuyo. Espero que tú formes parte de esta comunidad de gente que no se conforma con lo tradicional, gente que sueña y que hace, gente que desea más de la vida.

The result is an intensive 6 month full-time course, which you can do from the comfort of your home. Name: East Bridge University
Description:
East Bridge University, Paris is a globally accredited online university dedicated to advancing higher education for working professionals. We design flexible, career-focused degree and doctorate programs that allow adult learners to achieve academic excellence while balancing demanding careers and personal commitments.

Our mission is to bridge education and opportunity, empowering individuals worldwide through innovative, accessible, and impactful learning. In line with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), EBU is committed to promoting quality education, inclusivity, gender equality, and global partnerships that create meaningful impact.

With operational centres in the UK, USA, Malaysia, Dubai, India, and Vietnam, EBU combines global reach with local relevance. Our faculty and supervisors come from renowned universities and industries, bringing expertise in adult education, workplace literacy, and applied research. Every program is structured to not only provide academic knowledge but also deliver practical, real-world impact.

At East Bridge University, learning goes beyond credentials. Our students are guided through applied research, mentoring, and global exposure that prepares them to lead in business, education, technology, health, and social sciences. We maintain a strong commitment to academic integrity, innovation, and international recognition.

Our vision is to become a global leader in online education for professionals, shaping learners into forward-thinking leaders and responsible global citizens. With regular global convocations celebrating graduates across continents and a growing alumni network, EBU continues to inspire change, uplift careers, and foster a more equitable and sustainable future.

East Bridge University is more than a university — it is a platform for transformation, inclusivity, and lifelong success.

- Formação prática, com a presença de instrutores especializados.
- O aluno pode assitir às aulas com professores de outros estados sem precisar sair da sua cidade;
- Os valores são mais baratos, comparados os cursos presencias;
- Conteúdos de alta qualidade e elaborados por especialistas da área.

Name: Children Story Time
Description:
The concept for Children Story Time is a customizable interactive app compatible with all smart devices that allows parents and children alike to craft educational and exciting stories with personalized characters and themes portrayed exactly as they desire. This allows children to construct characters that they can relate to, empowering them to create heroes that look like
themselves and thus contributing to self-esteem, self-worth and belief in oneself. The product is designed to allow children to dive into their own identities at a young age and really explore who they are as individuals. The app provides the freedom to use actual family photos, characters from popular children stories or default characters that can easily be completely modified to the liking of the child. Family photos and memories can be expanded upon and given new life repeatedly through healthy exercise of the imagination of the child. This also strengthens connection and bond between children and their families. Functionality of the app complimentary to creative freedom include skills such as math, science, alphabet and literacy, digital exploration capacity, social interaction, independence, team work, music and other integrations.

Name: KayScience
Description:
KayScience.com is an online GCSE & KS3 Science educational platform made by science teachers providing high-quality resources to 100's of 1000s of students and teachers around the world. 

Our platform features the very best video content on the internet, incorporating dual coding and chunking of GCSE science content to ensure that even the most difficult concepts are broken down into easily digestible sections for all types of students.

In addition to our video content, we offer a range of interactive tools to help students solidify their understanding of key topics, including self-marking quizzes, comprehension questions, gap fills and exam question booklets covering various exam boards. 

Our low-stakes quiz generator is an innovative tool to help teachers review material and test their students' knowledge.

At KayScience, we understand the importance of quality education, which is why our platform is made by science teachers with years of experience in the classroom. With our engaging and effective approach to learning, we're proud to support students and teachers around the world in their pursuit of academic excellence.

Description:
Tiny Ivy has created an innovative reading system to give every child an equal chance to rocket themselves into a bright future. By making reading easier, we enable children to make more progress, faster, with fewer mistakes. This creates a positive cycle of success that can lead to a life-long love of reading.

Our approach can be introduced in a variety of ways: traditional learning tools such as flashcards, workbooks, and simple toys are available on our website. We also are developing a robust early-learning game for iOS, Android, and Kindle Fire tablets, which teaches children our system in an interactive, engaging environment.

Name: GW
Description:
GW is in the business of enhancing learning experiences, improving learning outcomes, and developing user-friendly reference materials. We do this through our partnerships with educational technology companies, publishers, continuing education providers, educators, professional organizations and societies, and corporations. Our core services are content development and publishing support services for development and production teams. 

Our content development experts create everything from assessments to instructor resources to student materials, always adhering research-based instructional design principles. We also provide accessibility-related services, such as writing alt-text and ensuring content meets accessibility requirements with regard to color usage, contrast, reading order, and other standards, as well as stand-alone instructional design consultation.

Our publishing support services include a wide array of core services, including project management (both for production and editorial teams), art development and creation, image manipulation, animations, copyediting, proofreading, indexing, design, and composition, among others.

Name: Blub Blub Inc.
Description:
Blub Blub Inc. was founded in 2017 with the mission of tackling some of the biggest challenges in early education space. Our main product - Speech Blubs app is now the #1 speech and language development app and is among the 5 top-grossing apps for children aged 5 and under in the US.

The app boosts young children’s comprehension and extends their vocabulary, whilst improving their pronunciation, attention, and even their emotional intelligence. We help them learn in a playful app environment whilst providing smart screen time - the next best thing to real-life face-to-face-interaction. Kids develop their speech and primary language through approved therapeutic techniques such as video-modelling and gamification while using different technological approaches such as AI, facial recognition, voice activation and even personalisation for each user.

Since our beginning we have helped over 5,000,000 kids from all around the world! Our app is especially helpful for children with conditions such as Speech Delay, ADHD, Autism, Down Syndrome or Sensory Processing Disorder.

We are a culture driven team that includes designers, marketers, growth experts, UX experts, data analysts, engineers, marketers, content creators, early education experts and psychologists. We are user- and customer-centric, data-informed, impact-driven, and revenue-oriented.

We intend to become the leading player in the early childhood education sector, with the offering of a diverse product that will help our users from saying the first words to having all the skills necessary to have a head-start in preschool.

Name: Legal English Books
Description:
Not many legal English books have a preface written by an Oxford Law Professor. These books have one. Among other things, he confirmed that 
"In these astonishing books of reference and instruction, Szabó László has produced an account of the rules, principles, usages and understandings of legal English which has no equivalent, certainly in England, and in all probability anywhere else in the world."
A unique set of books that describes 7 UK and US practice areas:
- Law of Civil Procedure
- Law of Contracts
- Law of Property
- Law of Intellectual Property
- Law of Inheritance
- Law of Torts
- Law of Companies. 

Dictionaries tell you the equivalent of a legal term in another language. These books tells you how native professionals (UK and US attorneys, judges, etc.) use legal terms. So, by reading and regulary consulting these books, you can achieve native pro excellence in legal English in using 1550 legal terms. Knowledge is presented in a clear-cut and user-friendly manner, by sentence patters and sample sentences, so you can use these sentence patterns instantly to create your legal English sentences at native pro level.

Written by a legal terminologist and legal translator having completed a Yale law course, and proofread by an U.S. attorney (with a law degree from Yale), these books describe a total of 1550 legal terms in 7 practice areas. 
Useful for law students to get prepared to work at law firms with international clients. Useful also for lawyers, to enable them to serve international clients. Useful also for legal translators when they are to write legal texts. Useful also at university translation courses, in teaching students legal English.
By regularly consulting these books, you will get to know 
- 7 practice areas,
- the legal terms in use in these practice areas, and
- how to use these terms at native pro level and you will have a good understanding of these practice areas, thereby promoting your career in law and in legal translations.

At present, education in Indonesia still has several problems related to quality and access, as well as the even distribution of well-trained teachers. In addition, with the rapid development of technology, Indonesian children do not have the suitable platform that acts as a learning media that teaches them about character, manner, and cognitive learning.

Name: NagaEd
Description:
We turn ideas into unforgettable learning experiences.
We are an Instructional Design Studio that partners with SMEs, businesses, educational institutions, government bodies, and CSR programs to design custom learning solutions that make real impact.
From converting complex policies into practical training to building digital-first learning journeys, we specialise in:
Curriculum and course design (digital, blended, and offline) :We help companies design smart training programs. It’s like building a map that shows people exactly what they need to learn to do their job well, in the office, on the field, or online.
Storyboarding, scripting, and microlearning development: We break down training into bite-sized, easy-to-understand lessons. It’s like telling a short, clear story, instead of handing someone a big, boring manual. People remember more when it’s short and focused.
Policy-to-practice training solutions for government and development sectors: When companies or governments have rules or safety protocols, we turn them into real-life training. For example, “Don’t just tell people the fire drill policy, show them what to do when the alarm goes off.”
Instructional storytelling (videos, simulations, scenarios): We create scenario-based learning that mirrors real challenges—like resolving customer complaints, managing sales conversations, or avoiding costly factory mistakes.
Our goal? To help teams build confidence through practice, not just theory.
Learning strategy consulting and impact evaluation: We work with leadership teams to ask:
“Is your training working?”
We help companies measure impact, fix gaps, and plan better learning, so they don’t waste time or money.
Whether you're looking to launch a skills program, create compliance training, or roll out a scalable learning solution, we bring the right mix of pedagogy, technology, and storytelling to bring your ideas to life.
Learning should stick. Our design makes sure it does.
Message us or email hello@nagaed.com
