We believe in a communicative approach to language learning that allows students to put their new language skills into practice immediately. Our CEFR-aligned learning materials are designed by linguistic experts and focus on meaningful topics that relate to our students’ interests, careers and everyday lives. Thanks to our extensive rotating roster of teachers and our small group classes, students are exposed to a variety of regional accents and expressions within the same language and have the time and space to practice speaking in every lesson.

Our diverse team includes over 250 international professionals, representing dozens of countries and languages. In 2021, Lingoda won the EdTech Cool Tool Award for the Best Language Learning Solution; the Europas Awards also named Lingoda as 2021’s Hottest EdTech StartUp. We have a score of 4.4 on Trustpilot and 74% of our reviews rated as ‘excellent’ because we offer a high-quality and authentic learning experience that helps students achieve their learning goals and speak a new language with confidence.

De LOI maakt hét verschil in opleiden door kwalitatief hoogwaardig onderwijs toegankelijk te maken voor iedereen. Dat doen we door ieders persoonlijke situatie en behoeften centraal te stellen. En door te blijven ontwikkelen en vernieuwen, wat ons in staat stelt de kwaliteit van onze opleidingen te garanderen en voorop te lopen als het gaat om gebruik van effectieve, nieuwe studiemethodes en leermiddelen. Daarnaast ontwikkelen we steeds weer nieuwe opleidingen volgens de laatste arbeidsmarkttrends, zodat iedereen kan blijven groeien in zijn of haar vakgebied. En zorgen we dat zowel thuis als klassikaal studeren beter in je leven past dan ooit. Niet voor niets is de LOI een van de bekendste opleiders van Nederland met jaarlijks bijna 100.000 studenten.

- Al vanaf 1923 toegankelijker onderwijs voor iedereen.
- Aantoonbare kwaliteit, zoals erkende diploma’s en NVAO-accreditaties.
- Opleidingen in elke denkbare richting, zowel thuis als klassikaal te volgen.
- Erkende en enige particuliere hogeschool met overheidskeurmerk voor kwaliteitszorg, ITK.
- Altijd de nieuwste studietools: online hoorcolleges, webinars en mobiele apps.

Erkende kwaliteit
Een opleiding is een belangrijke investering in je toekomst en vraagt ook om een serieuze investering in tijd en geld. Dan móet het dus ook wel goed zijn en het beoogde resultaat opleveren.
De LOI beseft dat als geen ander. De hele organisatie is er dan ook op gericht om kwaliteit af te leveren en op te leiden voor erkende diploma’s. Hiertoe selecteert de LOI alleen de beste docenten, zijn de opleidingen op alle fronten erkend – bijvoorbeeld door het ministerie van Onderwijs, Cultuur en Wetenschap (OCW) – én onderhouden we naast de overheid tevens nauwe contacten met brancheorganisaties, exameninstanties en het bedrijfsleven. Zo zorgen we voor een perfecte aansluiting van de opleidingen op de examens én op de arbeidsmarkt en haal je dus een optimaal rendement uit je investering.

Name: Idioma Independente
Description:
Somos uma comunidade de Professores Independentes.
 
Todos os professores são treinados para ensinar utilizando a metodologia Idioma Independente, que foi desenvolvida por Felipe Santana da Costa, economista formado pela USP, e passou a divulgá-la a partir de 2009. Através de seus estudos com autodidatas ele percebeu que estes aprendiam muito mais rápido e mais profundamente do que as pessoas que utilizavam as metodologias tradicionais.
Após aplicar o método em si mesmo e em outras pessoas, a metodologia Idioma Independente foi objeto de estudo de dois pesquisadores da Universidade Anhanguera em Campinas que encontraram embasamento teórico, fornecendo suporte ao aprendizado autodidata como válido e eficiente.
 
Em 2012 a Idioma Independente foi apresentada como um case de sucesso na FEA-RP, USP Ribeirão Preto, por estudantes de Administração, e foi incluída como uma das empresas criadas na FEA-RP.
 
Em 2014 a Idioma Independente atinge o cenário internacional com o convite para fazer a tradução consecutiva de uma pesquisadora de Oxford em um congresso na USP. A matéria completa pode ser vista na página de notícias em nosso site, intitulada Professora da Idioma Independente é Interprete de uma Pesquisadora de Oxford.
  
A metodologia é classificada como autodidatismo estruturado. As primeiras aulas são expositivas e apresentam as técnicas e ferramentas utilizadas pelos autodidatas para aprenderem. Em seguida é feito um plano de estudo personalizado baseado nas necessidades identificadas, que foca em alcançar os objetivos principais do aluno. O professor, então, acompanha e avalia semanalmente o desenvolvimento do estudante.
 
Vários alunos têm testemunhado que em poucas semanas o progresso deles foi superior à vários meses nos moldes antigos.
 
Deixe-nos uma mensagem e agende uma aula gratuita.

Name: International Open University
Description:
The International Open University (IOU), previously known as the Islamic Online University, was founded by Dr. Abu Ameenah Bilal Philips. He envisioned an institution that would offer online intensive, undergraduate, and graduate courses in Islamic Studies and other disciplines at an affordable cost.

The IOU was initially launched in 2001 from UAE with an offering of a few short courses. After a five year interlude, it was restarted in 2007 from Qatar with a greater offering of completely free short courses.

Alhamdulillah, although we began with 1,500 students in 2007, by the end of 2008, the number of registered students tripled, reaching 4,500. And now, as 2009 has ended, Allah has blessed the IOU with a student body of over 15,000 students from over 160 different countries.

The IOU is now launching the world’s first tuition-free, online Bachelor of Arts in Islamic Studies. This path-breaking initiative plans to utilize the worldwide presence of the Internet and advanced open source online learning technology to bring low-cost, university level Islamic education within reach of anyone on the planet who has access to a computer and the Internet .

Name: Cerebry
Description:
At Cerebry, our aim is to make effective personalised tuition accessible to each and everyone, regardless of geography or family income. This was only possible with a complete rethink of traditional mechanisms of education delivery. 1-to-1 tuition is rare and expensive. Even when available, it's effectiveness depends on the experience and teaching skills of the tutor. It is impossible for human teachers or question banks to cater to the different learning needs of each and every student.

For a student, Cerebry's artificial intelligence (AI) technology feels just like a personal tutor. The AI tutor generates a unique question for the user to solve which is not repeated for any other student and which is based on the student's specific level of understanding. The AI tutor is also able to provide hints and step-by-step solutions for each generated question. Based on the student's answer, the AI is able to modify the difficulty of the next question, ask a question which involves multiple topics to challenge the student in a new setting, break down the question into it's constituent steps, etc.. Since the questions are created by the AI, the AI can detect if a student need a refresher on a concept based on his answers and present explanatory videos. The student might start practicing one topic, but if he struggles to solve problems because of a lack of understanding in another topic, the AI will take the student there.

The Cerebry team consists of PhDs, data scientists, software engineers and dedicated educators working together to make the dream of actual adaptive learning not tied to a finite question bank possible. Education is important and teaching resources are finite; but with the help of artificial intelligence, we can male a personal tutor available to every student.

When we succeed and every student gets access to the best tuition anytime anywhere in whatever their subject of interest is, humanity progresses that much faster.

Talk to us!
shubham@cerebry.co

Description:
Established in 2004, College of Management and IT (CMIT) is the leading provider of certified / accredited elearning and distance learning education in Ireland. Our aim is to provide the opportunity for people to gain a recognised qualification in the most convenient and flexible way possible, while providing clear value for money.

CMIT is committed to the highest standards of Quality Assurance and has put in place comprehensive processes and procedures in place to ensure high standards of service are provided to learners. Our Student Charter also outlines our commitment to quality. Our Core Values are: 

One-to-One Support: the provision of one-to-one support to learners by qualified and experienced Tutors.

External Monitoring: our quality systems are externally certified and audited. 

Customer Service: providing best-in-class customer service.

Innovation: embracing new technologies (e.g. internet, video, online quizzes, messaging and online tutoring) to make education more accessible.

Accessibility: encouraging and facilitating access by those in society normally excluded from further education.

Name: Khan Academy TR
Description:
59 dilde 180 milyon kayıtlı öğrenciye sunduğu ücretsiz eğitim ile dünyanın en büyük online öğrenme platformu olan Khan Academy; yeni teknolojilerle eğitimi desteklemeyi, fırsat eşitliğine katkıda bulunmayı hedefleyen ve kar amacı gütmeyen bir kuruluştur.
   
Khan Academy’nin amacı; herkese, her yerde, dünya standartlarında bir öğrenim deneyimini ücretsiz olarak sunmaktır. Eğitim videoları, interaktif alıştırmalar, öğrenciler için seviye tespit ve yönlendirme; öğretmenler ve veliler için raporlama özellikleri ile kişiselleştirilmiş bir öğrenim deneyimi sunan Khan Academy’nin kullanımı herkes için tamamen ücretsizdir. 190 ülkede öğrencilerin faydalandığı platform, aynı zamanda 10 milyondan fazla öğretmen tarafından sınıflarda yenilikçi bir eğitim aracı olarak kullanılmaktadır. Matematik, fen bilimleri, sosyal bilimler, sanat, iktisadi bilimler, tıp ve uzay bilimleri gibi konularda ilkokuldan lisansüstü seviyeye kadar uzanan geniş bir yelpaze sunan Khan Academy, sadece örgün eğitime destek vermekle kalmayıp, dünyaca meşhur müzelerin yanı sıra NASA, Pixar ve birçok kuruluş ile yaptığı işbirlikleriyle kütüphanesini genişletmeye devam etmektedir.

Khan Academy, 2012 yılından itibaren STFA Grubu’nun desteği ile STFA Eğitim Vakfı çatısı altında Türkçeleştirilmektedir. Kurumsal sosyal sorumluluk ve gönüllülük kavramlarını eğitim ile bir araya getiren Khan Academy Türkçe, tam zamanlı profesyonel bir ekibinin yanı sıra 1000’den fazla gönüllüsü ile sivil toplumda hızla büyüyen bir sosyal girişimdir. Ders videoları bilgiye ulaşmak isteyen her bireyin kullanımına açık olduğu gibi, Milli Eğitim Bakanlığı ile yapılan işbirliği kapsamında Türkiye’deki tüm okullara ulaşmaktadır. 

Khan Academy’nin ilk uluslararası girişimi olan Khan Academy Türkçe, teknoloji destekli fakat insan odaklı eğitim anlayışıyla fırsat eşitliğine katkı ve Türkiye’nin teknoloji ile barışık genç nüfusuna nitelikli bir öğrenme kaynağı sunmayı amaçlamaktadır.

Créer le réflexe “cours en ligne” en devenant le Netflix des l’e-learning :  des cours de haute qualité sur tous les domaines et un produit et une expérience dynamique.

Une maîtrise complète de notre produit, de la technique au contenu en passant par le design, le produit, le marketing ou le commerce. Tous nos cours sont sélectionnés par notre équipe en interne pour garantir un très haut niveau de qualité et une expérience optimale. 

Notre marché :

Le marché des particuliers (B2C) et le marché professionnel (B2B) avec les CSE, les Entreprise, les Écoles et les Médiathèques.

Nos valeurs : 

Bienveillance, pédagogie, amour de l’apprentissage et solidarité sont quelques-unes de nos valeurs. Nous reversons par exemple 1% de notre CA à la fondation EPIC  : 
Pour accompagner les jeunes élèves en grande difficulté en France avec de nouvelles méthodes d’apprentissage via le numérique avec l’association Agir pour l’école

Name: Conscience Information Technologies
Description:
Conscience is a world-class education technology, learning experience, and talent and capability development partner. We offer professional services in all areas of academic eLearning, workforce training, Learning and Development(L&D), learning technology, learning management systems, and custom IT offerings. Our key markets include the US, Canada, Europe, Middle East, Australia, and Asia. 

Education & Training
We help our K-12 and Higher Education clients commission bespoke eLearning and technology-enabled solutions for online, classroom, hybrid, and blended learning delivery across disciplines.

For our Workforce training and L&D clients, we help design and develop engaging, innovative, and effective training programs that span across departments and functions. These solutions target employees, customers, and channel partners in all delivery formats, including face-to-face classroom materials, self-paced eLearning, synchronous online learning, software simulations, blended learning, gamification, performance support systems, and collaborative learning experiences. 

Our training solutions include Safety and Compliance, Process/Procedures, Product, Service, Technical, Marketing and Sales, Leadership, New hire apprentice/Induction/Onboarding, HR, Accounting, Operations, Diversity and Inclusion, and IT amongst others.

Software Development
Our software development unit is a Centre of Excellence [CoE] for Microsoft .Net and SharePoint, WordPress & Moodle, and Front-end technologies. It structures around a three-pronged research & development group, professional development, and training group, and a governance team that uses the PMO, Quality Assurance, and DevOps to manage performance and outcomes for our global clients. 

The CoE aims is to improve expertise in their respective technologies and grow a sustainable internal talent pool to deliver high-end software solutions.

Name: SkillAnything
Description:
SkillAnything is a skill building, knowledge sharing and learning platform, that intends to improve lives of working professionals, students and trainers across globe all at the same time.

SkillAnything.com is transforming the way people acquire and share skills. Whether you are looking to develop your expertise in a specific field or share your knowledge with others, SkillAnything.com offers an inclusive and dynamic environment on its platform to connect learners and instructors from around the globe.

At SkillAnything.com, the possibilities are limitless. The platform hosts an extensive array of skills, spanning various categories such as technology, arts and crafts, languages, sports, music, cooking, and much more. With its user-friendly interface and intuitive navigation, anyone can easily explore the vast range of skills available and find the perfect learning opportunity tailored to their interests and needs.

One of the key features that sets SkillAnything.com apart is its diverse community of passionate instructors and eager learners. Expert professionals, enthusiasts, and individuals with a passion for teaching come together to share their knowledge and skills in an engaging and interactive manner. Through live virtual classes, pre-recorded tutorials, one-on-one sessions, or group workshops, learners can immerse themselves in an enriching educational experience guided by experienced instructors who are dedicated to helping them achieve their goals.

SkillAnything.com also offers a flexible and convenient learning experience. With the flexibility of scheduling, learners can choose the time and duration of their classes to fit their busy lifestyles. Whether you prefer to learn in the evenings, weekends, or during your lunch break, SkillAnything.com ensures that you can access quality instruction at your convenience. Additionally, the platform provides a secure and seamless payment system, making it easy to book and pay for classes without any hassle.

Dus voor iedereen toegankelijk. Wij gebruiken een handige online leeromgeving om onze cursisten te voorzien van Wft-, PE- en PA-modules. Wil je een examentraining volgen, onze praktijkgerichte en ervaren trainers nemen je mee in de belangrijkste onderwerpen en krijg je tips en trucs mee die belangrijk zijn voor het Wft examen.

Druk in de voorbereiding op jouw Wft examen en kan je nog wat extra ondersteuning gebruiken? Met onze proefexamens krijg je extra handvatten om goed voorbereid op te gaan voor het examen. Onze oefenexamens zijn zo opgezet dat ze gelijk zijn aan de huidige richtlijnen van het CDFD.

Jouw studie sluit je af met een Wft examen. En ook daar helpt Consis je graag bij. Op locaties door heel Nederland kan je een Wft examen inplannen. Er is altijd een examenlocatie bij jou in de buurt.

Kortom: ben jij actief in de financiële wereld en is een Wft-diploma/PE-certificaat een vereiste? Dan ben je bij Consis op de goede plek.

Professores Nativos e Bilíngues: Contamos com uma equipe experiente, proveniente de países como Inglaterra, Estados Unidos e África do Sul, trazendo diversidade de sotaques e culturas para a sala de aula.

Flexibilidade: Oferecemos horários ajustados à rotina de profissionais ocupados, com opções de aulas online ou presenciais, garantindo conveniência sem comprometer a qualidade.

Foco em Resultados Reais: Nossos cursos são desenhados para serem imediatamente aplicáveis no ambiente de trabalho, promovendo um aprendizado que impulsiona o desenvolvimento profissional contínuo.

Name: Learning Equality
Description:
Learning Equality is committed to enabling every person in the world to realize their right to a quality education. We support the creation, adaptation and distribution of open educational resources, and create supportive tools for innovative pedagogy for low-resource and offline contexts, taking advantage of existing infrastructure or low-cost and low-power hardware solutions. 

Our current product, Kolibri, is an open-source educational platform designed to provide offline access to a curated and openly licensed content library with pedagogical support tools for use in low-resource and low-connectivity contexts. Kolibri builds on lessons and feedback from its predecessor platform, KA Lite, which brought Khan Academy content offline and has reached more than 5 million people globally in 200 countries and territories, in contexts as varied as formal schools in India, orphanages in Cameroon, prisons across the United States, refugee camps in Kenya, and First Nations community centers in northern Canada. 

The Kolibri ecosystem encompasses a set of interacting products, and has an architecture designed to easily integrate a wide variety of digital innovations and make them accessible to audiences they may not ordinarily reach. Our current products are: (1) the offline, lightweight Kolibri application; (2) the web-based Kolibri Studio curriculum management tool; and (3) Kolibri Toolkit, a customizable set of pedagogical and technical guidance resources to support a do-it-yourself implementation model for incorporating Kolibri into effective learning environments.

The QS World University Rankings 2026 have placed the University within the top 50 in the world. This places us 6th in the UK and the highest position of any Scottish university.

We have been delivering postgraduate degrees online since 2005, enabling more than 10,000 students to grow their critical knowledge and forward their career prospects without interrupting their work and home agenda. The professional world is changing faster than ever, and in order to keep up and stay agile continuous learning is a must. RMMBR helps companies to get the best out of digital learning in the process of training and developing human capital.

We design, create and deliver smart and sustainable learning solutions that enhance your organization’s performance. Solutions with impact, that make a difference. Learning solutions that actually work. Custom or built with existing tooling. On any device, on any screen, and in any language. That’s what we deliver.

We work in multi-disciplinary, experienced and dedicated teams to achieve the right results for our clients. We believe in co-creation and that the best results come from working together with our clients and subject matter experts.

We have numerous examples of successful cases ranging from onboarding, compliance, product training and performance support to social learning, soft-skills and change. Curious? We like to show (-off ) our projects so don’t hesitate to get in touch.
 
We love projects with a bite, clients with guts and being adventurous!

And RMMBR… to learn.

Name: Edapt
Description:
Edapt - Empowering Future Innovators Through Technology Education

 Who We Are:
At Edapt, we're not just an EdTech company; we're architects of the future. Founded by the visionary entrepreneur, Umer Abdussalam, Edapt is at the forefront of revolutionizing technology education. Our mission is to empower students of all ages with the skills they need to thrive in the Fourth Industrial Revolution.

 Our Global Reach:
With a presence in over 20 countries and a user base of over 400,000 on our learning app, we're breaking barriers and building bridges in tech education worldwide. Our flagship 'Hello AI' program and other innovative offerings like the Technology Leadership Program (TLP) and Zoomin platform are reshaping how technology is taught and learned.

 Our Innovation:
Our holistic approach to education, which integrates AI labs, comprehensive textbooks, and interactive online platforms, sets us apart. We're committed to providing not just knowledge, but also the tools and environment necessary for fostering innovation and leadership.

 Our Approach:
We believe in collaboration and empowerment. By partnering with schools, educational institutions, and industry leaders, we create ecosystems that nurture and accelerate learning. Our B2B model for the Hello AI program and targeted B2C strategies for TLP and Zoomin exemplify our adaptive and inclusive approach.

 Our Impact:
Edapt is more than just a company; it's a movement. With a 300% year-over-year revenue growth and expanding international footprint, we're not only demonstrating financial success but also creating a significant impact in the educational landscape.

 Join Us:
We are on a quest to build a world where education and technology converge to create limitless opportunities. If you are passionate about making a difference in the world of education, Edapt is your platform to shine. Connect with us to learn, grow, and lead the change in tech education.

Name: Lumen Learning
Description:
Lumen Learning’s mission is to enable unprecedented learning for all students.

We do this by providing tools and services to support effective teaching and learning practices. We are trying to build more effective learners and more impactful teachers – because both are essential to improve student success.

Lumen Courseware: 
Lumen’s affordable course materials are designed to strengthen learning using open educational resources (OER). They provide high quality, interactive learning content, online homework, and personalized feedback to help them study and learn more effectively, with plenty of opportunities to engage students in active learning. We apply learning science principles and analyze learning data to identify where students struggle and make targeted improvements that strengthen learning. 

Lumen Circles Professional Development Programs: Effective learning means supporting not only students, but also faculty to be their best. With Lumen Circles, we offer professional development experiences that use virtual communities of practice to connect faculty members with peers and help them hone their expertise as student-centered teachers. Grounded in evidence-based teaching practices and self-reflection, Lumen Circles work well for any faculty member, in any discipline, and at any stage of career – regardless of whether they use Lumen courseware.

Description:
We are a #GIS and #EarthObservation (GEO) group of professionals and experts in the corresponding fields. We are dedicated to create and deliver our knowledge to students, professionals, decision makers and scientists who want to introduce or enhance their knowledge in these fields.
Our team of professionals and experts will guide you through the following topics:

1. Geographical Information System (GIS)
2. WebGIS
3. Remote Sensing/Earth Observation
4. Photogrammetry

Our courses vary from simple note collections, books (for people who have constrained time to study) to complete lectures with exercises, quizzes (for people who are willing to dive into and extract the maximum value from the course). 
Our courses are not only basic the theoretical principles of each field, but we also create tutorial courses for specific open-source and commercial software. We constantly add and update courses so you get the best of experience!
Feel free to look around our courses and sign up, its also free!

Name: Academia Comunica de Mai Pistiner
Description:
¿Hay algo más importante que saber comunicar lo que creemos?

No importa cuál sea tu sueño, todos deseamos transformar nuestras ideas en palabras que quieran ser escuchadas. Por eso me apasiona tanto la comunicación y por eso quiero ayudarte a que vos también lo logres.

Soy licenciada en Comunicación Social y estudié en el Conservatorio de Artes Dramáticas Stella Adler, LA, Estados Unidos, con las siguientes bases: 

- Movimiento corporal y expresión no verbal con Kennedy Brown bajo la técnica de "Lucid Body". 
- Entrenamiento de la voz con la técnica de Kirstin Linklater.
- Comunicación corporal con la técnica de Alexander Technique. 
- Comunicación no violenta con la técnica de Marshall Rosenberg.
- El uso del discurso con la técnica de Edith Skinner.

Trabajo en medios digitales y tradicionales desde el 2014. Mi primer proyecto fue Denominador Común, un ciclo de entrevistas emitido en el Canal de la Ciudad, con el que gané el premio FUND TV a mejor programa juvenil. Conducción, idea original y producción bajo mi cargo. Durante 5 años trabajé en GRUPO AMÉRICA (América TV, Radio La Red, A24) como comunicadora y columnista en redes sociales y programas de TV.  

Desde 2016 comunico en mis redes con marcas que se identifican con mis valores y propósitos. Algunos de mis principales aliados: Mercado Libre, Booking.com, Phillips, Maybelline, Swiss Medical Seguros, entre otros.

Brindo consultorías y cursos de comunicación digital y efectiva desde 2017.

En la academia ya son más de 20.000 personas que confiaron en mí y en mi equipo. Queremos que vos te sumes también! Te esperamos.

Name: Sibme
Description:
Sibme improves the way professionals learn at work. We help teams build cultures of continuous improvement.
 
Sibme’s AI-Enhanced Professional Learning and Coaching Platform powers self-reflection, virtual-and hybrid-coaching, peer-to-peer collaboration, cohort-based professional learning communities, and micro-credentials. Sibme works with more than 1,000 innovative schools, districts, and institutions–including  Scholastic, the University of Texas, Gwinnett County Public Schools, and Cypress-Fairbanks ISD
 
Sibme is designed by teachers. From K-12 and higher education to corporate learning & development, educators trust us to encourage critical conversations about real work, using real tools, with real people -- from anywhere at any time.
 
Sibme’s Learning Engagement Platform embeds practice and collaboration in every workday, engaging employees while building a stronger community of learners. Sibme encourages teams to more frequently and authentically discuss the work, the challenges and, ultimately, the opportunities to maximize capacity through real-world experience.

Here's what some of our partners have to say:
 
------------------------------------------------------
 
"In my 15 years as an administrator, nothing has been more impactful for improving classroom instruction than video coaching. Sibme improves what happens in the classroom by providing teachers the opportunity to see classroom practices through the same lens as the instructional coach. The results of this process benefit the academic performance of all students"
 
___ Dr. Tonya Goree | Assistant Superintendent for School Improvement and Transformation @ Cypress Fairbanks ISD
 
 
"Sibme is a wonderful platform for our Educational Service District to use, for coaching elementary teachers on early literacy practices! The Sibme software makes virtual coaching organized and efficient. This is a GREAT way to collaborate asynchronously!" - Kimberly Blumke  | Early Literacy Coach

Name: PiXimperfect
Description:
PiXimperfect, hosted by Unmesh Dinda, is a free resource for learning Photoshop. We believe in learning the concept, rather than learning the steps so that you can translate "your" imagination visually to the world. This will make you a better decision-maker, rather than letting others make decisions for you. Since every situation is different and the definition of beauty is subjective, it is essential that you master the approach, and then the steps will automatically follow.

Our motto is to "Keep Creating." We always say to our students: "Don't worry so much about the quality, because time will improve it. Don't spend so much time getting things pixel-perfect, so that you end up not finishing it. Just 'Keep Creating,' and your consistency will take care of the rest."

Description:
Long-term. Two words that define TCY.
Pick up our business model, any function, any product, or, for that matter, anything that happens at TCY; chances are you’d find long-term thinking behind it.
The reason is simple. We choose and nurture people for the long term. Rarely for their degrees or pedigree, etc.; rather for what they have done in the past and what their purpose in life is.
Lotka’s Law is always at work. Big fans of our top 15–20% superheroes (hims and hers).
A glimpse:
We serve over 750,000 students annually; free and premium combined.
In B2C, our marketing spend = almost zero.
In B2B, we serve 2,000+ coaching centres with feet on the street = zero.
190 exam categories. Content: user-generated.
Platform approach to business. After all, over 30,000,000 test takers annually and around 200,000 coaching centres in India. Our model has the potential to cover all.
Different fancy terms like non-linear, Edtech, SaaS, B2B2C, software platform, etc., etc., whereas we make sure it always passes one simple test: Bill Gurley’s checklist for Marketplaces. Period.
The jargon-filled version is: recursive algorithms using deep learning and AI to help coaching centres adopt an optimised and personalised learning trajectory for each student towards their exam success! Simply put,
For students:
    -where you stand
    -what next you should do to succeed

For coaching centres:
Scaffolding coaching centres while taking care of their academic, operations, and financial worries.

We hate losing money and never have. Well, almost. Data is our currency, and the intuition of our experts is always our next big opportunity. It has been working great so far.

The journey is on with an unwavering mission: ‘To help people become what they were born to be.’ If you find it compelling, maybe we have a future customer, partner, colleague, or investor in you. Stay tuned.

Cheers!

Dalle tech skills alle soft skills per leader e recruiter, proponiamo sia workshop pronti (es. accessibilità, AI, sicurezza, React, Python) sia percorsi personalizzati costruiti su misura con i nostri mentor.

Il nostro obiettivo: aiutare le aziende a formare e trattenere i migliori talenti, creando valore che dura nel tempo.

 La nostra forza

Siamo founder, imprenditori, freelance, remote workers e professionisti con background diversi. La community è il cuore: qui trovi risposte, supporto e nuove connessioni, ma puoi anche dare il tuo contributo facendo crescere gli altri.

Name: Snapask
Description:
Story

Founded in 2015, Snapask is an education technology company that applies machine learning and mobile cloud services to make education more effective, personalised, and accessible to everyone.
 
Snapask launched its flagship mobile application featuring its  “Question & Answer” (Q&A) service. It connects students in need with qualified tutors within seconds. The release of "Learning Planner" feature in 2018 takes Snapask 1 step closer towards providing personalised learning support to students. This feature supports personalised content recommendation based on students' revision habits and learning progress. 

Snapask is currently supporting 4.5 million students across 9 regions in APAC in their after school studies. Striving to be the biggest and best online learning platform available to students.

 Mission

Learning on Snapask is a student-driven experience, designed around personalization, motivation and prediction. Using Snapask, students are encouraged to take initiative in their own learning. By revealing their learning progress, coursework and teaching approaches can be adapted to match student learning goals and aspiration. Leveraging insights and behaviours generated from student usage across the platform, Snapask creates self-directed learning experiences that feature personal learning support, motivated learning habits, and predicted learning achievement.

 Product

Snapask Q&A: When students need help with homework or revision, they snap a photo of their question on Snapask. Based on every student's unique needs, Snapask connects them with qualified tutors within 15 seconds. Together with the student, the tutor will tackle the question step by step.

Learning Planner: Snapask recommends revision quizzes to students based on their learning habits and needs. We analyze every student's learning progress on our platform to uncover their strengths and weaknesses, helping them master their subject material.

Name: I Will Teach You To Be Rich
Description:
I Will Teach You To Be Rich is an online education platform that hosts over 1 million readers/month on business, careers, negotiation, psychology, and money. We help you find your dream job, earn more, and start living your Rich Life.

Since its inception, IWT has become one of the leaders in online education and self development. We've been featured in The New York Times, ABC News, CNBC, The Wall Street Journal, NPR, and The Tim Ferriss Show.

Ramit Sethi founded IWT in 2004 while studying technology and psychology at Stanford. As a first-generation American from a middle-class Indian immigrant family, the only way he could afford college was to pay his own way.

That’s when he built a system to apply to 60+ scholarships. His hard work paid off—he earned enough to attend undergrad and grad school at Stanford. 

But when he got his first scholarship check, he invested it in the stock market…and immediately lost half his money. That’s when he decided to learn how money really worked. 

Ramit realized most money advice was irrelevant:
 Most money advice is about restriction. 
 Money is too confusing. Where do you start and who do you trust?
 Nobody was talking about money psychology.

Ramit built IWT to teach readers and students:
 Ask $30,000 questions, not $3 questions. Buy all the lattes you want.
 There’s a limit to how much you can cut, but not to how much you can earn.
 Your Rich Life is yours. IWT considers it a tragedy to live a smaller life than you have to.

HOW CAN IWT HELP YOU?
At IWT, we have a worldwide community of people who want to create their Rich Lives, their way. Here you’ll find:

 Our best free advice on money, starting a business, careers, and living your Rich Life
 The proven program over 30,000 people have used to start a successful business
 Your personalized Rich Life system
 The path to your dream career

Start living the life you’ve always wanted to.

Name: Ottho
Description:
Et si vous pouvez créer tout et n’importe quoi sans savoir coder ?
Nous croyons qu'il n'y a plus besoin de développeur pour lancer sa startup, créer son produit et avoir ses premiers clients. Que personne ne devrait avoir à payer des sommes exorbitantes pour développer sa solution en prenant le risque que ça ne marche pas. Nous pensons que les outils et l'automatisation peuvent sauver des milliers de gens de la faillite en leur évitant de dépenser inutilement sans pour autant brider leur créativité.
Qu’est-ce que le No-Code ?
« À mesure que créer sur internet devient plus accessible, de plus en plus de gens deviennent des créateurs. Ce n’est plus limité aux moins d’1% d’ingénieurs capables de coder, ce qui entraîne une explosion d’idées émanant de toutes sortes de personnes… » Ryan Hoover, fondateur de Product Hunt à propos du no-code.
Le no-code est avant tout une philosophie, une volonté de pouvoir créer tout et n’importe quoi, sans se limiter au code. 
Pourquoi vous devez utiliser le no-code
Avec toute la vague Startup Nation, de nombreux entrepreneurs ont du faire un choix : se concentrer sur leur client ou se concentrer sur leur produit, et donc l’aspect technique.
Avec un taux d’échec dépassant les 90%, les coûts engendrés par le développement et donc le salariat d’un développeur a soulevé de nombreuses problématiques… Quelle technologie, quelles compétences et à quel prix ? De plus, la raréfaction des développeurs compétents sur telle ou telle technologie a amené à l’augmentation des coûts. Tout ça pourrait se résumer à une seule question : Jusqu’à combien seriez vous prêt à investir pour le développement d’un produit potentiellement non viable pour le marché ?
Et Ottho dans tout ça ?
Se lancer sans code est très simple, il suffit juste de savoir par où commencer : Quels outils, quelles plateformes, pour quoi faire ?
C’est pour ça que nous avons créé une plateforme pour centraliser les meilleurs outils mais aussi les tutos de ses outils.

Zaya (www.Zaya.org) is an education technology consulting firm focused on developing innovative solutions for the most challenging problems in learning and education.

After five years of developing cutting-edge educational products, we have now broadened our focus to improving systems for learners everywhere. We are now working on developing impactful learning solutions to help train teachers and improve the efficiency of school operating systems. 

Our products have imparted over 2 million hours of learning to low-income schools with over 6000 teachers being trained and coached on using technology in the classroom. We’ve received funding from the Microsoft Affordable Access Initiative, DBS Bank, Pearson, Marico and others and worked with the Hans Foundation and other leading NGOs to implement projects.

Name: Emotika
Description:
We are a startup founded in Lithuania in 2020. We have developed an original platform and soft skills training system EMOTIKA.
At the beginning of 2020, during the first stage of an investment attraction, we received 100,000 euros from a US investor, and in June of the same year, we launched the first version of the EMOTIKA e-coach. Then, in September, having received the first orders and customers, announced the official launch of the app.

WHAT WE DO
We work with individuals and companies; we provide individual consultations, group training, constantly update and adapt video, audio, and e-learning content.

Our flagship product is EMOTIKA’S e-coach, a mobile app, with which we are ready to change the whole distance learning paradigm, currently in Lithuania and soon in foreign markets. EMOTIKA app serves as the best Lithuanian business coaches’ content carrier, a platform for the business community, and a tool for research on organizational climate and performance (360 ° research).

WHY EMOTIKA?
We have no doubt that inevitable changes await the teaching paradigm and we are not only ready to be part of those changes, but also to initiate them. We believe in lifelong learning and know what determines the effectiveness of learning.
EMOTIKA is developed by a team of highly motivated emotional competence training professionals, technology development, implementation, and sales experts.

Description:

Skillcrush offers both free and paid programs. The flagship Break Into Tech + Job Guarantee program, available for a one-time fee of only $2,499 or 12 monthly installments of $249, is one of the most affordable comprehensive job-training programs in the market. The Break Into Tech program prepares students for entry level positions in front end development and design. Once students complete the technical skill building portion, they receive 180 days of hands-on job search support including 1-on-1 and group coaching, and the opportunity to interview with Skillcrush employer partners. 

Skillcrush is an open enrollment school, no application necessary, and to date, has trained over 20,000 students, and has an over 90% success rate of placing students in qualified jobs with an average time to get hired of only 8-10 weeks.

In addition, Skillcrush offers tuition assistance for people who are unemployed, full-time students, and current or former military service members. If any of these describe you, we encourage you to email hello@skillcrush.com to discuss your payment options.

Learn more about our career—and life—changing programs at skillcrush.com.

Name: StatQuest
Description:
Hi! I’m Josh Starmer and welcome to StatQuest! StatQuest started out as an attempt to explain statistics to my former co-workers – who were all genetics researchers at UNC-Chapel Hill. They did amazing experiments, but they didn’t always know what to do with the data they generated. That was my job. But I wanted them to understand that what I did wasn’t magic – it was actually quite simple. It only seemed hard because it was wrapped up in confusing terminology and typically communicated using equations. I found that if I stripped away the terminology and communicated the concepts using pictures, it became easy to understand.

Over time I made more and more StatQuests and now it’s my passion on YouTube.

Name: Imaginie
Description:
A Imaginie oferece soluções tecnológicas criadas especialmente para atender instituições de ensino e estudantes. 

A plataforma e o aplicativo Imaginie são ferramentas estratégicas que fornecem inteligência pedagógica para auxiliar educadores no ensino da escrita e no preparo dos estudantes para a prova de redação do ENEM.

Acreditamos que unidos, podemos criar uma educação melhor. Nosso objetivo é levar inovação de baixo custo às salas de aula, fazendo da tecnologia o elo entre escolas, professores e estudantes. 

--------------------

Imaginie is the innovative crowdsourcing platform that helps students write better essays when preparing for standardized tests such as the SAT, ACT, GRE, GMAT, TOEFL, ENEM. Our network of top instructors provides fast, personalized feedback to develop student writing skills. Our goal is to accelerate learning and bridge the essay writing gap that so many students struggle with when taking standardized tests.

WHY WORK WITH US? 
Essay by essay, we are changing education in Brazil and America. We imagine a world where no student is left behind, where we can tackle inefficient education by using technology as a tool to support teachers. In the end, we believe that technology will bring people together, instead of separating them. We see the future with teachers united for better education. AND IT STARTS WITH YOU!

Name: Senac EAD
Description:
Flexibilidade de tempo, espaço e dinheiro tornou a educação a distância uma opção viável e eficiente para quem pensa em investir no aprimoramento acadêmico e profissional. 

Comprometido em proporcionar a melhor experiência aos alunos, o Senac vai além das características comuns do setor, oferecendo o melhor ensino a distância do país. Entre seus diferenciais, está a ampla oferta em diversos níveis de ensino e áreas de conhecimento. São mais de 380 opções em cursos livres, técnicos, graduações, pós-graduações e extensões universitárias, fazendo com que você possa construir uma trajetória de formação e sucesso.

Para atividades presenciais obrigatórias, a instituição conta com mais de 370 polos credenciados, distribuídos em todos os Estados do país. Já no ambiente digital, a WebTV Senac enriquece a experiência, aproximando o relacionamento entre aluno e docente com aulas em vídeo.

Instrutores com experiência de mercado também garantem referências atualizadas e atividades práticas, deixando você preparado para enfrentar os desafios em sua área de atuação. Tudo isso aliado ao reconhecimento e credibilidade do Senac, que já na década de 1940 promovia o ensino a distância por meio de seus cursos na Universidade do Ar, uma ação pioneira que na época levou conhecimento profissional a locais distantes por meio de programas de rádio.

Conheça o portfólio completo de cursos oferecidos pelo Senac EAD, acesse: http://ead.senac.br

Name: Third Space Learning
Description:
With Skye, the AI tutor, we're making one-to-one maths support more accessible for schools.

The maths attainment gap is growing; one-to-one tutoring is one of the best-evidenced interventions to help close this gap, but for any more than a handful of students, it can be expensive and time-consuming.

That's why teachers at Third Space Learning have created Skye, the new AI maths tutor.

We’ve provided online one-to-one maths tutoring to over 4000 primary and secondary schools in the UK and US since 2013, and we've now used all the data and learning insights gained to develop this AI tutor. By talking students through a teacher-created curriculum maths lesson, the AI maths tutor's teaching techniques replicate the experience of a pedagogically trained maths specialist.

And most importantly for schools, with the end of the National Tutoring Programme, we knew that we needed to make this AI maths tutoring extremely cost-effective and flexible. It has been built for school budgets and timetables with flexibility, whatever your needs.

Try out the AI tutor for yourself - just email hello@thirdspacelearning.com or get in touch on the website.  You'll also be able to join over 100,000 school leaders and teachers already using our free evidenced informed maths teaching and leadership resources.

UK: thirdspacelearning.com
US: thirdspacelearning.com/us/

Name: Hibernia College
Description:
Hibernia College is a blended learning third-level college dedicated to providing access to flexible, high-quality graduate, postgraduate and professional programmes using cutting-edge technology. The School of Education oversees the initial teacher education and continuing professional development course offerings. The College has just recently launched an innovate Bachelor of Education (Honours) Degree in Early Childhood Education and a BSc (Hons) in Nursing in General Nursing.

Between the Professional Master of Education in Primary Education and the Professional Master of Education in Post-Primary Education, the College has educated over 10,000 teachers across Ireland. Alumni have assumed  leadership positions in education both nationally and internationally.
Additionally, the School of Education delivers a range of continuing professional development courses to thousands of professional educators.

Hibernia College’s initial teacher education programmes prepare, develop and support reflective and critical educators who are academically strong, pedagogically skilled and technologically empowered. Students engage in interactive online tutorials and content, tutor-moderated discussion
forums, webinars and presentations. The curriculum consists  of a sequence of modules that address contemporary issues faced by teachers and the skills and knowledge required to respond to the needs of all students in a diverse global society.

Hibernia College has engaged extensively with educators and
practitioners in the Early Learning and Care sector (ELC), and in
responding to their professional development needs, has created the
Bachelor of Education (Honours) Degree Programme.

A philosophy of care is exemplified across our interactions with our
future students, we lead by example. 

Hibernia College continues to respond to the challenges of the 21st century with its strong foundation in research and innovation.

Name: Digiskills
Description:
Pomáháme lidem vybudovat nové digitální kompetence, usnadnit práci s technologiemi a zvyšovat tak pracovní i osobní produktivitu. 

Věříme, že každého může jeho práce bavit. Víme, co lidi brzdí od skutečné podstaty jejich práce: rutinní činnosti, operativa náročná na čas, neefektivní způsoby komunikace a zastaralé pracovní návyky a postupy.

Naším záměrem je motivovat ke zkoušení nových věcí a zavádění inovací. Citlivě boříme všechny předsudky a obavy z používání počítačů a chytrých telefonů. Ukazujeme, že technologie a inovace nespočívají jen v sofistikovaných vynálezech, ale že umí usnadnit každodenní život každého z nás. 

Vysvětlujeme technologie lidskou řečí. Nejsme „ajťáci“, ale uživatelé, kteří chtějí z aplikací a nástrojů vytěžit maximum. Zároveň dobře víme, že technologie jsou dobrý sluha, ale špatný pán. Proto je používáme pouze tam, kde jsou opravdu potřeba. A to naučíme i vás.

Name: Burlington English Inc.
Description:
BurlingtonEnglish offers a comprehensive blended program for English language acquisition. It can be used as a core curriculum or as a digital component that complements classroom instruction. BurlingtonEnglish provides student and teacher resources for all skills – reading, writing, listening, and speaking. The speaking element utilizes the proprietary state-of-the-art speech recognition technology – the Burlington SpeechTrainer. The SpeechTrainer prescribes unique pronunciation courses which individually address each user’s needs, depending on their native language and speech patterns.

BurlingtonEnglish has an extensive offering of General English courses together with a wide range of Career Extensions. Each course combines online modules which can be used anytime and anywhere, with downloadable print materials designed for face-to-face instruction. The online modules and face-to-face materials are carefully blended, providing both teachers and students with a complete language-learning solution. This results-driven program, with 24/7 online access, is engaging for students and easy for teachers to use.

BurlingtonEnglish Highlights
Instruction takes place in the classroom using projected digital materials and printed materials. Following the 
face-to-face lesson, the teacher assigns independent online practice that complements the classroom instruction.

Teachers can easily assign courses and materials to individual classes and students, control their pace and closely monitor their progress through a portal called the Teacher’s Zone.

Unique speech recognition technology identifies each individual student’s pronunciation and if necessary, provides targeted practice aimed at accent reduction.

Name: GD&T Basics - Engineer Essentials LLC
Description:
At GD&T Basics (Engineer Essentials LLC) we aim to change the status quo of technical education. For far too long, there has been a large disconnect between what technical employees are taught and what they actually will apply on the job. We aim to close this gap by focusing on the essential skills that employees need in order to perform the actual work in their careers. 

Our team consists of engineers and machinists who have learned how to be successful through years of experience. We realize there are only a few skills that differentiate a successful professional from an entry-level associate who is struggling to get by. It is our goal to emphasize these skills to help our students reach their highest potential in their careers. 

The Pareto Principle states that we apply 20% of our knowledge 80% of the time in our work. We focus on this principle to make sure that the concepts we teach are the ones you will need to apply most often. We don't waste your time with concepts you'll never use just to sound impressive. We'll help you gain the real skills that will get you hired, promoted, and ensure that you excel in your dream engineering position.

Name: RareJob Philippines, Inc.
Description:
RareJob is one of the biggest online English tutorial companies both in Japan and the Philippines, and we are continuously growing. In 2014, it was listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Mothers (market of the high-growth and emerging stocks). 

Since its establishment in October 2007, RareJob has utilized the power of the Internet to connect Japanese English learners to English tutors in the Philippines. 

RareJob primarily caters to Japanese learners. With the largest number of students, it is considered as the top online English school in Japan. For almost eight years, the company has already provided more than 10,000,000 lessons and has helped more than 10,000 Filipino tutors. RareJob aims to provide the best learning experience to its students and the most ideal working environment for its tutors.

Description:

That's exactly what we are building at Kutuki - at our core, a content engine that is producing learning and play content based on Indian life and Indian culture. Our founding team consists of Indian School of Business and London School of Economics alumni, who've also got professional experience in the creative arts and content development.

Description:
The Learning Management System is the novel face of the Education Industry. Nowadays, e-education is the booming sector of the education industry, and with time, it will cover the entire market. Despite such tremendous growth, lack of quality, geographic restrictions, linguistic barriers, less supportive e-learning websites, and hacking problems have been witnessed in the Learning management system. The traditional education system is already suffering from hefty tuition fees, travel costs, time restriction, the continuously limited scope of learning, practical knowledge gap, and lack of assessments.
Edufex curbs LMS and the Traditional education system; hence, it designed the blockchain-based Learning Management System. It delivers a secure platform of e-learning and removes all the restrictions to provide users a trustful, qualitative, geographic, and linguistic barrier-free source of e-learning. The concept of token dispersal to educators on completion of their service for learners highlights Edufex differently within the industry.

Edufex facilitates global knowledge on computer screens in one click, saving time, efforts, travelling costs, and foreign living costs. Access to universally accepted certifications, degree, and educators’ availability for desired courses enhance the e-learning scope at Edufex blockchain-based learning management system. Not only students but also educators have equal opportunities on our platform. Educators can earn Tokens on completion of courses. Earning of these Tokens from the Edufex platform can be converted into cash at the same time or after a gap when the Token conversion rate increases.

- Deliver business skills, digital skills and soft skills from the very first years of law school;

Description:
German Energy Academy in Jordan is an educational institution established under cooperation between governments in Germany and Jordan, focused on capacity building in renewable and energy efficient energy infrastructure in the region.

The Academy aims to train technicians and engineers in planning, installation and operational management skills, as well as general skills such as entrepreneurship, digital skills and languages.

The Academy based in Amman welcomes trainees from Jordan and neighbouring countries, while establishing and operation of the Academy is shared among eight partners: Al-Hussein Technical University (HTU), German Jordanian University (GJU), National Electric Power Company's Electrical Training Center (ETC), Amman Chamber of Industry (ACI), ideas into energy, German Solar Industry Association (BSW-Solar) and Niuversity.

The Academy is part of the Jordanian-German Energy Partnership established in 2019 between the two governments, the operation of the partnership is facilitated by the German International Cooperation (Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit), known as GIZ, through offices in Amman and Berlin on behalf of the German Federal Ministry for Economic Affairs and Climate Action.

Name: ECOP Offshore English Course
Description:
A ECOP surge de uma necessidade de mercado de melhor preparo técnico-profissional na área de Óleo e Gás. Com a denominação oficial de ESP – English for Specific Purposes, o nosso curso ensina a língua inglesa de forma prática e leve, usando exemplos reais do offshore e da indústria em 100% das aulas.

O inglês técnico, que antes era uma habilidade a mais no currículo, hoje, torna-se indispensável com a vinda das multinacionais para o Brasil.
As profissionais que elaboraram e organizaram os cursos oferecidos pela ECOP são altamente capacitadas, com formações e experiências tanto no Brasil como no exterior. Além disso, atuaram no ramo offshore por anos e tornaram-se experts em suas áreas de atuação, conhecendo, de forma profunda, a terminologia técnica do setor de petróleo e gás e industrial.
Todos os colaboradores e convidados que participam das aulas durante os nossos cursos estão também, direta ou indiretamente, ligados à área de petróleo e gás e industrial, fazendo com que todo o conhecimento compartilhado nas aulas seja autêntico; ou seja, aqui na ECOP você vai ver e ouvir especialistas em suas áreas com experiências reais no setor.

Área de aplicação
Nosso curso 100% online se aplica a adultos que trabalham ou que querem inserir-se nos ramos ONSHORE e OFFSHORE, e está disponível a qualquer interessado em aprender como funciona o inglês aplicado à área de atuação. 

Pré-requisitos acadêmicos
Nossos cursos online com certificados são direcionados para várias áreas de atuação profissional, para que os profissionais possam se aperfeiçoar e atualizar seus conhecimentos, bem como para uma constante capacitação na modalidade de cursos profissionalizantes livres online.

Nossos cursos livres são amparados pelas seguintes legislações:
- Lei de Diretrizes e Bases - LDB - Lei 9394/96, Art.40;
- CNE/CNB Nº 06/2012, Art. 25;
- Decreto Presidencial 5154/2004, Artigo 3º e § 2º.

Name: Le Chemin de la Nature
Description:
Notre activité
Le Chemin de la Nature a pour objectif de transmettre la connaissance des plantes sauvages, des champignons et de leurs usages au plus grand nombre. Pour y parvenir, nous organisons de nombreuses initiatives pour les professionnels comme pour les particuliers :

- Pour les Entreprises, collectivités et associations :
Sensibilisez vos collaborateurs aux bienfaits de la nature et soudez vos équipes lors de sorties cueillette et dégustation dans la nature, d’ateliers cuisine sauvage et l’herboristerie, ou de stages sur mesure !

- Pour les Particuliers :
Nous proposons des ateliers et stages hebdomadaires, mais également des formations en ligne, pour acquérir des connaissances solides sur les plantes sauvages et leurs usages et les mettre en pratique en toute sécurité.  Conçue par une équipe de professionnels qualifiés, ces contenus sont ludiques, rigoureux et sourcés. 
Pour les curieux : faites un tour sur nos comptes Youtube (425k abonnés), Facebook (480k) et Instagram (303k) truffés de vidéos de vulgarisation sur les plantes et les champignons ! 

Notre mission
Sensibiliser les citoyens à notre patrimoine végétal commun, en donnant à chacun les outils et les connaissances pour se réapproprier l’environnement qui les entoure et gagner en autonomie. Cette démarche participe pleinement à renforcer notre lien à la nature, à nos ressources, et notre volonté de les protéger.

Notre équipe
LCDN est fondé par Christophe de Hody, herbaliste et botaniste de terrain depuis 2011. Après une formation théorique et pratique approfondie, Christophe a développé de solides connaissances sur les plantes de France et leurs usages. Rapidement, il rassemble autour de lui une équipe unique de professionnels aux compétences complémentaires (pharmaco-chimistes, pharmaciens, botanistes, biologistes, ingénieurs pédagogiques, développeurs) afin de développer de nouveaux contenus de qualité, pédagogiques, multimédias et innovants. 

Bienvenue sur le Chemin de la Nature !

Name: Kritik
Description:
At Kritik, we believe the future of education lies in turning challenges into opportunities. As AI reshapes the classroom, we empower institutions, instructors, and students with transparent, student-centred tools that make learning more engaging, effective, and future-ready.

Our Vision

To make education engaging, effective, and efficient for everyone.

Our Mission

To support instructors and students with transparent, student-centered tools that promote critical thinking, academic integrity, effective assessment, and career-ready skills.

Our Products

	•	Kritik360 – A peer assessment platform that helps students learn by evaluating each other’s work, building critical thinking and collaboration skills while reducing grading workload for instructors.
	•	VisibleAI – An authorship transparency tool that reveals how student work is created, distinguishing between AI-assisted and original writing, so educators can guide ethical, responsible AI use in learning.

Our Growth & Values

What began as a solution for peer learning has grown into a dual-product platform serving 200,000+ users across 250+ institutions worldwide. 
Our values drive our growth: Mamba Mentality, Actively Learning, Healthy Mind & Healthy Body, Radical Honesty, Listening with Empathy, and Always Innovating. 

These principles fuel our commitment to helping educators teach with confidence and preparing students for a future where critical thinking and ethical AI use are essential.

Name: Synchrolearn Languages Private Limited
Description:
Established in 2010, Liveguru.in, now Synchrolearn Languages Private Limited, with its highly-skilled, internationally-certified teachers provides customised, high-quality, classroom-like training to knowledge seekers with specific requirements. We aim to improve communication skills and employability.  
It is a well-known fact that to achieve mastery in a language a person needs simultaneous proficiency in seven skills – namely, Listening, Speaking, Pronunciation, Grammar, Vocabulary, Reading and Writing. Very few people can master these seven competencies uniformly, and when proficiency in one of these building blocks lags, learning suffers - hence the need to personalize and customize the instruction process to enable a tangible and verifiable progression. 
Our courses include Indian and foreign languages, exam preparation ranging from SAT, CAT, ACT, GMAT, IELTS, CELPIP, OET, PT, TOEIC, DELE, DELF-DALF, DFA, DELF Junior, assessments, proficiency tests and soft skills, Mathematics, Science, teacher training programmes to name a few.
We also undertake interpretation and translation.

Name: Lingio
Description:
At Lingio, we believe learning should be a fun and engaging experience that inspires people to practice and acquire new skills quickly. By leveraging the power of reliable AI and gamification, we transform training for frontline workers with 12 times higher course completion rates than other learning solutions.

Trusted by corporations and public authorities, Lingio is the go-to solution for training large workforces. Our esteemed clients include Vardaga, Scandic, Stockholms Stad, Ambea, and Nobina, among others.

Our journey began in the summer of 2015 when three ex-colleagues from Spotify and EA Games wanted to make a difference in the world. In response to labour integration challenges in Sweden, they sought to facilitate easy integration into Swedish society and the labour market.

Recognising a gap in the learning and development market, our founders combined their gaming and product development expertise to create Lingio. Initially a language-learning product for working professionals, Lingio expanded to meet the demand for fun and effective skill acquisition globally.

With extensive experience in reliable AI and learning research, the Lingio team developed the AI Course Creator, revolutionising how skills are learned. And in 2022, we successfully raised 41M SEK (approx 3.7M EUR) in funding, led by BackingMinds, enabling us to accelerate Lingio's international growth.

We’re proud to have a diverse team of AI experts, teachers, web developers, sound producers, translators, and partnership specialists. Our technical experts collaborate closely with language teachers, educators, and vocational trainers to develop highly engaging and relevant content and tools.

By combining our team’s teaching experience with cutting-edge AI technologies, we ensure that learning with Lingio is enjoyable and effective. 

Join Lingio today and unlock a world of transformative learning for your staff.

Name: NajahNow
Description:
NajahNow is an international IT private tutoring service, connecting teachers and students anywhere in the world, any time.

Through secure audio-visual communication links between teachers and students, we offer education without borders, allowing students to achieve optimal success in both academics and life.

NajahNow – najah in Arabic means “success” – accepts only the most highly-qualified faculty and seriously motivated students. Many of our instructors are retired top professionals in their fields.
 
For both teachers and students, we save the time, energy and money traditionally wasted in travel, providing parents of our younger pupils especially, peace of mind knowing that their children are getting the best private tutoring from the safety of home.

To maintain quality control and curriculum integrity, all tutoring sessions are recorded and teachers and students evaluate each other after each lesson. After three unsatisfactory evaluations, a teacher or student’s contract with NajahNow is terminated.

NajahNow courses are custom-designed to fit a diversity of needs, whether students are currently enrolled in government, private, parochial, or other education systems.

Our courses include not only standard international curriculum subjects, but electives such as conversational language training, business administration and management skills, etc.

NajahNow donates a portion of its annual profits to group tutoring in needy areas of the world.

Name: Data-Driven AI meetup
Description:
The latest advances in AI have given us amazing things like self-driving cars, voice assistants, and chatbots. But to keep up the good work, these solutions (or rather the algorithms behind them) need fresh, up-to-date data – and they need it all the time. We want to learn how to gather, label, manage, and monitor data efficiently to build robust ML models and turn them into real-life solutions. And that’s what our community is for.

We welcome data scientists, researchers, ML engineers, and anyone who shares our belief that data and models are equally important in developing ML. Our vision is to pool our expertise and work together to build a framework for excellence across all stages of the Machine Learning life cycle. If you have practical experience to share or challenges to mull over, don’t hesitate to join the conversation! Our monthly meetups cover a wide range of topics with practical applications in areas like natural language processing, computer vision, and recommendation systems.

 Join our community to dive deeper. Toloka Global Community is where you can connect directly with the Toloka team and other requesters to get expert advice and exchange ideas: https://bit.ly/3IVnQHh

Name: NeuroMindfulness Institute
Description:
Who We Are

The NeuroMindfulness Institute is a global leader in neuroscience-based leadership development. We integrate cutting-edge neuroscience, mindfulness practices, and executive coaching to help individuals and organizations thrive in an age of distraction, complexity, and digital overload.

Our WHY

Our mission is to help people get back in control of their attention - the most precious and overexploited resource in today’s world. In a time where human focus is constantly hijacked by technology, our work is about reclaiming presence, purpose, and clarity - one breath, one choice at a time.

Our Programs

We deliver impactful, science-backed programs tailored for modern leaders, coaches, and changemakers:

1. NeuroMindfulness Coach Certification (ICF-certified): Our flagship program, empowering coaches and facilitators to master attention, emotion regulation, and cognitive performance.
2. C-Level Leadership Programs: Executive experiences that develop focus, self-leadership, and decision-making in the face of complexity and AI-driven transformation.
3. Executive Coaching: High-impact, neuroscience-informed coaching for top leaders and high potentials.
4. Leadership Retreats: Immersive, offsite retreats combining deep self-reflection, attention training, and strategic thinking.

Credentials & Global Presence

- 700+ certified practitioners in 56 countries
- Over 30,000 enrolments in NMI online programs
- More than 200,000 participants globally across corporate trainings, workshops, and keynotes
- Programs trusted by executives from global companies including HSBC, Sonova, Vodafone, Orange, Microsoft, Lego, IBM, Meta, Google, Accenture, Yum! Brand, Ubisoft, BNP Paribas and much more. 

Our Next 5 Years: Focus on Attention Mastery
As we look to the future, Attention Mastery is at the heart of everything we do.
We are building a global movement to create Attention Conscious Cultures, aiming to inspire 1.000.000 Attention Champions by 2030.

We must train them effectively to be so anxious on the events happening in their own countries or in the rest of the world. The Media literacy is an interdisciplinary course involved closely with the other fields of sciences like the politics, international relations, law, economics, sociology and culture. I am going to make an international team work who can transform the present status of the media literacy education in the world. We must try to redefine and restate the most frequently used terminologies in the world such as: DEMOCRACY, PEACE, DIALOG AMONG CIVILIZATIONS, JUSTICE AND SO ON, because these are the terms made the superpowers to mislead the world public opinion from the clashes among nations. We believe that there must not be any discrimination among people, there must not be the term of minorities as God has created every human being the same with no focus on the COLOR, RELIGION, SEXISM and so on. Name: Pesquisadora de Impacto
Description:
A Pesquisadora de Impacto é uma instituição que acredita que a pesquisa é o combustível para a evolução da sociedade e a sustentabilidade de negócios.

Somos uma empresa de impacto social que visa ampliar o número de mestras e doutoras no mercado de trabalho, contribuindo com a empregabilidade de profissionais altamente qualificadas e que fazem parte da construção da ciência, educação, pesquisa e inovação do Brasil. 

Contribuir com a valorização da ciência no Brasil, ampliar a equidade de gênero e a igualdade de oportunidades no mercado fazem parte do nosso DNA e são os valores que aplicamos todos os dias. 

Somos especialistas em conectar mestras e doutoras com o mercado de trabalho por meio treinamentos, programas de mentoria e projetos personalizados desenvolvidos junto às empresas. De um lado, ajudamos, incentivamos e preparamos mulheres da pesquisa para fazerem a transição do mundo acadêmico para o mercado de trabalho. Do outro, criamos programas e ações inclusivas em conjunto com as empresas para atração e contratação das pesquisadoras brasileiras.

Name: VUIHOC - K12 online education platform
Description:
Vuihoc.vn là trường học online, ra đời với sứ mệnh mang đến cơ hội tiếp cận bình đẳng với sản phẩm giáo dục trực tuyến chất lượng cao dành cho các em học sinh từ lớp 1 đến lớp 12 trên toàn quốc. 
Thành lập đầu năm 2019, chỉ trong thời gian ngắn, Vuihoc.vn đã vươn lên mạnh mẽ, lọt vào TOP các Công ty trong lĩnh vực EdTech, trở thành nền tảng học tập trực tuyến hàng đầu dành cho học sinh. Vuihoc.vn đã và đang nhận những khoản đầu tư từ các quỹ đầu tư danh tiếng trong và ngoài nước.

Với 5.000.000 người dùng trên cả nước, Vuihoc.vn mục tiêu trở thành là Công ty dẫn đầu về K12 trực tuyến tại Việt Nam. Để duy trì hệ thống có 100.000 người dùng mỗi ngày và lên tới 7.000 người dùng trong cùng một thời điểm, Vuihoc.vn sở hữu một đội ngũ có chuyên môn cao về Web, LMS, API, Mobile App. Bên cạnh việc giữ ổn định cho hệ thống với 50.000 lượt truy cập vào Web và 500.000 lượt tải App, Vuihoc.vn đã và đang tiếp tục phát triển các tính năng mới ở sản phẩm theo hướng cá nhân hóa với khách hàng, từ đó nâng cao trải nghiệm của học sinh trong từng khóa học.
Tại Vuihoc.vn, cùng nhau, chúng ta đang chinh phục những cột mốc mới!

Name: The Next Genius Foundation
Description:
Founded in 2014, The Next Genius Foundation is a registered charitable trust in India. Our flagship program, The Next Genius Scholarship Program offers full and partial tuition scholarships to outstanding Indian high school students to pursue their undergraduate education in the United States.

Our philanthropic initiative - Next Genius Webinars aims to further the dialog in career guidance and college admissions in an open and equitable manner for high school students, families and educators. We hope to facilitate conversations, share counseling tools and provide a platform for free exchange of exciting ideas.

Our vision is to identify world changers, and connect them with outstanding educational and career opportunities. In working with these students – beginning in high school, through college and onto their careers – we hope to establish a community of future leaders who will leave a strong impact on society.

Name: London Business School Social Impact Club
Description:
The Social Impact Club at London Business School is a professional and networking club for those interested in for-profit and non-for-profit businesses with positive social and environmental impact. 

If you're just curious about the area or know you want to pursue a career related to one of the Social Impact areas, there is something for everyone in the Club. 
 
We cut across all industries and sectors, be it finance (impact investment, social finance), consulting (impact consulting for non-for-profits or social enterprises), industry (corporate sustainability, supply chain...) and entrepreneurship.
 
We aim to mobilise, challenge & inspire you, the next generation of business leaders, to drive transformational change in the workplace and the world.
 
Throughout the year we'll offer:
Unique access to global thought leaders in the social impact space within our alumni community, professional networks and beyond
In-depth learning about innovative and holistic approaches to business
Opportunities for hands-on experience

Name: IndonesiaX
Description:
IndonesiaX menyediakan kursus-kursus berkualitas di platform berbasis online IndonesiaX.co.id yang dapat diakses secara GRATIS di seluruh pelosok Indonesia. Kursus-kursus yang disebut massive open online courses (MOOC) ini dibawakan oleh profesor/pengajar ternama dan pimpinan perusahaan yang piawai di bidangnya dalam bentuk video yang ditayangkan mingguan, maksimal 1 jam per minggu.  Pembelajar memilih kursus-kursus yang sesuai minat dan kebutuhan untuk pekerjaannya.  Tidak ada prasyarat apapun untuk mengikuti kursus-kursus tsb asalkan memiliki koneksi internet. Tujuan pengadaan MOOC ini adalah untuk memberi kesempatan kepada anak bangsa  di seluruh pelosok negeri untuk belajar dari profesor/dosen, pemimpin perusahaan terbaik dan para ahli sehingga mengurangi disparitas antar pulau. 

Sejak peluncuran tanggal 17 Agustus 2015, tercatat lebih dari 300.000 pembelajar yang telah mengikuti 35 kursus di platform IndonesiaX.co.id dari 34 propinsi. Mayoritas pembelajar berada di kelompok umur 18- 34 tahun (74.3%) dan kelompok umur 35- 44% (14.6%) dengan tanggapan  yang positif bahkan mengharukan, menunjukkan terima kasih yang mendalam atas kesempatan yang mereka dapatkan untuk meningkatkan pengetahuan dan pendidikan mereka dan bagaimana kursus-kursus tsb telah membantu mereka dalam bekerja dan berusaha. Kursus-kursus di IndonesiaX juga telah dipakai sebagai bahan training di beberapa BUMN, kementerian dan perusahaan swasta. 

IndonesiaX adalah nama produk dari PT Education Technology Indonesia (ETI), yang mottonya adalah ‘Enriching Lives Through Education’. IndonesiaX didukung oleh Dewan Penasehat yang beranggotakan tokoh-tokoh pendidikan dan pimpinan perusahaan terkemuka di Indonesia, yang berperan memberikan masukan-masukan mengenai MOOC yang akan ditawarkan berikutnya dan bagaimana teknologi dapat dikembangkan lebih jauh sehingga dapat menyesuaikan dengan kebutuhan para partner.

Name: LNF - Les Nouvelles Formations
Description:
LNF est un organisme de formation à fort impact. 

Notre mission : rendre facilement accessible des compétences essentielles que les personnes n’ont aucune chance d’acquérir la plupart du temps dans le cours normal de leur vie professionnelle. 

1er projet réussi : rendre accessible la préparation mentale dans le sport en France. En 4 ans, nous avons formé et certifié plus de 7.000 personnes sur ce sujet. 60 Fédérations et Ligues sont à présent partenaires de LNF pour démocratiser ce savoir. Et LNF est devenu le leader français sur ce thème.

Prochain sujet : rendre l’entrepreneuriat réellement accessible aux cadres. 

De nombreux cadres rêvent de se lancer et ne le font pas ou alors vraiment très mal, alors qu’ils pourraient être de formidables entrepreneurs. Nous sortons courant mars une formation exceptionnelle qui les mettra réellement à niveau sur l’entrepreneuriat et leur donnera la possibilité d’envisager très sérieusement cette option. Et nous les accompagnerons pour qu’ils réussissent leur projet. La formation est exceptionnelle. 

À propos de LNF : SAS créée en 2016, développement par croissance organique sans levée de fonds. CA 2021 : 7 millions, 30 personnes, Paris 9è.
