Name: FORMALIVE
Description:
Chaque salarié, indépendant ou demandeur d’emploi peut bénéficier d’une formation intégralement prise en charge via son Compte Personnel de Formation. Celui-ci s’est substitué au compte DIF (Droits Individuels à la Formation) le 1er janvier 2015 avec reprise des droits acquis sur ce dernier. Ce compte est crédité tous les ans de 500 € en moyenne et peut atteindre 800 € en fonction de votre qualification. Il est plafonné à 5000 €, d’où l’intérêt de se former régulièrement. 

De nos jours nous pouvons tous être confrontés à une obligation de reconversion. Le meilleur moyen de s’y préparer est de s’armer en se formant, et cela de chez vous ou en toute mobilité !


L’ÉQUIPE FORMALIVE
Nous vous accompagnons dès l’entrée en formation pour la prise en main de votre plateforme interactive et tout au long de votre cursus par e-mail ou téléphone du lundi au vendredi de 10h à 17h30.


CONTENU LUDIQUE
Un espace personnel de formation accessible 24h/24 et 7j/7 depuis le support de votre choix (PC, tablette, smartphone). Des cours & exercices mis à disposition en fonction du niveau et des objectifs.


NOS EXPERTS
Tout au long de votre parcours de formation, un tuteur attitré vous accompagne. Expert dans son domaine, il répondra à vos questions lors des rendez-vous en visioconférence fixés à votre convenance.


CERTIFIEZ-VOUS
En fin de formation, validez vos acquis grâce à des certifications à distance reconnues RNCP ou RS. FORMALIVE est un centre habilité TOSA, ICDL, LILATE, BRIGTH LANGUAGE, ENI ...

We are official training providers (registered vendors) for many companies in South Africa. See a full list here: 
http://www.sawriterscollege.co.za/About+Us/Writing+Courses+for+Corporate+Training.html 

Every year SA Writers College sponsors a free-to-enter national writing competition for beginner writers - attracting up to 700 entries annually.

Name: Acadèmia.tv
Description:
Acadèmia.tv è la prima piattaforma internazionale di e-learning dedicata al mondo del food&beverage. 

I docenti di Acadèmia.tv sono tra i più illustri esponenti di questo mondo e tramite i loro corsi trasmettono ricette e filosofie consolidate negli anni. 

Oldani, Massari, Niederkofler, Knam sono solo alcuni dei maestri che ti aiuteranno a formarti nel meraviglioso mondo della cucina.

Acadèmia.tv è un progetto di formazione online sviluppato da Chef in Camicia che ha l’obiettivo di rendere la cucina più inclusiva e accessibile a tutti. L’amore per questa arte millenaria e la passione che spinge ogni giorno milioni di persone in tutto il mondo ai fornelli, sono le basi su cui si fonda l’intero progetto.

“Non tutti possono diventare dei grandi artisti, ma un grande artista può celarsi in chiunque.” Sono queste le parole di Gusteau nel film d’animazione Pixar “Ratatouille” che ispirano e alimentano il desiderio di tanti a cimentarsi in cucina. Perché in fondo, chiunque può cucinare!

È con questo spirito che con Acadèmia.tv potrai testare le tue competenze e conoscenze sulla cucina per migliorare e perfezionarti sempre di più, anche partendo da zero.

Registrandoti su Acadèmia.tv, potrai scegliere di sottoscrivere un abbonamento annuale o di acquistare i corsi che più ti interessano. A conclusione di ogni percorso formativo, riceverai un attestato di partecipazione che potrai condividere su tutti i tuoi profili social. Non vediamo l’ora di vedere di cosa sei capace! E ricorda: la cucina è divertimento e gioia.

Name: The NROC Project
Description:
The NROC Project is a nonprofit technology organization collaborating with educators to solve thorny problems. 

Technology can't—and shouldn't—replace the human art of teaching, but it can help you effectively individualize instruction at scale. Every learner can benefit from personalized support, whether they're rising to grade-level expectations, transitioning to a new grade, preparing for college or career, or working to earn a credential that will give their family fresh opportunities.

NROC partners with educators to create open and low-cost courses and tools designed to recognize every student’s unique learning needs and preferences. These resources can be adapted and scaled to meet programmatic goals in a variety of instructional settings.

When your institution, system, or state partners with NROC, you enjoy affordable access to NROC's curricula and tools, as well as thoughtful instructional resources, timely professional development, and responsive implementation and technical support. To boot, you gain a community of connected, inspired, and highly skilled academics who regularly share how their practices are opening doors for learners historically left behind.

Name: SlateValley
Description:
Slate Valley is a next-generation skilling ecosystem that transforms the way people learn, build and launch their careers. By blending hands-on, project-driven learning with AI-powered guidance, verified credentials and a vibrant maker community, we bridge the gap between traditional education and real-world impact.

What We Do

MakersValley Labs: Physical & virtual maker-spaces equipped with 3D printers, robotics kits and CAD tools—fueling rapid prototyping and buildathons.

Industry-Aligned Micro-Degrees: Stackable, outcome-focused credential paths designed with leading experts (from AI/ML to EV technology).

AI Roadmapping & Skill DNA: Personalized quizzes and analytics that pinpoint your strengths and generate a tailored learning roadmap.

Micro-Internships & Gig Marketplace: Short-term projects with SMEs and startups to build portfolios, earn credentials and get hired.

Community & Mentorship: A social platform for peer squads, reverse-mentorship circles, expert Q&As and global collaboration.

Why Slate Valley?

Outcome-Driven: Only 30% reach our rigorous Gold certification—ensuring employers trust your skills.

Democratized Access: From Tier-2/3 colleges to rural towns, we make cutting-edge training affordable and outcome-based.

Future-Proof: Blockchain-backed certificates and an AI Mentor Match engine keep your credentials secure and your career on track.

Holistic Growth: Beyond tech, we nurture soft skills, creative disciplines and well-being through interactive labs and community events.

Join us to build real projects, connect with industry leaders and unlock a lifetime of opportunity—because at Slate Valley, “Skills Meet Skin in the Game.”

Name: 2DOTS
Description:
Em um tempo onde o futuro se desenha a cada passo, a 2DOTS surge como um guia certeiro para jovens talentos que sonham em conquistar o topo da área comercial. Mais do que uma empresa de recrutamento, a 2DOTS é a concretização de um sonho: o de impulsionar carreiras, conectar paixões e construir juntos um futuro brilhante.

Com a missão de transformar o recrutamento da área comercial em uma experiência inspiradora e eficiente, nos dedicamos a conectar jovens talentos com oportunidades que os façam brilhar. Buscamos identificar o potencial individual de cada candidato, suas habilidades e sonhos, e guiá-los na jornada rumo ao sucesso profissional.

Para as empresas, a 2DOTS é a ponte que as conecta com o futuro. Oferecendo acesso a profissionais brilhantes, com desempenho destacado em testes e atividades da área comercial, curiosos, com garra e vontade de acontecer. Agilizando o processo seletivo de abertura e reposição de vagas na área de pré-vendas. Garantindo candidatos qualificados, redução de vícios de processos, com perfil aderente à área e competências esperadas deste profissional. Também conduzimos treinamentos de áreas comerciais já estruturadas e formação de líderes. Workshops que visam aprimorar as habilidades das equipes de recrutamento e seleção, garantindo a escolha dos candidatos mais adequados para cada vaga. E consultoria para companhias que desejam otimizar e documentar seus processos ou sanar problemas específicos de suas áreas comerciais.

Para talentos, a 2DOTS acredita que o sucesso é construído em conjunto. Por meio de acompanhamento constante, a empresa oferece um curso completo de capacitação em pré-vendas, mentoria e coaching, ajudando-os a identificarem suas fortalezas, desenvolverem suas habilidades e se prepararem para os desafios do mercado.

A 2DOTS é um agente transformador que impulsiona carreiras, conecta paixões e constrói um futuro promissor para talentos e empresas. Com essa energia, convidamos você a fazer parte dessa jornada!

Name: Notting Hill College Official
Description:
Notting Hill College is a dynamic British institution which specialises in further education as well as vocational training. The College was established in 2004 and ever since that date, it has been constantly expanding in various tracks; curriculum and programme design, academic partnership and network construction.

Due to our rigorous updates and innovations; NHC has attracted ambitious students to join its programmes and has thrived in the teaching and learning community. Our quality-driven approach has given us a global outlook and has placed NHC at the forefront of the vocational training market.

Over the years, NHC has developed vocational training programmes which lead directly to the professional job market. This means that the College offers only those programmes which are fully accepted by the education sector in Great Britain and abroad, as well as by businesses and industry.

All programmes of study are currently being mapped to the Qualifications Credit Framework.

Our institution operates across four major areas which are: Teacher Training, Business Training, Health & Safety& Language Training as well as Assessment. Our students are on courses leading to certificate-level and diploma-level programmes. The exceptional breadth of vocational training choices together with the rapidly-expanding range of courses enables us to fulfil the requirements of our students and potential students. The College’s array of short courses, certificate level and diploma level programmes is spread across three distinct schools: the School of Business, School of Teacher Training and School of Languages.
 
The college's head office is in Manchester. Notting Hill College also has bases in the UK, UAE, Turkey, Bahrain and Egypt and is proud of our large network of international staff and students.

Name: Campus IQ
Description:

On a journey to make education accessible to anyone willing to learn, our promise is nothing but bringing the best full-stack education with an emphasis on real-world challenges and trusted teaching methods to you. 

Founded in 2015, we have been striving to make students industry-ready by keeping them up-to-date with the latest technologies in the market.  With a goal that does not only concentrate on imparting knowledge in developers but also enabling them to pursue education without having to worry about the tuition fee, we offer them to pay a part of their salary through Income Share Agreement (ISA) on an installment basis, post joining a job. 

Though we have been striving hard to make education accessible and technologically advanced for students in this fast-paced world, we also understand that not every student follows a similar path. We cater to students who wish to learn at the comfort of their home and also who perform well in a classroom setup, through our online and offline teaching facilities.

We have left no stones unturned to provide our students with the best education. All the courses are designed and executed in association with top industry experts working in prominent companies across the country. Our detailed course structure provides students with an in-depth understanding of full-stack web development which helps them land job opportunities in Cerebtec Technologies, a sister concern of Campus IQ as well as organizations like MobMe, Portea Medicals, Flytxt, Good Methods Global, Accenture, Microsoft, IBS and UST Global.

Name: Educa Business School
Description:

Años de experiencia avalan el trabajo que profesionales expertos desarrollan en Educa, basándose en una metodología completamente a la vanguardia educativa. Gracias al campus online con el que cuenta el centro, provisto de los detalles esenciales para cubrir las necesidades del alumnado, realizar un curso presencial ya no es requisito para obtener una Titulación Oficial, a la que se puede accederse mediante la realización de un curso a distancia en cualquiera de las áreas temáticas disponibles.

La acreditación obtenida al finalizar los cursos de Educa Business School 3.0 son avalados por la Asociación Española de Calidad (AEC), que establece los máximos criterios de calidad en la formación.

Miles de alumnos/as ya se han formado en Educa. Realizar cursos online, dentro del amplio abanico de áreas formativas, y acreditar los conocimientos a través de un reconocimiento a nivel universitario, es posible en este centro de formación online.

El centro virtual amplía, de esta forma, las oportunidades de empleo y crecimiento empresarial.

Educa dirige parte de sus ingresos a la sostenibilidad ambiental y ciudadana, lo que la consolida como una empresa socialmente responsable.

Las Titulaciones acreditadas por Educa Business School pueden certificarse con la Apostilla de La Haya (CERTIFICACIÓN OFICIAL DE CARÁCTER INTERNACIONAL).

Paraklete Institute, is a global certification training partner of the Project Management Institute (PMI-USA), (a certified global Premier Authorized Partner, ATP#5299), is registered and operational in Nigeria, Cameroon, and in the USA. 

Paraklete is a global education consultant in project management and project management methodologies like lean, six sigma, agile, scrum,  Risk  Management, Business Analysis, PMO and Project Governance, focused on the Project Economy and Digital Economy Skills training. 

With over a decade of experience in the project industry, Paraklete is already gaining immense accolades in providing the highest quality training and consultancy to corporate organizations, governments, professionals and alternative audiences.

Name: Socrative
Description:
Socrative is a team of educators and engineers passionate about improving education.  Having been in the classroom, we understand the real challenges facing educators in today’s classrooms.  In case you’re curious, our platform was designed with pedagogical underpinnings based on the Teaching for Understanding framework, Bloom’s Taxonomy, the Socratic method and John Seely Brown’s philosophy of play, questioning and imagination.
We also believe that tech tools should be super simple in order to enhance classroom engagement, assessment and personalization.  Our goal is to aid in the facilitation of rich educational experiences without a large learning curve on the components of the platform.  We want to ensure teachers and students can remain focused on their own reflection and pathways toward better understanding.
More at www.socrative.com

Name: REBELWAY
Description:
Rebelway is an online VFX training website that specializes in developing high-end FX courses for CG artists. From epic destruction scenes to magical effects, Rebelway students create incredible VFX work through tactical training and feedback from award-winning artists.

After spending years in the world of high-end VFX world, Emmy-nominated FX artist Saber Jlassi teamed up with Igor Zanic to launch Rebelway, an online VFX training site. As pioneers in the world of online Houdini training, Rebelway quickly developed an identity in the FX world as the essential place to learn Hollywood-level VFX at an affordable price. Rebelway continues their mission to equip aspiring and practicing FX artists alike by developing courses and tutorials for a new era of CG artists.

Name: Lifestyle Seed
Description:
For over seven years, we have been providing life-changing personal and professional development courses and training. Our mission is to empower individuals with the tools and education they need to create a more fulfilled and purposeful life. With a presence in over 100 countries, we are committed to making a lasting impact worldwide.

At our core, we focus on Personal Development and Leadership Development, creating life-changing experiences through acclaimed Online Courses and impactful Leadership Development events.

Our community is a hub for individuals passionate about personal growth. We foster a supportive, positive environment for like-minded people worldwide to connect, make friends, and embark on transformative journeys.

Name: Lex Familia India
Description:
Lex Familia India (LFI) | Law Beyond the Textbook: A Practically Driven Legal Learning Platform. A Family of Lawyers.

Lex Familia India is not just a platform—it is, as the name suggests, a familia: a close-knit community of lawyers learning, growing, and mentoring together.

Founded by senior legal professionals, LFI is built on a singular vision: to bridge the wide gap between legal education and legal practice. We help law students and young professionals think, draft, and solve problems like real lawyers do—using actual transaction documents, regulatory filings, live case studies, and insights from those who have worked on the frontlines of law.

Our focus areas span M&A, capital markets, litigation strategy, securities regulation, due diligence, and more—delivered through intensive workshops, drafting simulations, and direct mentorship.

What makes Lex Familia India different?
 Real-world learning rooted in actual practice
 Mentorship from top-tier lawyers and professionals
 Peer-led accountability, feedback, and growth
 Proven results—students placed across top firms, chambers & companies

At LFI, legal learning is not a one-way lecture—it’s a conversation, a challenge, and above all, a journey taken together.

 Follow us for updates on programs, applications, and insights from the world of law.

Name: Universidade do Futebol
Description:
Criada em 2003 a Universidade do Futebol é uma instituição que estuda, pesquisa, produz, divulga e propõe mudanças nas diferentes áreas e setores relacionados ao universo do futebol, enquanto atividade econômica e importante manifestação de nosso patrimônio cultural, nas dimensões socioeducativas e no alto rendimento, e que conquistou nos últimos anos o reconhecimento e credibilidade da comunidade do futebol.

Nos últimos anos, a Universidade do Futebol assumiu um importante papel no processo de incentivo ao estudo e pesquisa no futebol, em todas as suas dimensões de atuação, contribuindo para o seu desenvolvimento e tornando-se um dos mais relevantes think (and do) tanks do esporte em nosso país.

Com presença em mais de 30 países e cursos em português e espanhol, a Universidade do Futebol é hoje uma das principais referências em produção do conhecimento no futebol brasileiro.

Name: Marie Forleo International
Description:
Marie Forleo International is a socially conscious digital empire founded by #1 New York Times bestselling author and one of the most sought-after motivational coaches in the world, Marie Forleo. Our mission is to give people the tools they need to change their lives. We do this through our award-winning show MarieTV, The Marie Forleo Podcast and our online training programs like B-School and The Copy Cure.

We believe in the power of personal growth, laughter and life-long learning. Our motto is “everything is figureoutable,” and we're dedicated to helping millions of big-hearted dreamers use their gifts to change the world. 

We hire people who are motivated by our mission and passionate about creating positive change. Our team is remotely distributed; we care more about your work ethic and attitude than your location.

How we roll:
*Full autonomy over where you work, what you wear and which pet sits at your feet
*Paid medical and dental insurance, plus $1,500 HSA deposit 
*Flexible Spending Account for health insurance and childcare
*4 weeks company closure time off (exact dates determined by company)
*10 days PTO
*Paid holidays
*5 sick days
*3 inspiration days to use as you choose
*401(k) + company match 
*Paid parental leave
*A family of colleagues who will make you laugh and support you every step of the way
 
Marie Forleo International is an equal opportunity employer. We firmly believe that our work is at its best when everyone feels free to be themselves.

Name: iTutorGroup
Description:
iTutorGroup is the global leader in online education; providing individualized, personalized learning experiences to hundreds of thousands of students and business professionals in a wide array of subject matters through its network and sourcing of experts and teachers from more than 80 countries around the world. iTutorGroup leverages big data analytics with data from 20 years of learner behavior pattern and utilizes advanced algorithmic capabilities to intelligently match students, teachers and digital content. 
Since its inception in 1998, iTutorGroup has become the largest online platform driving live human-to-human interactions worldwide. iTutorGroup leads the way with a disruptive education service model. With iTutorGroup, anybody can learn anything from any device, anytime, 24-7. 
iTutorGroup's award-winning education platforms include TutorABC for professional adult English-language learning, vipJr for English, math, coding and other K-12 subjects, TutorMing for Mandarin Chinese language learning and LiveH2H - a robust video conferencing suite for live interactions and experts-on-demand.

Ofrecemos cursos especializados en gestión empresarial, liderazgo, marketing, innovación, entre otros, diseñados por expertos y pensados para responder a los desafíos del entorno actual.

Nuestro propósito es reducir las brechas educativas y acompañar a las empresas en la formación de equipos más preparados, productivos y competitivos.

Hoy, más de 200 empresas ya confían en Campus Romero como su aliado para potenciar su talento.

Name: Knewton Alta
Description:
Knewton Alta puts achievement within reach for all learners with adaptive technologies and products that deliver personalized and lasting learning experiences. Educators, schools and universities, and education companies around the world use Knewton Alta to power and provide digital courses that dynamically adapt to each student's unique needs. More than 14 million students around the world have used Knewton Alta powered courses to date. 

Knewton Alta is a Wiley Partner. Wiley champions those who see knowledge as a force for good. A trusted leader in research and learning, our pioneering solutions and services are paving the way for knowledge seekers as they work to solve the world’s most important challenges. Around the globe, we break down barriers for innovators, empowering them to publish and advance discoveries in their fields, evolve their workforces, and shape minds through teaching and learning. Together, we are unlocking the creation and curation of knowledge for all, transforming today’s biggest obstacles into tomorrow’s brightest opportunities.

Name: Engehall Treinamentos
Description:
A Engehall é uma empresa especialista em treinamentos obrigatórios de Normas Regulamentadoras.

Nossa jornada começou lá em 2012, a partir de uma necessidade real: criar treinamentos de segurança do trabalho que realmente funcionam. Para isso, desenvolvemos uma metodologia própria chamada SAFE, fundamentada na legislação e adaptada à realidade de cada empresa.

Atualmente, oferecemos um portfólio com mais de 75 cursos disponíveis em diferentes formatos para atender empresas de todos os portes e setores.

Nosso objetivo é ajudar empresas a manterem sua equipe segura e certificada com menos burocracia, menos custo e 100% em dia com as exigências do Ministério do Trabalho e do e-Social.

Mas acreditamos que ações falam mais que palavras!

Nossas conquistas, como as certificações ISO 9001 e ISO 45001, evidenciam nosso comprometimento e os números reforçam nossa eficácia: mais de 300 mil profissionais formados e 8.000 instituições impactadas. Mas o mais importante: 90% das empresas atendidas voltam a fazer negócio conosco.

Name: CPET - Centro de Profissionalização e Educação Técnica
Description:
O Centro de Profissionalização e Educação Técnica tem como objetivo institucional a disseminação do conhecimento de qualidade através de seus Pólos Educacionais e Cursos Online.

Somos o maior centro de cursos técnicos online do Brasil.

Todos os cursos são reconhecidos pelo MEC e o diploma válido em todo território nacional.

Missão:

Disponibilizar para seus estudantes uma Educação Profissional e Técnica de qualidade e sempre atualizadas e em sinergia com as necessidades do mercado de trabalho, para que a Instituição seja reconhecida como um Centro de Excelência Educacional.

Visão:

A Educação transforma pessoas em cidadãos.

Princípios e Valores:

Para atingir seus objetivos, a Instituição possui os seguintes princípios:

-Integração do ensino, pesquisa e extensão;

-Otimização dos recursos humanos e tecnológicos;

-Respeito às diferenças individuais dos estudantes na forma do aprender;

-Competência na execução das atividades acadêmicas;

-Qualidade no desenvolvimento de suas metodologias operacionais.

Name: SoftUni Digital
Description:
През обученията на SoftUni Digital вече преминаха хиляди студенти, които развиха своите дигитални и бизнес умения, и стартираха успешно кариерата си в индустрията, превръщайки SoftUni Digital в най-успешното място за образование в сферата на дигиталния маркетинг в България, като за своя принос към развитието на дигиталната индустрия в България, СофтУни беше удостоен с редица награди. SoftUni Digital се превърна в ексклузивен образователен партньор на Google за България, като технологичният гигант ще сертифицира курсистите на СофтУни.
 Учебния план на цялостната програма по дигитален маркетинг представлява прецизна селекция от курсове, обхващайки всички сфери на дигиталния маркетинг, чрез което студентите усвояват реални умения за работа с най-съвременните дигитални маркетинг канали, инструменти и концепции. Курсистите имат възможността да работят върху реални казуси от практиката, както и върху свои собствени проекти. Моделът на обучение "учене чрез правене", който следваме, прави възможно превръщането на усвоените познания в реални практически умения, търсени от бизнеса. 
Курсовете по дигитален маркетинг на SoftUni Digital се провеждат от най-изявените и разпознаваеми маркетинг експерти в България. Курсистите имат възможността да черпят познания и да се възползват от успешния опит на преподаватели: успели предприемачи, лектори на международни конференции в сферата на дигиталния маркетинг, ръководители на успешни бизнеси и създатели на едни от най-успешните маркетинг кампании.

Name: Enerji Analiz
Description:
Türkiye'de ve dünyada enerji alanındaki gelişmeleri, genç bakış açısıyla anlatmayı amaçladığımız kanalımızın adı “ENERJİ ANALİZ”. İlk yayınımızı 19 Ocak 2019 günü yaptık ve kısa zamanda videolarımızla ilgili olumlu dönüşleri almaya başladık. Biz enerji sektöründe çalışan üç arkadaş olarak bu işe başlama kararı aldık. 

Amacımız; enerji sektörüne dair güncel bilgileri sizler ile paylaşmak, sektörden kişiler ile röportajlar yapmak, konferans gündemlerini aktarmak ve önemli gelişmeleri yorumlamaktır.

Bu kapsamda, Youtube kanalımızda haftalık olarak yayınladığımız videolarımız ve günlük olarak yayınladığımız Enerji Analiz Bültenimiz yer almaktadır. Her hafta Youtube kanalımız için gündeme dair içerikler hazırlıyor ve sizler için yayınlıyoruz. Bültenimize e-mail adresiniz ile ücretsiz olarak web sitemizden abone olabilirsiniz.

Not: Videolarda yapılan yorumlar özgün olmakla birlikte, 3. kişiler tarafından başka bir platformda kullanılmamalı ve atıfta bulunulmamalıdır.

Name: Safety-Verse
Description: The Safety-Verse is the world’s largest safety advocacy movement whose goal is to promote and foster health and safety worldwide. This initiative is led by Dale Allen, and is joined by The Knights of Safety, The Knights of Safety Academy, The International Association of Chemical Safety, The International Safety Data Sheet Service, The One Billion People Protected Foundation, and more— all with a mission of saving lives and making the world a safer place.

Name: Humanitarian U
Description:
Humanitarian U is a leader in delivering professional online certification and training to humanitarian workers around the world. Our proven educational programs yield results, create career paths and realistically prepare humanitarians for emergency response situations. We equip field workers to affect positive change in communities, provide critical medical services, and offer aid to people displaced by conflict and natural disasters.

Founded in Canada in 2011, Humanitarian U supports best practices in humanitarian training and sets a global standard for humanitarian education. Our goal is to increase the preparedness and effectiveness—and thus the safety—of humanitarian actions worldwide.

Our evidence-based, performance-measured, eLearning courses were developed by globally respected professionals with extensive practical experience in the humanitarian sector. We offer programs geared toward existing and aspiring humanitarian workers from a wide range of organizations, including NGOs, governments, institutions, the medical community, and other relief and non-profit groups.

Name: ConnectPrep
Description:
ConnectPrep is more than an educational institution; it's an empowering force devoted to shaping successful futures through personalized academic tutoring, targeted test prep, and expert college/graduate school advising. Our team boasts award-winning educators with decades of experience, dedicated to instilling both confidence and creativity in students through our collaborative approach.

We cater to a broad spectrum of learners, from K-12 to college and graduate school students, tailoring our lessons to harmonize with their unique learning styles. Moreover, our executive coaching program equips our students with crucial life skills like time management and effective studying techniques.

What sets us apart is our innovative approach to test preparation. We dissect every standardized exam—be it ACT, SAT, ISEE, SSAT, GRE, GMAT, LSAT, or MCAT—with surgical precision. We demystify the content, spotlight the essential knowledge, and provide a roadmap to accurately answering the questions. With ConnectPrep, the path to academic excellence becomes clearer, simpler, and more attainable.

Name: Myopia Profile
Description:
Myopia Profile’s mission is to improve children’s vision care worldwide. Built on this vision and brought into action through eye care practitioner education and public awareness, Myopia Profile has grown to become the largest, most trusted global professional information resource on childhood myopia. 

Our founding philosophy is to accurately disseminate cutting-edge research into an easily digestible eye care practitioner (ECP)-friendly format, with a translational Clinical relevance focus. We distribute this via our multi-platform digital ecosystem, with the key assets being:
- MyopiaProfile.com which features educational articles, clinical case studies, practice resources, podcasts, online courses and more for ECP education and practice
- Myopia Profile Academy - which features the world’s first and only freely available eye care practitioner online course on myopia management, accredited for continuing professional education in numerous countries
- The Myopia Profile closed practitioner Facebook discussion group, with over 8000 active members
- Myopia Profile Instagram and YouTube channel
- MyKidsVision.org public awareness website for parents to learn about childhood myopia; featuring bite sized information, a myopia risk survey, a content rich blog and 18 How-To video guides, created to be readily shared by ECPs to their patients to assist clinical communication. 
- My Kids Vision Facebook page and Instagram account for extended public awareness reach.

Myopia Profile was founded in 2016 by optometrist husband-and-wife Paul Gifford PhD, and Kate Gifford PhD. It has grown from sharing Kate’s self-developed clinical paper-based communication tools to an internationally leading educational destination with over three million active engagements per year across the platforms. In 2020 Myopia Profile has secured multiple global industry sponsorship and grown to a team of eight spread over three countries.

Name: Asian School of Cyber Laws
Description:
Born in 1999, Asian School of Cyber Laws is a global pioneer in cyber law & cyber crime investigation. We work with Governments, Corporates, and Enforcement & Military agencies across the world.

We have assisted the Government of India in framing draft rules and regulations under the Information Technology Act.

We have conducted training programs on Cyber Crime Investigation, Incident Response and Cyber Forensics for senior Government and Police officials and corporate sponsored professionals from Malaysia, Japan, South Korea, China, Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Mauritius, Nepal, UAE, Philippines, USA, UK, Thailand and Ghana.

We were part of the Organizing Committee for the World Congress on Informatics and Law at Spain (2002), Cuba (2003) and Peru (2004).

Law enforcement personnel in India and abroad extensively use our Cyber Crime Investigation Manual. This was one of the first of its kind manuals in the world. Times of India (the world's largest selling English newspaper) has referred to it as a bible for Cyber Crime Investigators.

We have conducted training programs for various national level Government bodies including National Academy of Direct Taxes, National Police Academy, National Institute of Bank Management, National Insurance Academy, Vaikunth Mehta National Institute of Cooperative Management and Securities & Exchange Board of India (SEBI).

We have assisted the Indian Army, various branches of the Indian police and the Central Bureau of Investigation in matters relating to cyber investigation.

In 2015, we co-organized the c4 - Conference on Cyber Crime Control, 2015 along with the Home Department, Govt. of Maharashtra, Mumbai Police, IIT Bombay and ASCL.

We have built the Collaborative Online Investigation Network (COIN) - an interactive platform empowering the world's enforcement agencies to tackle cyber crime & other cases involving digital evidence. This was launched by the Chief Minister of Maharashtra on 27th July, 2015.

Grâce à nos formations, nos apprenants génèrent de meilleurs résultats dans leurs missions. Leurs missions durent ainsi plus longtemps et donnent lieu à des recommandations. Suite à nos formations, nos élèves trouvent plus facilement de nouvelles missions, plus intéressantes et mieux rémunérées.

Scrum Life est certifié Qualiopi dans la catégorie : Actions de formation. Il est donc possible de financer nos formations avec les OPCO, et cela même pour les freelances.

Name: Up Learn
Description:
At Up Learn, we are on a mission to solve education. Together, using cognitive science, interactive lessons and AI-powered tailored algorithms, we are ensuring that EVERY student – regardless of their background or starting grade – has the tools to achieve an A* grade.  

Our students achieve A*/A grades at 2.2x the national average, with some starting from Ds and Us. We’re committed to closing the attainment gap by offering scholarships to disadvantaged students through partnerships with charities like Sutton Trust, IntoUniversity, and The Access Project.

Up Learn handles the curriculum, allowing teachers to bring their subjects to life. Our School Dashboard simplifies setting homework, filtering classes, and tracking student progress, with seamless integration through Wonde for effective monitoring of student activity.

Since 2016, Up Learn has delivered over 20 million hours of learning, supporting hundreds of thousands of students across the UK, including through 400+ school and university partnerships. Our rapid growth is backed by investors like Forward Partners and the Branson family, enabling us to expand our team, refine our product, and develop new A Level courses. 

We’re looking for educators, MATs, and SLTs ready to join us in transforming education and unlocking the potential of millions of students. If you’re ready to make a difference, let’s connect!

Name: Pacific Open Learning Health Net (POLHN)
Description:
Established in 2003 as a joint initiative between the World Health Organization (WHO), the Government of Japan and Pacific Ministers of Health, Pacific Open Learning Health Net (POLHN) is a blend between digital networks and physical infrastructure. It was developed to bridge the gaps between geographically dispersed health workers in Pacific island countries and to boost the knowledge, skills, attitudes and performance of health workers.

Since then, POLHN has grown to become a network of more than 67,000 health workers in 15 Pacific Island countries: American Samoa, Cook Islands, Federated States of Micronesia, Fiji, Guam, Kiribati, Marshall, Nauru, Niue, Palau, Samoa, Solomon Islands, Tonga, Tuvalu, and Vanuatu.

POLHN develops, provides and sponsors appropriate non-credited and accredited curricula in the areas of medicine, nursing, health education and public health, facilitated through various collaborative partners. These include universities, institutions, professional bodies, healthcare organisations, and research entities.

Short self-paced continuing professional development (CPD) refresher courses are made available to health workers, clinicians, public health practitioners and other users at no fee via the internet through POLHN course page. POLHN also sponsors specialised online accredited postgraduate programmes from partner universities.

POLHN envisions achieving e-learning excellence for a better Pacific health workforce. Through online education and collaborative partnerships, it is able to develop health workers with a sustainable and responsive skill mix, without causing financial burden. 

Our mission is to develop a knowledgeable, skilled and motivated health workforce using relevant, effective and quality e-learning.

Name: Boston International Business Group - BIBG
Description:
BIBG is a US-based firm. Our portfolio of services includes, but not limited, to:

- Business-to-Business (B2B) Relations
- Consulting
- Professional Training
In the area of Professional Training, BIBG has made it its mission to train working professionals or newly graduated University students. Our ultimate goal is to actively contribute to the training and infusion of a new breed of African professionals with high level skills who can in turn help African nations become emerging markets in an ever increasing global job markets.

SAP ERP is one the main training portfolios that BIBG offers. Since 2010, more than 300 working professionals have benefited from our various training courses in areas such as SAP Human Resources, SAP Finance & Control, SAP Sales & Distribution, SAP Materials Management, SAP Business Intelligence, SAP Customer Relation Management, SAP Plant Maintenance, SAP Systems Administration, SAP software programming, and many more.

Working professionals who have attended and benefited from our training courses come from various countries from across the African continent: Ghana, Cote D’Ivoire, Cameroun, Nigeria, Senegal, Mali, Burkina Faso, Togo...

One of the high moment BIBG’s professional training journey came in September 2012, when the Government of Ghana (through the Ghana Audit Services) hired us to train 20 of their Auditors in preparation for an Audit project with the United Nations in the UK.

BIBG’s training courses are delivered by a vast network of well experienced trainers most of who are SAP ERP Certified and employed as Consultants on various training or implementation projects in India, US or Canada. Our trainers combined over 20 years of experience in their respective training or implementation fields.

Name: ARI Education
Description:
Avicenna Research Institute (ARI) was established in 1998 and from the beginning of its establishment, the Deputy of Education has been furthering different goals and programs of the research institute in various fields.
With more than sixty full-time faculty members and up-to-date equipment and facilities, this deputy is currently trying to identify existing gaps and educational needs in the field of biotechnology with a great focus on identifying and creating a labor market, empowering human resources, and providing practical training services, so the related problems would be eliminated. 
In fact, the educational activities of this research institute have not been limited to the country; the inextricable link and exchange of knowledge between professors and scientists overseas and in the country and inviting them to promote the scientific content of educational programs have culminated to establish a dynamic and continuous communication between the scientific community at home and abroad. By attracting international student candidates and providing the possibility of active participation of students and scholars abroad, ARI has been able to achieve a prestigious position in the field of international education.
The future prospective of this Deputy is to tap the expertise, experiences, and capabilities of the scientists of ARI and other research and academic centers to expand and improve knowledge and skills in biotechnology and medicine and to boost joint cooperation with educational, research, and treatment centers in the country. Therefore, it would be possible to train specialized and skilled human resources.
Different sections of the Deputy of Education: 
-	Department of Education and Postgraduate Studies, Office of Publishing Scientific Books
-	Office of Continuing Medical Education (CME)
-	Staff Training and Development Office
-	Office of Evaluation and Promotion of Faculty Members
-	National Center of Vocational Education and Training

Description:
The Open Learning Initiative (OLI) at Carnegie Mellon University strives to transform teaching and learning by applying learning science and emerging technologies to increase student success, improve learning productivity and lower barriers to access.  We believe the role of instructors is becoming more important than ever at the same time they are being asked to do more with less, and that communities of dedicated people can utilize these emerging technologies in important and transformative ways.

We combine leading research in cognitive and learning science with state-of-the-art technology to create courses that enact instruction. These courses incorporate practice and assessment throughout and represent current best practices. Openly and freely available our courses empower independent learners and support instructors to improve effectiveness in traditional classrooms. By rigorously capturing and evaluating learner data, OLI creates powerful feedback loops that assist learners and educators, improve courses and contribute our larger understanding of how humans learn.

Description:
La Nouvelle École, c’est un l’endroit où les passionnés viennent transformer leurs idées en projets concrets. 

On y apprend à manier une imprimante 3D, à piloter un drone comme un pro, à designer des pièces sur Fusion 360, à graver au laser… bref, à mettre les mains dans la création numérique et à passer de « j’aimerais bien » à « je l’ai fait ».

Ce qui fait la différence ? Des formations courtes, intenses et ultra-pratiques, pensées pour que chacun reparte autonome. Individuel ou petits groupes, pour vraiment être accompagné plutôt que perdu dans la masse. Des formateurs qui sont de vrais experts, pas des profs théoriques : des makers, des ingénieurs, des télépilotes pros. Un esprit super bienveillant, très « communauté », où tous les profils se croisent : débutants, pros qui veulent monter en compétences, créateurs, artisans, entrepreneurs…

Et surtout : tout est 100 % orienté “projet”. Tu viens avec une envie, un besoin, une idée… tu repars avec quelque chose que tu sais faire, que tu maîtrises et que tu peux utiliser tout de suite.

La Nouvelle École, c’est l’école de celles et ceux qui ont envie d’apprendre autrement : en testant, en manipulant, en créant.

Description:
Hello, I’m Captain Ratatype and I want to tell you about my typing tutor. Ratatype is a simple and convenient online typing tutor for everybody who wants to type better.

I know, that you have to print a lot: at home, at school, at work, and it takes the time that you can devote to other activities. With Ratatype you can free up to 20 minutes a day because it will teach you to type much faster and the “blind ten-finger typing method” will no longer be just a phrase from a textbook.

Ratatype is an excellent typing tutor for both children and adults. And it’s really good! Interesting lessons, bright certificates, awards, competitions… Competitions! Typing speed competitions can be arranged among students in your class or colleagues in the office.

Are you a programmer? Or maybe a writer, copywriter or secretary? Or are you a translator, teacher, blogger? Or maybe you are studying in school or university? So it doesn’t matter! Everyone who works with a computer can improve typing skills with Ratatype.

Teachers also need this! Ratatype’s typing speed exercises can help organize computer science lessons or tech classes efficiently. A minimum of distracting elements will help children to maintain concentration, game elements and awards will not let them get bored during the passing of typing lessons. And it’s easy to control student performance and progress with groups.

Studying together is more fun. Therefore, Ratatype has comfortable groups where you can compete with friends, classmates, colleagues, and anyone else! You can see who has completed more lessons and who has higher typing speed. Racing on the keyboard will help to bring the team together in a fun and interesting way and improve the typing skills of each of its members.

Name: Child Psychology Institute
Description:
The Child Psychology Institute is an award-winning international EdTech company with a passion for empowering schools and parents, as well as healthcare, social care and education staff who work with children with online courses, training and programs. With a firm background in health psychology, we provide training in topics such as childhood trauma, anxiety, dyspraxia, attachment and resilience. CPI offers online courses and programs for groups and individuals, which are self-paced and offer lifetime access so the content is owned by the customer and can be re-visited at any time. We place importance on our students reflecting on their own practice, recognising opportunities for improvement and integrating their learning in a meaningful way. Our courses and programs are informed by the Ecological Model of Health, which assumes that childhood’s mental health is determined by influences at various levels (McLeroy, Bibeau, Steckler & Glanz, 1988). CPI’s approach to education is aligned with Bronfenbrenner’s Bioecological Model, which emphasises the importance of integration across a child’s world. 

The Child Psychology Institute was awarded Overall Start-Up of the Year 2021 by Enterprise Ireland in recognition of our innovative approach to supporting children and those working with children, as well as our global ambition as a high-potential EdTech company.

Name: GAIA Program
Description:
GAIA PROGRAM

GAIA program, created by Universidad Empresa Foundation, Universidad de Alcalá and CIFF,  it was built as a simple, innovative idea; to provide graduate students with the opportunity to learn through experience. 

The main objective of  Gaia program is to complete student's education jointly with professional interships, giving the opportunity to young graduates, who aspire to pursue a career high, of getting work experience while improving their skills and competencies. 

The program is based in two parts:

Practical training: in-company interships, where the student will have a business tutor, whose role is to monitor the adequate development of the Training Plan as well as provide guidance and advice within the company.

Academic training: we designate an academic tutor, whose role is to ensure the successful completion of the academic plan (CIFF).

Since the distinctive feature of the program is its orientation to practical knowledge and learning, all the modules are online , its aim is to allow students maximun flexibility and freedom while providing useful content.

A successfull completion of both parts of the program allows participants to obtain:

- a GAIA Diploma, issued by UAH, CIFF and FUE.
- a Master Degree, a university-specific degree issued by the UAH.
- a Company Certificate issued by the company where the inter was posted.

We hope that you find in Gaia, all the tools  that will lead to professional success.

Name: Trelson
Description:
Schools, colleges and universities across the world rely on Trelson to deliver online testing and transform the exam process into a digital process. Every year 250 000+ students take their digital exams using Trelson and the numbers are growing rapidly. 

Trelson will lock down any student device (Windows, Mac, Chromebook or iPad) to prevent cheating and only allow selected resources. The student will be blocked from searching for information and communicating with others.

The integration with Microsoft 365 as well as Google for Education makes it easy for educational institutions to switch to digital examinations. By using Trelson, you will quickly be able to digitally assess your students. Teachers and students will be able to manage Trelson with little or no training.

At Trelson we have a strong focus on accessibility in order to give all students an equal opportunity. Assistive technology includes extended time, spell-check, text-to-speech, speech-to-text and dyslexia fonts etc.

From infrastructure and administration to design and user experience, Trelson is built to be integrated with your Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace environment. 

The teacher can easily add digital resources to the assignment. For example you can add any resource from Google Drive/SharePoint like a PDF, text, sound, images and video clips.You can also add videos from i.e Youtube. Trelson will automatically make sure that the student access settings are correct when you share a resource the students need during the test.

THRIVE TOGETHER

This value emphasizes the importance of working together to achieve common goals, supporting one another, and creating a positive and inclusive workplace culture. By fostering a sense of unity and cooperation, the business can drive innovation, improve performance, and increase employee satisfaction, leading to long-term success and growth.

OWNERSHIP
The value "Ownership" is important to the business because it promotes a sense of responsibility and accountability among employees. This value encourages individuals to take ownership of their work and decisions, to act as if they have a stake in the outcome, and to continuously strive for improvement. This value also helps to foster a culture of trust, where employees are given the autonomy to make decisions and take risks, leading to a more dynamic and adaptive organization.

Consejo Regulador de las Denominaciones de Origen Jerez, Manzanilla-Sanlúcar de Barrameda y Vinagre de Jerez, con el objetivo de difundir el

Para ello, la Sherry Academy cuenta con la colaboración de reconocidos
profesionales de la enseñanza enológica de diversos países que imparten
formación a todos los niveles, desde cursos introductorios gratuitos a
certificaciones profesionales homologadas.
Esta innovadora iniciativa cuenta con el patrocinio del Programa Europeo de
Promoción de las D.O. de Jerez, Manzanilla de Sanlúcar y Vinagre de Jerez para el fomento de la competitividad y el consumo de estos vinos únicos y originales.
Damos la bienvenida a todos los que deseen embarcarse en este viaje
extraordinario al conocimiento y el disfrute de los vinos de la DOP Jerez.

Social and Welfare
Our society includes many groups who are vulnerable, disadvantaged & volatile. Knowing how to understand, interact with, & achieve positive outcomes is essential. Augmented reality involves overlaying a real-world scene captured by the sensors of a mobile device, for example its cameras and microphones, with computer-generated content including graphics, video, and audio. Virtual reality is a similar concept whereby the computer-generated content completely replaces the real-world scene.

Our aims are:

    To create educational media "on-the-fly" based on the learners current activities and real-world environment

Name: Water Risk Assessment Certification
Description:
The CPD* accredited Water Risk Assessment Certification is a 6-month - live & interactive - online course for busy water professionals who want to fast track becoming a water risk expert (application only).

It is ideal for purpose-driven and busy (water) professionals who want to: 
-	Master the proven Water Risk Assessment Blueprint, 
-	Gain “on-the-job” training in conducting water risk assessments and 
-	Learn how to position themselves as industry-leading experts. 

You will learn all you need to assess, communicate and develop solutions for water risks in 12 practice oriented training modules. 

The training modules are complemented with live hands-on workshops, Q&As and guest speakers allow the participants to gain even deeper insights from multiple perspectives around water risks - and to expand their network. 

To ensure that theory can be put into practice, participants complete their own water risk assessment. 

The 12 Training modules cover: 
1.	How to accelerate your water career
2.	How to understand water risks holistically
3.	How to understand the importance of water risks for businesses and investment operations
4.	How to scan countries, project sites and investment/ project portfolios for water risks, even if you don’t have much time or data.
5.	Who’s Who in the sector and how to engage stakeholders to get the data you need
6.	How to assess water resources risks, even if you have no experience in hydrology 
7.	How to assess water infrastructure risks, even if you are no engineer. 
8.	How to assess water governance risks, even if you have no experience in political sciences.
9.	How to influence  decision makers to take decisions decisions to improve water security
10.	How to use water risk assessments for improved decision making,
11.	How to use the power of multi-stakeholder platforms
12.	How to start looking into solutions to water risks

*Accredited by Continuing Professional Development (CPD), world's leading independent accreditation provider

La publicación es editada por la Universidad de Guadalajara, a través del Sistema de Universidad Virtual y es financiada por las direcciones Académica, Administrativa y Tecnológica de UDGVirtual en conjunción con el Consejo Nacional de Ciencia y Tecnología (CONACYT) y la Coordinación de Investigación y Posgrado de la Universidad de Guadalajara.

La línea editorial que sigue Apertura es:

    Gestión del aprendizaje en ambientes virtuales

Name: Proko LLC
Description:
Much like a blank piece of paper Proko started off as a blank slate. An empty canvas that could go a million different directions based on the creativity of the artist looking at it. In this case, the artist was Stan Prokopenko and in 2012 he launched the first drawing lesson for Proko. That video would later go on to rack up millions of views and help countless artists around the world with learning to draw the head from any angle. 

But, just like any piece of art, it takes multiple marks on a page to build a masterpiece and Proko is no different. Over the years Proko has continued to work at building up a library of fundamental lessons. These are free lessons that everyone in the art community can watch and learn important skills from. At the same time, we’ve launched premium course content to further enhance the skills of artists and to help fund additional content for the platform. 

Fast forward to 2021 and Proko has now gone from an art blog with some lessons on it to a full fledged marketplace and social media hub to help artists further their education. These new community tools are important to us because they will enable artists to learn from our videos and from each other on the site. At our core we believe that art education should not be limited to your geographic location, the amount of money you have, or the materials you have at your disposal. Creators do what they love, they create and we want to be there alongside your journey as you build up the skills to become the artist that you’ve always imagined yourself becoming.

But enough about us. It’s time to make your first mark on your own blank canvas. Let’s see what you can create!

Initial pathways include: cybersecurity, data science, project management, IT and networking, software development, manufacturing, business skills, leadership and certifications. 

JobReady is the beneficiary of the philanthropy of NEF and its founder and Chairman Dr. Appu Kuttan, whose vision to improve the lives of the underserved through education is matched only by his impressive body of work in realizing that vision in K12 education.  He now seeks to extend NEF’s impact to the workforce through this collaboration with Open4 Learning, a leading ed tech innovation and venture development company. Together, the organizations are joining forces to advance the shared goal of job readiness for all.

Name: Next Technology Leaders (NTL)
Description:
About the Initiative
H.E. Mr. President Abdel Fattah ElSisi launched the technology learning initiative “Next Technology Leaders (NTL)” to build the capacity of young calibers on the latest information, communications, and electronics technologies. The Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (MCIT) leads to executing the NTL Initiative through the Technology Innovation and Entrepreneurship Center of the Information Technology Industry Development Agency. Capacity building is to be orchestrated through the establishment of integral, practical, high-quality learning ecosystem, centered on the learner and supported by a distinctive content prepared through the collaborative effort of top universities and leading companies and is made available on globally leading MOOC platforms. The ecosystem is inclusive of a nationwide network of study group mentors that coaches learners and stimulate the learning process. A network of project reviewers also assesses and improve learning outcomes.

Objectives
Building capacity and certifying young calibers on the recent advances in communication and information technologies.
Increasing the competitiveness of local ICT companies by facilitating their training and capacity building plans.
Supporting creation of job and business opportunities for the youth through wage employment, freelancing, or startup establishment.
Forming nationwide mentoring and review networks in leading technologies to act as a platform for fostering innovation and entrepreneurship.

Name: Gastronomia Periférica
Description:
A Gastronomia Periférica (GP) é um negócio social que busca transformar a vida das pessoas das periferias por meio da gastronomia. Foi criado por Adélia Rodrigues e Edson Leite, que hoje fazem a gestão pedagógica e de novos negócios da GP.

Esse sistema de ensino gastronômico e de negócios surgiu em 2012 como uma oficina e foi transformado em escola em 2018. Durante a pandemia, a GP adotou o sistema EAD.

Atualmente, por meio da Escola de Gastronomia, a GP oferece os cursos Cozinha e Empreendedorismo e Cozinha Profissional, por um sistema totalmente online de ensino a distância (EAD) que possibilita que pessoas de todo o Brasil possam participar.

A formação é inteiramente gratuita, e inclusive, o aluno selecionado para a Escola, pode receber todos os insumos para cozinhar e fazer as disciplinas e até mesmo a internet gratuita para assistir às aulas.

E, vai muito além da cozinha. Combina conhecimento e desenvolvimento técnico e humano para a área gastronômica, conscientizando sobre o aproveitamento total dos alimentos e abrindo as portas da cozinha para a periferia empreender e ser protagonista da própria vida.

Acesso o site e conheça mais sobre o trabalho da GP para transformar realidades por meio da comida e da educação.

Instagram: @gastronomiaperiferica 
Nossos restaurantes escola:  @daquebradagp @viasatelitedf

Name: International Center for Captive Insurance Education (ICCIE)
Description:
The International Center for Captive Insurance Education (ICCIE, pronounced "I See") is the premier provider of captive insurance education and offers the pre-eminent professional designation in captive insurance.

With the significant pattern of expansion in captive insurance companies, research showed that there was a critical lack of education and training in the industry that, if not corrected, could affect its continued growth and professionalism. ICCIE was developed as a response to fulfill this need offering in-depth education, information on current topics and professional designations for individual development in the industry. We offer an Associate in Captive Insurance (ACI) designation, a Certificate in Captive Insurance (CCI), individual courses and webinars. Throughout the years, we have developed an alumni of strong leaders in the industry who also benefit from being a part of the ICCIE network.

Name: Testgears
Description:
At Testgears, we're transforming the landscape of education through innovative, AI-driven solutions. Our mission is to empower educators with powerful tools for creating dynamic, personalized content and assessments, while providing learners with a structured, data-driven, and adaptive platform for success.

Challenges We're Addressing:
---------------------------------
- 87% of educators spend significant time manually preparing materials, taking away from teaching.
- Only 40% of students feel they receive enough personalized feedback.
- Over 70% of students feel overwhelmed by the test preparation process.
- Current platforms often fail to provide a seamless, integrated experience for learning, practice and improvement.

Our Impact:
-------------
* Increase retention rates by 25-60% through personalized learning.
* Save educators countless hours in manual preparation.
* Empower 60% more students with tailored feedback.
* Streamline the learning, test preparation process for learners.

Key Features:
---------------
* Free for Educators
* AI Assistant for Educators and AI Tutor for Learners
* AI-powered question generation (GenQAI) for challenging, on-demand content.
* Seamless migration of existing questions from various formats.
* Powerful search capabilities for efficient content discovery.
* Collaborative workspaces for shared learning environments.
* Comprehensive content management and moderation tools.

Join us in reshaping the future of education and test preparation. With TestGears, success isn't just a goal – it's a guarantee.

Name: ZenVR
Description:
We are ZenVR: a meditation curriculum taught in Virtual Reality. We combine the structure and teachings of real-world classes in the practice of meditation with the immersion of VR. With progressive lessons taught by your own instructor, you can learn the basics of meditation and a variety of mental and physical techniques you can use to bring balance, focus, and calm from virtual reality to your reality.



ZenVR began as a Master's Thesis project at The Georgia Institute of Technology. The ZenVR experience has been empirically proven to successfully guide novice meditators through their journey and affect real-world change, increasing mindfulness and equipping them with tools they can use in their daily lives. Now we're transforming our prototype into a product to distribute across VR platforms and share the benefits of meditation with the world.

That’s why lifelong learning opportunities are more important than ever before. And as digitalization increasingly affects how people access and process knowledge and information, appropriate and up-to-date skill-sets are essential to advancing careers. 

With more than 180 years of entrepreneurial experience, Bertelsmann has a strong commitment to a purpose greater than profit alone. The Bertelsmann Education Group manages a diversified portfolio of learning innovators who share our vision, mindset and values. Together, we are shaping professional learning for the 21st century.

The Technology Enhanced Learning Team is based in Munster Technological University.

Our mission is to create new learning opportunities and to enrich the learning experience of all MTU students by providing world-class technology-enhanced learning solutions and services.

We provide services and training for using tools and technology as a complement to traditional face-to-face delivery. We are also driving the rollout of a number of fully online and blended mode programmes.

Name: Pelesys Learning Systems Inc.
Description:
Pelesys is a global leader and provider of Training and Learning Management Solutions to Airlines, Training Organizations, OEM’s and MRO’s. Our proven track record provides organizations with cost-effective, robust, enterprise-wide training management solutions.

Our training solutions and consultancy services deliver targeted training and e-Learning to meet  specific  organizational objectives and business needs. 

Pelesys’ Training Management and Deployment System (TMDS) encompasses all aspects of training from classroom and simulator scheduling, curriculum / content development and deployment, electronic grading, qualifications, and notifications and reporting. It enables an organization to schedule and deliver their training efficiently while ensuring regulatory compliance, reducing operating costs and introducing automation to existing work processes. 

Our solutions include:

•	Scheduling Management
•	Learning Management System
•	Mobile / Offline Training Deployment Platform
•	Content Management System
•	Exam and Assessment System
•	Qualification Management System
•	Electronic Training Records Management for ATQP, AQP, MPL and Evidence / Competency-Based Management 

Additional products and services include:

•	Custom Courseware Development
•	Flight Training Courseware Library

All Pelesys’ products and training solutions have been  approved for use in accordance with regulatory agencies around the world including EASA, FAA, CAA, CAAC, GCAA, and  Transport Canada.

For over 15 years we have provided dependable, reliable, and consistent training solutions designed to achieve the training objectives of the aviation industry. Our system components provide ease of use, compatibility, access flexibility, and scalability to accommodate unlimited user growth.

Name: MundoElsa - Elsa Punset

Aquí tienes un curso que te va a resultar útil: en el aprenderás las habilidades personales y sociales, hoy más valoradas que nunca en el trabajo: cómo hablar, convencer, preparar un proyecto, mantener una entrevista, resolver problemas o relacionarte bien con tus jefes y compañeras y compañeros de trabajo... es lo que llaman habilidades transferibles. Y se llaman así porque no dependen de una profesión en concreto, sino que podrás utilizarlas en cualquier ámbito.

 Vamos a hacer un viaje práctico a través de 21 rutas, divididas en tres dimensiones:

•      “Yo mismo” es la primera, dimensión, donde aprenderás a gestionarte mejor a ti mismo.
•      En la segunda dimensión, “Los demás”, vas a aprender a mejorar tu forma de relacionarte con los demás. 
•      Y finalmente, en la tercera dimension, “La tarea”, fortalecerás todo lo que necesitas para trabajar bien, o mejor...
 
Encontrarás aquí un curso muy completo, con casi 50videos, textos, ejercicios  y autoevaluaciones que te permitirán reforzar lo que vas a ir aprendiendo.
Y también contarás con enlaces a otros muchos valiosos recursos externos para consultar.

Name: New Century Education Foundation
Description: New Century Education Foundation is a not-for-profit dedicated to researching, developing and distributing unique interventions and support services to help teachers succeed with the deeply at-risk, special needs, and adult learner populations.  The Company provides software that links assessments with highly personalized learning to diagnose and remediate deeply underperforming students and to return them to grade level, then advance them beyond.  Lessons function like a digital tutor, providing feedback at each step of the solution of a math problem or the development of a reading, writing, or language arts skill. Assistant for pronunciation training and accent reduction. Our vision is to enable the 1.5 billion language learners around the globe to speak foreign languages with full confidence and unlock their opportunities in life.

Our flagship product, ELSA Speak, is a personal virtual pronunciation coach. Name: PACT - Professional Association for Computer Training
Description:
Our Mission
The mission of PACT is to provide opportunities for learning, networking, and the exchange of ideas among technical training professionals.

Our Vision
PACT exists to inspire technical training professionals to lead, develop, explore, network, and grow themselves and their organization, in a fun and motivating environment.

The Details
PACT (Professional Association for Computer Training), located in the St. Paul/Minneapolis area of Minnesota, is one of the oldest professional computer training associations in the United States. We meet the second Friday of every month to provide information, discuss options, and discover answers regarding issues and technologies facing today's ever-changing organizations.

PACT is your opportunity to take three hours a month to focus on your professional growth and development. At monthly meetings you will hear your peers and nationally renowned training and support experts speak about issues we all face as trainers and support personnel.

Join us as a guest or consider investing in your personal and professional development by becoming a PACT member. If you are working on your first undergraduate degree or certificate, you are eligible for our student rates.

Name: The Fertilis Academy
Description:
The Fertilis Academy has been founded by Dr. Sarabpreet Singh, with a vision to formalise training in clinical embryology and andrology. 

With his career as a clinical embryologist spanning over 13 years, Dr Sarabpreet felt the need to standardizethe various embryology and andrology procedures, so as to improve the success rates in assisted reproduction.

He has been running hands-on courses for clinical embryology at the Artemis Hospital,Gurgaon, which includes a theoretical overview of Andrology and Embryology techniques, and an extensive hands-on training for micromanipulation (ICSI) and Vitrification.

Through our virtual classroom, we will be providing classes on pertinent topics in the field of clinical embryology and andrology. The mode of teaching will be online classes and video demonstrations, followed by one to one discussion, which is usually lacking in many other teaching programs on the same subject. This will help the students to clarify doubts, if any, as well as develop a grasp on the subject. 

The focus of the training would be to make candidates understand why a particular procedure is done, how it is done, and when it should be done.

Besides online classes& hands-on training for clinical embryology, the Fertilis Academy also provides support for setting up& commissioning of IVF labs as well as validation and troubleshooting of IVF lab procedures.

Name: Life is Tech! USA - Creators of Disney Codeillusion
Description:
Disney Codeillusion is an official collaboration between Life is Tech! and Disney. With over 10 years of experience in the coding education field and educating over 50,000 students via face-to-face and online instruction, Life is Tech! created Disney Codeillusion. The program centers around a proprietary self-propelled learning cycle that helps each student nurture and maximize their unique potential through coding. Disney Codeillusion blends entertainment with education for a truly unmatched learning experience.

Disney Codeillusion is designed and developed by some of the biggest names in the game development and comic book industry.  The former programmer, designer, and director of Sonic the Hedgehog at Sega, as well as CTO at Square Enix for games like Final Fantasy and the award winning Kingdom Hearts, Yoshihisa Hashimoto, has contributed his expertise to the comprehensive coding education program. In addition, Joe Caramagna, writer of Marvel and Disney comics such as DuckTales, Frozen, and Big Hero 6, has also played a vital role in the development of Disney Codeillusion.

To keep people interested and engaged, we created Disney Codeillusion as an interactive coding experience complete with 125 web-based lessons covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript and Processing via Media Art, Game Development and Web Design, as well as an immersive role-playing game that includes 14 beloved original Disney stories, and and incredible offline experience with a tangible, keepsake magic book, complete with postcards, mystery puzzles and more. Don’t worry - Disney Codeillusion is designed to ensure you have a “no-stuck” experience, meaning help - if and when you need it - is always there for you in the form of hints from some of your favorite magical Disney friends.

Name: LearnPedia Australia
Description:
Making you job-ready and employable in the residential design and construction field.
Who are our training programs suitable for:
1.	Migrant, Graduate, & Undergraduate structural engineers who want to finally break through the “No Local Experience” wall. If you’re tired of being overlooked, & you know you’ve got what it takes, you just need the practical skills & real-life knowledge, this is for you.
2.	Engineers already working in the field, maybe as estimators, draftspersons, or in commercial or industrial areas, who are ready to transition into residential design with confidence. If you've been meaning to upskill but are unsure where to start, we've built this for you.
3.	Migrant engineers, recent graduates, & engineers already working in the field who need to earn CPD (Continuing Professional Development) Hours or Points to maintain or work toward their registration in Australia. If you're aiming to become a registered engineer or want to stay compliant & relevant in the industry, our training programs qualify for CPD & give you real, hands-on learning, not just theory, so you're not only ticking a box but actually growing in the process.
Our training programs and 3-month traineeships are Project-Based, which means you won’t be stuck watching endless theory videos. You’ll be designing and drafting real-life residential projects from start to finish, aligned with AS/NZS standards & using industry-relevant tools like Structural Toolkit, SpaceGASS, and AutoCAD.
We don’t throw fragmented bits of information at you and expect you to “figure it out.” That’s not training, that’s guessing. Our training programs are structured, detailed, and step-by-step, equipping you with the real-life skills & knowledge you need to confidently enter the Residential Field. And because they’re fully online, you can join from anywhere in Australia.
Throughout the program, everything you learn is immediately used in the real-life projects you work on as part of the training program.

Education Galaxy is..... curiously fun, amazingly effective, refreshingly affordable.

Name: International Open University-IOU Alumni
Description:
The International Open University (IOU), previously known as the Islamic Online University, was founded by Dr. Abu Ameenah Bilal Philips. He envisioned an institution that would offer online intensive, undergraduate, and graduate courses in Islamic Studies and other disciplines at an affordable cost.

The IOU was initially launched in 2001 from UAE with an offering of a few short courses. After a five year interlude, it was restarted in 2007 from Qatar with a greater offering of completely free short courses.

Alhamdulillah, although we began with 1,500 students in 2007, by the end of 2008, the number of registered students tripled, reaching 4,500. And Alhumdulullah, by the end of 2020, Allah has blessed the IOU with the largest Online student base of over 663,600 students from over 200 different countries.

In 2016, IOU joined the Asian Association of Open Universities (AAOU) and added the Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) and B.Sc. in Information Technology programs to its expanding range of programs. The University received accreditation for its B.Sc. in Islamic Economics, Banking, and Finance program from the International Council of Islamic Finance Educators (ICIFE), and is opening four country chapters of ICIFE in India, Somaliland, the Gambia, and Sierra Leone this year.

Over the years, the IOU has concluded and signed various memorandums of understanding with international universities and higher education institutions, which can be viewed in detail on our Accreditation page.

The IOU is now launching the world’s first tuition-free, online PhD in Islamic Studies. This path-breaking initiative plans to utilize the worldwide presence of the Internet and advanced open source online learning technology to bring low-cost, university level Islamic education and various conventional education from Islamic perspective within reach of anyone on the planet who has access to a computer and the Internet .



Websitehttp://www.internationalopenuniversity.com/

Effizienzsteigernde Werkzeuge wie Textbausteine, vorformulierte Schreiben und Formulare für die professionelle Kommunikation liefern die Text-Experten von koviko gleich mit. Manchmal hilft bereits ein Kommunikationsleitfaden und alles läuft besser. Die ganzheitliche Konzeption und die hohe Qualität aller Lösungen beruhen auf über 20 Jahren Erfahrung als Anbieter für Kommunikationsleistungen. koviko versteht sich hierbei stets als flexibler, innovativer und aufgeschlossener Partner für seine Kunden.

Name: Karen Pryor Clicker Training (KPCT)
Description:
Karen Pryor Clicker Training (KPCT) is a leader in the field of animal training and a recognized world leader in the science and application of marker-based positive reinforcement, or what is often called "clicker training."

The company believes passionately in the power of the clicker training approach to enrich the lives of pet owners, animal professionals, and the animals they live with, work with, or study. Go to our website to learn more about clicker training.

Our unique expertise is in bringing together two fields: How animals behave in their natural environments (the field of ethology) and the scientific principles established about learning (the field of behavior).

Many people think of training as an end point. We don't. Our training technology is a means to the end of a strong bond between people and the animals in their care. In fact, the essence of clicker training is a system of communication that allows people and animals to get as close to talking as possible; some people say it is better than talking because it's so efficient!
