Name: Cyberini
Description:
Depuis 2017, Cyberini s’engage à construire un monde numérique plus sécurisé, en enseignant le code de la route numérique indispensable à tous.

Cyberini est un centre de formation en cybersécurité dont le but est de sensibiliser et d’éduquer les particuliers et les professionnels aux problématiques de la cybersécurité.

La plateforme Cyberini est basée sur un constat inquiétant : de plus en plus de cyberattaques nous visent tous les jours, avec des piratages de plus en plus nombreux et des pertes de données de plus en plus couteuses pour les victimes (en temps, en réputation, en démarches et en argent). Les analyses prospectives portant sur l’informatique nous font penser que la cybercriminalité continuera d’évoluer et de s’adapter aux nouvelles technologies. Cela touchera de plus en plus de personnes, et de façon de plus en plus frappante dans nos vies (maisons connectées, bio informatique, passage au « tout-numérique », etc…).

Le problème ne vient pas de l’antivirus, du système informatique ou encore du manque de mises à jour, mais il vient de l’internaute lui-même, qui constitue la pièce fragile du système s’il n’est pas sensibilisé et préparé.

    À mesure que les développeurs continueront d’inventer de meilleures mesures de sécurité, rendant l’exploitation de failles techniques de plus en plus difficiles, les agresseurs se tourneront davantage vers l’exploitation de l’être humain.
    – Source : L’art de la supercherie de Kevin D. Mitnick (pirate informatique reconverti en consultant sécurité)

Plus d'informations : https://cyberini.com/a-propos/

Name: Elliniki Agogi
Description: Elliniki Agogi is a School teaching the ancient Greek language, History and Philosophy to adults and children since 1994. The method used for 25 consecutive years is based on Antisthenes’ saying “Ἀρχή Σοφίας ἡ τῶν ὀνομάτων ἐπίσκεψις”/“the beginning of education is the examination of names”. Teaching is based on the active role of etymological analysis of words, intended to foster the timelessness of Ancient Greek language. Using the living languages' method, the language is being taught as it is still spoken. This method is used broadly in Europe, where the Ancient Greek language is taught even at an early age, since it is believed that teaching Greek in primary schools helps children's own language. Our online courses include Ancient Greek Language (levels 1,2,3), History (Ancient and Byzantine), Etymology, Drama, Homer and Philosophy.

Looking for a competitive edge in the market by better enabling your sales organization and equipping your channel partners? 

This is the kind of work we love and love to do well.

We choose to only work with organizations whose purpose in the world aligns to what's important to us. (We're privately held with no debt and plenty of work in the pipeline, so we get to be selective.)

We know many organizations don't have the resources to engage partners, like us. So we share a lot of our tools, resources, and insights for free. Why? We have an abundance mindset. There is more project work "out there" than we could ever dream of. The more organizations that make learning meaningful and relevant, the better off we are a society. Thanks!

Name: The Socratic Experience
Description:
Something’s off with traditional schools—you’re right to feel it. 

After 35 years in public, private, and charter classrooms, we saw the same cracks: bright kids bored, learning-difference students ignored, and curious thinkers buried under busywork. So we stopped patching the system and built a new one.

The Socratic Experience is the only high-touch virtual school that equips creative, entrepreneurial, curious students through Socratic dialogue, 1:1 mentoring, and real-world projects—fueling both joy and achievement.

Our Three Core Principles

1/ Credentials That Matter. Balance innovation with accreditation. Your child will ace the SAT and graduate with real-world accolades—national sports titles, published articles, or student-led ventures.

2 Supportive Community. Small-group seminars, clubs, and collaborative projects fuel confidence, empathy, and lasting friendships—no bullies, no isolation.

3. Agency-Driven Learning. When students choose their projects and pace—from 200,000-word novels to six-figure startups—boredom vanishes and passion thrives.

Who Thrives Here 
Families seeking an adaptive, supportive alternative for students who are anxious, gifted, skeptical, or anywhere in between—whether on a small-town ranch or in a cosmopolitan area. Our model adapts to each child, not the other way around.

Credibility You Can Trust

– Graduates of our model have gone on to Harvard, McGill, Stanford, UT-Austin, and more.

– Most humanities guides trained at St. John’s College; STEM, art, and tech guides hold advanced degrees and domain expertise.

– TSE students have written 200,000-word novels, raised over $1 million in venture capital, and hit six-figure earnings before graduation.

Name: Texas Digital Learning Association (TxDLA)
Description:
TxDLA is the leading Texas membership association for digital learning professionals. Our members represent public and private education institutions at all levels as well as corporate training professionals and digital learning equipment and content providers. All of our members have a strong interest in keeping abreast of the ideas, technologies, and content that will help them develop and maintain leading-edge digital learning programs and products. 

The impetus for forming the Association, as our late Founding President, Mr. Don Foshee of Innovative Interactions, Inc. observed, was to "provide an accessible clearinghouse of useful information that is non-biased, timely, and transcends the special interests that provide only fragmented pieces of the big picture." 

 Key leaders in Texas from primary and secondary public schools, community colleges, higher education institutions, state government, major corporations, the military, and the telecommunications industry worked towards formation of the TxDLA, which was established in 1996 as a not-for-profit professional association. 

 TxDLA members choose to represent their organization as an association of "digital learning" professionals in order to invite broad participation in the networking and exchange of information demanded by our mission. We use the broad term "digital learning" to encompass all of the persons and tools employed today in bringing about effective digital learning. Digital learning is recognized as taking place whenever a learner is using digital resources for the bulk of their learning.

Name: Centre 4 Posh
Description:
PREVENTION – REDRESSAL – COMPLIANCE

Centre 4 Posh is designed after carefully analyzing key factors at play in any organization. A technology solution that enables transparency in processes, compliance and redressal.

We at Centre 4 POSH (C4P) have spent years of research into developing a holistic and effective solution to curb instances of sexual harassment amongst organizations today. Growing instances of sexual harassment have caused organizations loss of reputation impacting their business and the culture of the organization in the long run. The Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (Prevention, Prohibition and Redressal) Act, 2013 outlines measures that organizations need to adhere to at any point in time. However, compliance to the law has not really impacted the prevention of such cases within any organization. Most initiatives taken are towards compliance by book rather than prevention of sexual harassment.

We believe that the issue lies in the culture of any organization. Centre for POSH works on the culture of any organization. A change in the culture is gradual and over a period of time. The solution offers a plethora of options which enables sensitization regarding “Sexual Harassment” besides facilitating an unbiased redressal. It is developed to address concerns of not only the organization but also employees. Implementing this solution in an organization will be viewed as a great initiative by its employees, therefore, they will be more open to adaptation while also restoring or enhancing their trust in their management.

Our Vision: Create a holistic and balanced solution that addresses critical concerns of both management and employees. It not only covers the mandatory compliances an organization needs to adhere to by the law but also ensures real prevention at the grass root level instead of just focusing on the redressal.

Description:
Our motivation…
Companies spend approximately $100 billion on training each year, yet studies show that 70% of these dollars create no lasting impact. The LMS has largely become an instrument for activity tracking and documents storage but does little to change behavior.

What we believe…
Athlete, musician, sales rep, CEO…no one becomes great without practice. 

What is Rehearsal...
Rehearsal is a video-based practice and coaching platform used to develop sales, communication, and other soft skills through an adaptive learning experience. It provides your team a safe place to practice, receive coaching and feedback, and collaborate with others so they can perform when it matters. Rehearsal allows you to train at scale across competency levels anytime, anywhere, and on any device.

 Clases dinámicas y enfocadas al objetivo.
Nada de teoría infumable, pdfs interminables y tampoco clases monótonas. Cada sesión está diseñada para que avances con estrategia, confianza y sobre todo, consigas resultados reales.

 Contarás con comunicación directa con tu equipo de profesores, atención personalizada y seguimiento continuo. En Ready GO Training no eres un número más: tu aprobado es nuestra mayor satisfacción de que hemos cumplido con nuestro objetivo.

 Convertimos sueños en realidad con tu aprobado.
Porque aprobar un examen de inglés no es solo obtener un título: es el paso que te acerca a tu plaza, tu promoción o tu objetivo profesional.

 Si formas parte de la Guardia Civil, Policía, Ejército o te estás preparando para cualquier oposición, estudiando un grado universitario o un máster, que requiera un título oficial de inglés…

 Este es tu sitio. Método probado, trato humano y resultados reales.

Name: Maytree School
Description:
Back in 2019, when we started Maytree School of Entrepreneurship, we had thousands of questions, just like every entrepreneur in the world at the beginning of their journey.
However, there was one thing that was crystal clear to me and my team: the traditional business education model doesn't make sense anymore. It's obsolete.
That's why our mission, which has been our ‘north star’ since the very beginning, is democratizing business education and helping thousands of students & professionals to achieve their goals without having to invest the time and money required for a typical MBA, wherever they may be in the world.
By creating such a disruptive proposition we wanted to challenge the status quo and break with all those pre-established dogmas:
Why does top business education have to be limited to the exclusive few? Why in the world does it have to be so expensive?
Why do you have to learn from an average professor when technology allows you to learn from the very best in the world from your smartphone?
Why do you have to spend thousands of hours learning theory instead of enjoying a much more efficient, practical, and up-to-date approach?
Since then, thousands of students & professionals from 20+ countries have joined the program because they also believe that education has to change.

Most companies believe in their values. We believe in the core. It’s at the very center of who we are which dictates what we do.

Name: Planet Bee Foundation
Description:
OUR MISSION

Planet Bee Foundation is on a mission to change the world -- one bee and one student at a time!

We are dedicated to creating a green-minded generation by inspiring environmental stewardship through the power of individual action and the teaching lens of the struggling bee. 

We teach STEM lessons  virually and in-person in schools and corporation with schools to build long lasting care of the bees and the environment.

OUR VISION

Planet Bee Foundation is dedicated to creating environmental stewards of all ages, who will go on to have a positive impact on our interconnected world.

We understand that ethics and values are formed early in life, and therefore promote holistic approaches to education which include understanding the complexities of the natural world and the effect humans have on the Earth. We dream of an eco literate society with a higher concern for the greater good. When empathy and emotional intelligence are fostered and connections are drawn, it is more likely that positive actions will be taken. We hope our fellow educators around the world will work with us to create a more sustainable future.

We envision a world in which all people feel empowered to take action for their planet, regardless of, race, gender, class or location. Through our work, students of all ages will develop a love for our planet and learn the importance of individual action in global movements, and will become more equipped to tackle environmental problems in the future.

Name: Alebat
Description:
En Alebat Education nos implicamos a fondo para conseguir mejorar el rendimiento de las personas a través de la formación y el desarrollo de nuevas habilidades mediante cursos y masters, online y presenciales, que cuenten con los mejores expertos del sector de la Salud. Creemos en una educación a distancia de calidad como instrumento para alcanzar el máximo rendimiento.

En todos nuestros cursos y masters online, hemos apostado por desarrollar un modelo que despierte el carácter activo y consciente del estudiante en el proceso de construcción del conocimiento. Así, pretendemos acercarnos al alumno implantando en todos nuestros cursos y masters el modelo de Nueva Universidad, de forma que promovamos su participación online e implicación activa en su propio proceso de desarrollo de competencias.

Para ello contamos con Laab2, una plataforma virtual con la que podrás contar en toda nuestra oferta de cursos y masters a distancia, que dispone de la más avanzada tecnología educativa online del mercado. Laab2 ofrece un entorno online intuitivo, dinámico y multiplataforma, fácilmente navegable que te permitirá aprender a distancia de forma rápida, eficaz y entretenida.

Aunque en todos nuestros cursos y masters online facultamos de amplia libertad al profesorado en la impartición de las materias docentes, deseamos que su actividad se dirija a los fines metodológicos que son propios de nuestros cursos. En especial, otorgamos especial importancia a los elementos de comunicación online con el alumno, que favorecen el trato cercano y amable de nuestros cursos y masters a distancia, de forma que se fomente la participación de aquél y se facilite la consecución de los objetivos de su desarrollo competencial. Estamos convencidos de que todos estos elementos hacen que nuestros cursos y masters nos llevan a formar expertos de calidad, que destacan por sus habilidades y conocimientos en el sector de la Odontología, la Oftalmología, la Diabetes y otras áreas de la Salud.

Name: The Power Of Preparedness
Description:
The Power of Preparedness (TPOP) provides enterprise-wide online training for workplace violence prevention, tailored to specific industries like retail, food retail, food service, healthcare, education, manufacturing, and more.

Our training is developed by experts and industry members and teaches critical skills such as:

> Recognizing Behavioral Indicators of Violence
> Situational Awareness
> Verbal De-escalation
> Active Shooter Preparedness using Run, Hide, Fight, barricading, and improvised weaponry
> Response to Injury
> Shoplifting Prevention
> Safe Interactions With Homeless
> Managing Robberies
... and more.

WHY TPOP?
Unlike forgettable Powerpoints or boring play-only videos on the market, TPOP provides a true, 21st century eLearning platform, dramatically increasing knowledge understanding and retention. Each lesson consists of a short video lesson with narration and engaging situations and graphics, followed by a short quiz.

WHO USES TPOP TRAINING?
We’re proud to call these brands our customers and partners in mitigating workplace violence risk: H&M, White Castle, Chick-fil-A, American Red Cross, Dave & Buster’s, Wakefern Foods, Big Y Foods, Ford Direct (subsidiary of Ford Motor), and many more.

EFFICIENT DELIVERY
Reach your entire workforce or population instantly - no matter where they are. Move beyond the limitations of stand-up training or workshops. 100% mobile and ADA-compliant. Flawless playback on any internet-connected device.

SUPERIOR CONTENT
Thoroughly interesting and engaging content maximizes retention and the knowledge of what to do in an emergency. Taught by the industry’s leading subject matter experts from law enforcement, FBI, DHS, SWAT paramedics, behavioral scientists, and armed forces. The TPOP team possesses over 200 years of combined expertise.

FLEXIBLE CUSTOMIZATION
Choose the modules that best fit your learning objectives. Simple and affordably customized to promote your brand and location.

Name: LinguaTV GmbH
Description:
Language Training that works and motivates! Use LinguaTV´s  comprehensive range of language courses for improving your employees' and students' communication skills in English, Business English, French, Spanish, Italian and German as a foreign language. 

The modular training concept from LinguaTV consists of: 
- A modern learning platform with video-based self-study courses, interactive exercises and an intelligent competence management 
- Online tutoring and classroom teaching by experienced trainers (Blended Learning). 

Exceptionally successful combination: The LinguaTV team has combined proven learning methods with attractive learning content and modern technology – with positive effects on motivation and learner success. The focus of the self-study phases of the training videos is to show how native speakers use the language in authentic communication situations. So you learn through realistic dialogue all the relevant vocabulary alongside accurate pronunciation. A video portrays the special cultural characteristics of communication and explains complicated issues such as grammar in a simpler way. In addition, an audience responds better to perceptual senses and a film leaves a stronger impression than text-based learning material. 

Transparent Learning Progress: LinguaTV´s unique learning management system combines a personal learning success control and a recommendation engine, that shows to each user his individual learning progress and helps the learner to target and develop those skills which are specific to his individual needs. This information could be accessible also to HR managers and language trainers in order to make the whole self-study phase more transparent to them. Educational institutions and trainers could use the strengths and weaknesses profiles in order to adapt their teaching to the needs of the learners. 

For more information please visit: https://www.linguatv.com/contact.html

For example, if a nurse or Resident or attending is evaluating a patient with a disease, they can immediately watch, listen or read a five minute summary of the disease or connect to national or local hospital guidelines and protocols. Furthermore, conditions can portal into other partner hospitals to see what information they may have on the subject and how their guidelines may approach work up and treatment of the disease. 

GlobalCastMD converts CME content into point of care learning which can also be disseminated globally for individual or institutional marketing.

Name: Wolsey Hall Oxford
Description:
Wolsey Hall Oxford provides structured online courses for Primary, Lower Secondary, IGCSE and A Level. 

Using our online learning platform and our outstanding Tutor team, we deliver courses to students in the UK and in over 125 countries. Our multi-media method of learning offers ultimate flexibility as students study in their own time and at their own pace.

Founded in 1894, we’re the world’s most experienced homeschooling provider. We’re proud to say that one of our students was Nelson Mandela, who studied for his London University law degree with Wolsey Hall whilst in Robben Island jail – a true inspiration to home learners everywhere!

The Wolsey Hall learning system is a carefully balanced mix of online and offline study which we have developed based on our many years’ experience of delivering courses. You can study from anywhere in the world and your child will be supported by a Student Progress Manager throughout. They are always on hand to answer your questions, give advice and help to keep your child’s studies on track. 

Our aim is to provide the best possible online learning experience for our students worldwide. We believe that learning should be enjoyed, and so we design our courses to be as engaging as possible, without any loss of academic rigour.

Description:
Ekal Shiksha is an Ed-tech company which provides one on one individual online classes. It is an initiative that aims to revolutionize the standard teaching and learning methods. We believe that each student has his or her personal learning speed, method, and curriculum which is very important for a teacher to understand and personalize their teaching methods according to the students, not vice versa. This platform is specially built for those who have immense potential but are never focused on in group classes, the growth of such students is our motto. 

We have been in the teaching industry for the past four years, catering to more than 1000s of students to date. We are unique in a manner that we not only provide tuitions but also we make sure that the performance of each student is tracked through our LMS system and they get to check their clarity of concepts by the MCQs provided after each concept is taught. We have adopted the EAD approach for the better learning, understanding, and self-assessing of students. We are in a way parent-friendly and make sure that the parents are kept in the loop for each activity of the student and the teacher. 

We have accommodated the best of talented teachers from all across India for students who believe in learning beyond a classroom. We are a one-stop solution for all those parents who worry about their kid not being focused enough in group classes, for those who believe that their child can do far better if focused a little more, for those who worry for their kid’s safety when they are at work and their child alone with a teacher at home, for those who worry sending their child to coaching at odd hours and most of all for those who not only believe in passing but in learning.

Name: Leader Academy
Description:
НАШАТА МИСИЯ:
Ние създаваме среда за растеж, в която младежите се чувстват приети, развиват талантите си и се реализират кариерно, превръщайки се в бъдещите лидери, които са в основата на един по-устойчив свят.

 НАШЕТО "ЗАЩО":
𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐀𝐜𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐲 е плод на 10-годишна мечта. Основателите ѝ вярват, че образованието е в основата на развитието и растежа, както на личностно, така и на бизнес ниво. Лидер не е титла – лидер може да е всеки, който е готов да поеме отговорност за действията си, разгръща потенциала си и допринася. 

Ние вярваме, че колкото повече младежи правят това, което обичат, в компаниите, в които работят или по пътя на предприемачеството – толкова повече те ще се изградят като бъдещите лидери, които ще допринасят с опита и познанията си на идните поколения. 

Създадохме 𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 за академично и кариерно ориентиране на база талантите и силните страни на личността. През годините се превърна в цялостно преживяване с фокус личностно, академично и кариерно развитие.

𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐂𝐚𝐦𝐩 е предназначен за младежи между 16 и 29 годишна възраст в следните ключови етапа от развитието им – завършване на средно и висше образование, начало на кариерния им път и преквалификация.

𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐂𝐚𝐦𝐩 се провежда от 2016 година, а 𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝐏𝐮𝐥𝐥 е програма, която започнахме 2021, като естествено продължение и надграждане. Тя свързва младежи с потенциални работодатели за дългосрочно развитие. 

Разгледайте обявените стажантски позиции тук: https://www.leaderacademy.bg/internship/

Ако Вие сте работодател, който търси правилните хора или сте в процес на търсене на мечтаната позиция, пишете ни на: info@leader.education.

Name: Magndon
Description:
Daniel iniciou sua carreira na área de tecnologia em 2008, atuando como técnico de computadores, assistente de TI, programador, analista e consultor de sistemas. Após dez anos nesse ramo, decidiu buscar novos desafios e ingressou no mercado como instrutor de inglês.

Sua experiência em projetos internacionais de TI e o contato frequente com fornecedores e clientes estrangeiros, como Qlik, Lufthansa e RackSpace, contribuíram significativamente para o desenvolvimento de aulas personalizadas com foco em conversação. Name: Sense Education
Description:
Sense Education is the world’s first artificial intelligence solution for finding patterns and providing personalized feedback in student submissions,

Sense allows scalable and personalized education to go hand-in-hand. Sense makes open-ended assignments a scalable alternative to multiple choice questions for Computer Science and other STEM courses with high enrollment. 

Sense is a hybrid human-machine intelligence solution that helps educators evaluate and provide feedback on open-ended assignments more efficiently, as well as provide students with adaptive learning experiences, by using artificial intelligence.
	
Sense does this in two steps. First, algorithms detect patterns from students’ submissions and break answers down into the natural five 5 to 10-solution types (or clusters) they usually break into. Second, the user, the educator, evaluates and provides feedback to each solution type, rather than to each individual submission.
	
Sense is the first product in the market that allows for the proper use of open-ended assignments in large scale courses by contributing to the scaling and the personalization of education simultaneously. It also increases the quality and detail in personalized feedback and offers adaptive learning experiences. Sense drastically reduces grading time, provides greater accuracy and equity in grading, and allows for more personalized feedback to students.

Name: Lincoln Method
Description:
Lincoln School is a progressive way of learning, that focuses on addressing a learner’s weak areas. The learning happens by supplementing what has been taught in the classroom. For the areas where the learner is weak, their concepts are further clarified by showing them a playlist of videos that present a variety of viewpoints. As a result, the learner receives a holistic view of the concepts, and has a better grasp of the overall subject.

Lincoln Method’s secret sauce is its ability to identify areas of weakness for each individual learner. Once the weak areas are known, then correcting any misconceptions becomes relatively easy.

Name: Apto Global
Description:
Every year 2.8 billion humans search for the ideal combination of tools and services to help them “adapt to life anywhere.” This ever-growing number of international students, employees, virtual explorers, lifestyle travelers and others, seek to more deeply connect and succeed academically, socially and professionally. To do so, they must overcome  logistical, language and cultural barriers.

Apto is the only app-based culture language and travel community on the market today that offers trusted resources and services to specifically address each user’s personalized needs and evolving interests throughout each stage of their journey.

Apto does this by using matching algorithms and providing robust in-app storytelling tools where community members can share their authentic experiences through videos, groups, and direct one-on-one interactions.

This content and information sharing is how each community member pays it forward to the next generation. The app promotes participation in a meaningful circle of giving, receiving and sharing needed insights and resources to thrive across cultures and geographies. 

This applies to community members who interact virtually, are planning or are in the midst of travel or relocation. The more each member engages and transacts, the more each is rewarded within Apto’s community-driven platform with purpose.

Together, the Apto community is learning to “speak human.” Fluently.

Our History: 
Between the years of 2013 and 2019, Apto Global evolved from a service-based business helping international expats inbound to the United States, to a B2B technology learning platform helping 70+ global locations.. In late 2019,  it began a direct to consumer pivot.

In mid 2021, Apto re-branded and restructured to become the global app-based community that it is today, testing its early access versions on Google Play and iOS for its first major launch in 2022.

Hourly workers are the backbone of your business, yet their development is often neglected. Educology changes that.

Too often, workplace training for hourly workers focuses only on technical tasks and compliance. This leaves blue-collar employees without growth in the life skills that drive engagement, well-being, and productivity. Disengagement, burnout, and turnover follow when workers feel stuck and unsupported.


Educology fills that gap. We deliver short, interactive courses on vital life skills – like effective communication, emotional intelligence, handling difficult customers, and managing stress. When employees develop these skills, they feel more confident, resilient, and capable.


Our platform meets workers where they are:

Bite-sized lessons (5–7 minutes)

Mobile-friendly access, anytime, anywhere

Multilingual content (English, Spanish, etc.)

Easy-to-manage LMS for HR and L&D leaders


Over 15,000 frontline employees across 50 companies have grown with Educology. 40+ expert creators from diverse industries build our content. Clients consistently report lower turnover, higher morale, and stronger performance.


We’ve been recognized by eMerge Americas and featured by Forbes as one of the top startups in the region.


If you’re building the future of your frontline, we’re ready to help.

The service includes advice and assistance with establishing and operating:

(i) a small business;

(i) a gig service; or

(ii) a monetised hobby/craft.

We are a disability-led and guided national not-for-profit disability service.

The service includes a video meeting with friendly mentors, a resource library, a 'Ask the Crowd' discussion forum, webinars and activities.

Name: Purple Maiʻa Foundation
Description:
Purple Maiʻa Foundation is a 501(c)(3) technology education nonprofit. We teach coding and computer science through after-school or elective classes to Native Hawaiian students, low-income youth, and others who are underrepresented in tech. 

As we increase access to tech education and increase students’ earning potential, we also ground students to tech education that their ancestors were indigenous innovators who used their skills and perspective to serve their communities and lands.

We support Hawaiian values in contemporary tech culture, and we think that by learning to innovate as indigenous technologies, we can be part of a global shift toward growing more sustainable and just societies.

Realizado desde 2004, o programa já formou mais de 3000 metrologistas de mais de 250 empresas e instituições, no Brasil, Argentina, Inglaterra, México e Portugal.

Our engaging curriculum meets both State and National Standards utilizing Edmentum , and additional supplemental materials to promote critical thinking and develop lifelong learners.  A team of experienced educators works with each student to develop a personalized learning plan designed to meet individual pace and needs.   For more information, please contact us at 800-297-2119 or email us at info@myvirtualacademy.com.

Name: Sino Educational Exchange
Description:
Sino-Exchange
中外合作交流


Mission  |  使命

To foster cultural and educational advancements that will promote global citizenship and cultural awareness while also promoting pride in the Chinese national identity for both Chinese and expatriates living in China and abroad.

促进文化和教育的进步，提升全球公民和文化意识，同时促进居住在国内外的中国人和外籍人士对中国民族认同的自豪感。


Objectives   |   目标

To work with liaisons from the Communist Party of China (CPC) and the Chinese Ministry of Education (MoE) to promote Chinese “moral education”.
与中国共产党（CPC）和中国教育部（MoE）合作促进中国的“德育”教育。

To provide international educators’ access to quality educational materials that are aligned with the central government’s longterm strategic goals for social and economic development.
为国际教育工作者提供符合中央政府社会和经济发展长期战略目标的优质教育材料。

To work towards eliminating educational barriers that are caused by social and economic disparities.
努力消除由社会和经济差距造成的教育障碍。

Name: Hardware Ninja
Description:
Hey fellow Engineers,

We are the team at Hardware Ninja! Our goal is to help you prepare for your Hardware related technical interviews. This applies to Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Analog Design, Digital Design, etc.

We are a team of experienced engineers who actively interview with tech companies. It doesn't matter whether they are small start-ups or tech giants, we actively interview with all of them to bring you the topics that are being asked by professionals.

Disclaimer: It is important to stress that we sign a lot of confidentiality agreements when we interview for tech giants. These agreements prohibit us from sharing the exact wording of the interview question. However, we focus on delivering you the topics instead of the original question itself as we see no value in that and companies would like to protect that.

Name: AAS Vidyalaya
Description: Instead of trying to bring the children to the school, AAS will take the school to the children. The idea is to create a school FOR the people & BY the people by creating a VIRTUAL SCHOOL (AAS stands for Anytime Anywhere School) which operates exactly like a regular school having time-tables, subject periods in which respective subject teachers would give lectures during their periods, class teachers who would monitor the progress of the children and in case required would reach out to subject teachers if the child needs help on a particular subject and even reaching out to the Parents if the child is not taking the school seriously. Educated housewives who want to do something and retired teachers would be the source for our teacher pool. There would even be holidays like a regular school. There will be regular assessments, even half yearly and final exams and even recognized certifications. The students, teachers & Parents connect and interact with each other through social network. The parents become the school administrators in their respective towns. There would even be offline activities like sports day and school trips to bring in bonding and personality development. We will follow regular CBSE English Medium curriculum.

Name: WEinnovators.club
Description:
As we are all affected by the SARS-CoV2 pandemic, we seek positive plans for the world after the lockdown. As we expect it to be very different from the world we used to know, we look at how innovation shaped it so far and how can it respond to the crisis at hand. 
That is why we came up with the project. We invited some of the greatest contemporary innovators to learn about their experience and current work.  Our guests were involved in some of the most innovative projects and companies. Their perspectives include academic, business and technological backgrounds. They will share their insights on different aspects of innovation as well as their visions of the future.   
The Greatest Contemporary Innovators Project is carried out by the Industrial Development Agency JSC, as a part of its mission of promote and foster innovation. It is mainly dedicated to entrepreneurs, engineers, students and start-ups in Poland as well as other Central Eastern European countries. We aim to host two webinars per week – one on Wednesday and one on Saturday, nevertheless the schedule depend on our guests’ limited availability and can be subject to change. 
Each webinar will be hosted by an expert from Poland, who will moderate the Q&A session at the end. The video conference will be streamed live on YouTube and LinkedIn. The recording of each webinar will be posted on www.weinnovators.club.

Description:
CapSource is an education technology company focused on helping schools build and scale their immersive, transformative project-based experiential learning programs that integrate real companies, their business leaders, and their challenges directly into the education process for their students.

Our approach is to provide schools with freemium software (CONNECT) and added services (Company Sourcing, Project Design, and Faculty Training) so they can build/maintain relationships with companies and design project-based collaborations that align course teaching goals with company goals so that everyone wins.

Our mission is to better prepare students for the professional work environment before they graduate. We believe students need more opportunities to explore careers, business models, products, and positions before beginning their careers, which is really only possible with industry collaboration. 

We are confident that students learn best, and can accomplish most, when they're placed into a real business context with real projects, and real stakeholders. Our hands-on learning collaborations are low maintenance for companies, while being a very meaningful learning experience for young business professionals.

Description:
Na Academia da Gestão, meu compromisso é ajudar profissionais determinados a alcançarem cargos mais altos, melhores salários e maior reconhecimento, promovendo um crescimento sólido e sustentável em suas carreiras.

Combinamos mentorias individuais e em grupo, focando tanto no seu posicionamento interno — para crescer dentro da organização onde atua — quanto no seu posicionamento no mercado, com ênfase especial na presença estratégica no LinkedIn.

Nosso programa começa com um diagnóstico completo de carreira, que inclui:
 Autoavaliação profissional
 Ferramentas de análise comportamental
 Estudo de mercado e alinhamento com seu perfil e objetivos

Ao longo da mentoria, você aprenderá a:
 Fortalecer sua autoconfiança e clareza de objetivos profissionais
 Estruturar um plano de carreira estratégico, com metas de curto e longo prazo
 Desenvolver habilidades comportamentais e gerenciais, essenciais para cargos de liderança
 Comunicar suas entregas com impacto, apresentando resultados de forma estratégica
 Construir autoridade interna, sendo percebido como referência pela liderança
 Aumentar sua visibilidade no LinkedIn, usando conteúdo, networking e branding pessoal

Além disso, vamos trabalhar estratégias práticas de posicionamento e promoção dos seus resultados, como:

 Como se tornar visível sem parecer arrogante
 Técnicas para apresentar resultados a líderes de forma objetiva e estratégica
 Como conduzir conversas sobre promoção com confiança e preparo
 Formas de ser lembrado(a) nas decisões importantes da empresa
 Como transformar experiências em valor percebido, tanto internamente quanto no mercado

Seja você um profissional buscando crescimento dentro da empresa, um especialista em busca de valorização ou alguém se preparando para atuar como consultor, a Academia da Gestão foi desenhada para impulsionar sua trajetória com propósito, método e consistência.

Description:

We're the first of our kind in Australia. We deliver educational programmes for the public, private and non-profit sectors. Anywhere there are young women who could benefit from financial education - we will find a way to get to them. We believe that every woman deserves the freedom to make her own decisions, and the knowledge to make the best decisions for her wellbeing.

So we work to empower every single woman to:
- Actively design her pathway to Freedom,
- Set her Freedom goals, &
- Have the knowledge to achieve those goals.

Social impact and community are in our DNA. We employ women who are on their journey to independence, we reinvest profits from our corporate programs into free community programs, and we partner with women-owned businesses to boost fellow women entrepreneurs.

Join our journey to independence on:
Twitter - @MoneyGirlAU
Facebook - MoneyGirlAU

Name: how.fm
Description:
Imagine if you put onboarding and training your employees on autopilot & suddenly 30% of your time is freed up - it is now possible with how.fm.

You can provide your manual workers with a digital trainer for all work-related procedures and drastically reduce the time you spent onboarding and training.

What using our digital coach means for your managers and your business:
•Save time: the manager can be freed up from onboarding and training.
•Invest working hours well: they can use the time saved on other important tasks like growing the business.
•Save money: more productivity, fewer mistakes, empowered employees and freed up time results in significantly reduced costs.
•Ignite your business: there is space to think and have better ideas for growth.
About the how-to content:
•Ownership: it is all yours and you only share it with the users you want to.
•Immediately updated: if you want to create a new standard operating procedure or change one of the existing ones, you can do it directly in your private dashboard and it is automatically, and immediately, updated for all users.
•Multi-language: we support most languages and if you need one we don't yet have, just ask us!
•Support materials: images, videos, and GIFs can be uploaded directly.
•Voice-guided interface: we take care of making it immediately interactive and hands-free for your employees to use straight away.

Our users report that the team is much happier. Everyone is more focused because they don't have to worry about the how-to, they can totally rely on how.fm supporting them.
And for those with a lot of fluctuation, it is great for newbies as well! They ask a lot of questions to the app - that before they never dared to ask more senior employees or managers - so they get up to speed much faster.

We love seeing our customers' reactions when they use how.fm for the first time. Let us know if you want to see how it works!

Name: TAEI Academy | Rewiring Education with Values, Integrity & the Soul Operating Procedure
Description:
TAEI (The Advancement of Empathy and Integrity) Academy is a values-based education and ethics initiative designed to rebuild the emotional, moral, and psychological foundations of how we teach, lead, and now, how we code.

In a world dominated by automation, polarization, and disconnection, TAEI is a counterforce: a framework that centers empathy, truth, peace, right conduct, and nonviolence as non-negotiable core values in both human development and human-aligned technology.

Founded by Dr. Milan LaBrey, TAEI began as a values-based, emotional intelligence curriculum for children and educators. It has since expanded into a global initiative addressing the ethical, emotional, and societal gaps emerging in the age of AI.

TAEI Academy works across sectors to:

1. Integrate emotional intelligence into educational and leadership systems

2 Equip children, educators, and developers with moral reasoning tools

3. Offer consulting, workshops, and certification programs grounded in human-centered ethics

4. Bridge the divide between psychology, technology, and social responsibility

TAEI doesn’t just teach values. It embeds them in systems—before it’s too late.

Name: Comunicazione Affettiva
Description:
Le recenti acquisizioni scientifiche sostengono che la sintonia e il senso di connessione stanno alla base di una vita piena e soddisfacente: noi crediamo, quindi, che sia fondamentale, per il benessere e la felicità, avere buone relazioni con gli altri e con se stessi.
Il problema è che nel corso della nostra vita, soprattutto nel periodo iniziale dell’infanzia, sperimentiamo delusioni, conflitti, ferite e molte altre forme di difficoltà nelle relazioni significative. La sofferenza così accumulata genera il senso di separazione e la sfiducia nei rapporti affettivi.
Da questo nasce il nostro progetto, per dare la possibilità a tutti di avere le conoscenze e gli strumenti per migliorare le proprie relazioni e vivere con un senso di connessione. Quando c’è sintonia e senso di connessione, la relazione genera felicità. Comunicazione Affettiva nasce, quindi per recuperare il valore delle relazioni significative e migliorarne la qualità. Desideriamo individui felici, coppie felici, famiglie felici, comunità felici.

attention devoted to making the activities appropriate for the children's age.

Name: Bibliotecom
Description:
Descubre el programa que acelera tu crecimiento personal y profesional.

Mantenerse en un aprendizaje constante es una de las "softskills" más demandadas según los estudios de RRHH más recientes. En un contexto de cambio constante, el éxito profesional está vinculado a la capacidad de mantener el "lifelong learning", término más buscado en Google 2019 en cuanto a formación se refiere.

Actualmente un aprendizaje óptimo debe:

- Ser rápido: el ritmo de vida actual no permite disponer de mucho tiempo
- Práctico: hemos pasado años estudiando herramientas que no usamos jamás.
- Recordable: de todo lo que vemos en Internet, en 12 meses apenas recordaremos menos del 1%.
- Multidisciplinar: el conocimiento de múltiples campos y temáticas te permitirá aprovechar lo mejor de cada una para llevar tu vida a un nivel superior.

¿Qué hay en BIBLIOTECOM para ti?

- Aprendizaje acelerado: aprende las ideas principales de libros de impacto en minutos

- Mentores: el propio escritor del libro te presenta y explica las ideas de libro. Cada escritor y libro ha sido seleccionado individualmente

- Conceptos útiles: conceptos claros y directos para aplicar inmediatamente

- Temáticas de utilidad: aprende sólo de conceptos útiles para tu vida personal y profesional --> gestión de emociones, psicología, mindfulness, creación de hábitos para el éxito, salud física y mental, productividad, PNL, negociación...

- Webinars en los que el experto te contará nuevos conceptos/aprendizajes
En Bibliotecom vas a acceder al resultado de años de estudio y desarrollo para aprender los conceptos más importantes en minutos.

¿Cómo funciona?

Accede a todo el contenido, organizado por temáticas y escritores, en el que verás y escucharás al escritor presentarte y explicarte las ideas y aprendizajes principales de sus propios libros. En formato vídeo, audio y ejercicios en PDF.

Aprende en minutos lo que te llevaría horas.

Name: Polis
Description:
Only 40% of higher ed students complete their degrees within 6 years, and research shows human connection in 1:1 student-advisor meetings is the antidote. But administrative bureaucracy erodes the time and space advisers need to meaningfully meet with students.

Polis is working to change this. With AI expertise and 15+ years of experience in higher ed, we help community colleges, universities, and institutions in higher education:

1) Make meetings more meaningful with:
- FERPA-compliant summaries and key action items
- Personalized follow-up email drafting
- Maintaining rigorous SOC-2 data security and privacy standards (with no conversation recordings)
 
2) Streamline workflows to:
- Reduce post-meeting administrative time by 75%
- Improve student data accuracy by 90%
- Seamlessly integrate with existing CRMs and SISs
To date, Polis is helping institutions to improve student persistence rates by up to 15%, and we’re just getting started. 

Learn more at https://polis.ac.

Name: Estacio EAD Pato Branco
Description:
Somos uma das maiores organizações privadas no setor de ensino superior no Brasil em números de alunos matriculados. Em 31 de dezembro de 2017, contávamos com 515,4 mil alunos matriculados nas modalidades presencial e à distância, em cursos de graduação e pós-graduação. Nossa rede é formada por uma universidade, dez centros universitários, 49 faculdades credenciadas e 394 polos de ensino à distância credenciados pelo MEC, com uma capilaridade nacional representada por 93 campi, nos principais centros urbanos de 23 estados brasileiros e no Distrito Federal, estrategicamente localizadas nas proximidades das residências e/ou dos locais de trabalho de nosso público alvo de trabalhadores de classes média e média-baixa.

Acreditamos possuir professores altamente capacitados, metodologias de ensino avançadas e instalações bem equipadas, e oferecemos 123 cursos de graduação, quase todos integrados nacionalmente nas áreas de Ciências Exatas, Ciências Biológicas e Ciências Humanas, em graduação tradicional e tecnológica. Adicionalmente, também oferecemos cursos de pós-graduação lato sensu, cursos de mestrado e de doutorado além de diversos cursos de extensão, que acreditamos ter qualidade diferenciada e preços competitivos, visando à formação profissional de nossos alunos e sua melhor empregabilidade.

Name: Por quê?
Description:
A plataforma Por Quê? – economês em bom português surgiu em 2015, com o objetivo de tornar a economia acessível ao público não especializado e mostrar que sua compreensão é essencial tanto em termos individuais quanto para o exercício pleno da cidadania.  Trata-se de uma plataforma digital interativa que abrange blog, dicionário de conceitos econômicos, podcast, videoaulas e animações, com conteúdo criado e supervisionado por economistas e editores experientes. Fazem parte do projeto também palestras com especialistas, edição de livros e cursos, além de serviços de orientação financeira.  
O Por Quê? é uma iniciativa da BEĨ Editora, que desde 1990 vem se destacando no mercado brasileiro pela publicação de obras de alta qualidade gráfica e editorial, voltadas prioritariamente para a arte e a cultura brasileiras. O catálogo da editora inclui livros de artes visuais, fotografia, gastronomia, arquitetura, urbanismo e economia, entre outras áreas. A BEĨ organiza ainda a plataforma Arq.Futuro, que tem como objetivo contribuir com a melhoria da qualidade de vida das cidades do Brasil por meio da articulação de diversos especialistas em arquitetura e urbanismo.

Name: Benefix - Fysisk og psykisk velvære på arbejdspladsen
Description:
Benefix henvender sig til virksomheder, der ønsker fokus på medarbejdertrivsel og ønsker at give medarbejderne et relevant kompetenceløft via selvudviklingsvideoer. 

Benefix er en medarbejdervendt kursusplatform og samtidig et styringsdashbord til ledelsesbrug, der benyttes både til at håndtere medarbejders trivsel og samtidig skabe et overblik til ledelsen om organisationens mentale sundhedsstatus.

Benefix udspringer fra Klausen-HR, der hovedsageligt arbejder med at få stress-sygemeldte medarbejdere tilbage i arbejde. Indsigterne herfra er bl.a., at forebyggelse af stress er væsentlig vigtigere end at satse på behandling, når skaden er sket.
Det sparer virksomheden for mange penge at spotte og stoppe stress i tide og samtidig skåner det medarbejderne for den psykisk og fysisk hårde rejse, som en sygemelding med stress medfører.

Vi tror på, at stress helt kan undgås med den rigtige viden og og de rigtige værktøjer til mental og fysisk trivsel - til både ledere og medarbejdere.
Faktisk er det ikke noget, der kræver meget af arbejdspladsen eller er svært at implementere i en travl hverdag. Derfor har vi lavet Benefix, en e-læringsportal, der hurtigt tjener sig hjem, hvor alle i deres eget tempo kan lære at tage ansvar for egen trivsel og undgå at blive ramt af stress.

Name: CourseWorld
Description:
Everyone deserves a world-class liberal arts education for free.

CourseWorld (www.courseworld.org) is a free library of the web’s best educational videos in the arts and humanities. A 501(c)(3) not-for-profit initiative based in New York City, we want to make it easy for anyone to receive a world-class education in the classic liberal arts by giving everyone the chance to discover and watch exceptional content in one convenient place. 

Our growing hub features more than 16,000 videos—all hand-selected, keyword-tagged, and indexed into more than 700 categories. A global grassroots project with a budget of $0, CourseWorld relies entirely on the efforts of freelance volunteers. 

Join us, and together let’s craft a more thoughtful world. 

==

www.CourseWorld.org

www.facebook.com/CourseWorld
www.twitter.com/CourseWorld

==

OUR BELIEFS

1.	Everyone in the world deserves a world-class education for free.
2.	Educational videos should be easy to discover and access.
3.	In a world that glorifies celebrities, sports and music icons, politicians, entrepreneurs, and the like, it’s time we turned teachers into rock stars.
4.	Technology is only as good as the humanity behind it; people give meaning to platforms (e.g., via curating, categorizing, and crowdsourcing). 
5.	The liberal arts are core to who we are and merit the best resources we have.

A source of knowledge and experience-sharing platform that starts with leadership, mentoring, and coaching, and touches on every topic we may need to develop ourselves.

Founded in 2020 by Dr. Rıza Kadılar, RK Academy aims to help participants view life from an advantageous perspective and live more meaningful, fulfilling, and satisfying lives through the diverse development areas it offers.

Inspired by Dr. Rıza Kadılar's speeches and writings, this platform is a meeting point for those who want to understand the world, keep up with developments, and create life strategies.

“Opportunities are not to be pursued; if you prepare yourself properly and wait, opportunities will fall into your lap.”
Kayra Akıalp


Reading the future is largely impossible. We live in a world where everything can be turned upside down in an instant. But the general trends don't change much. By distinguishing important and powerful signals and evaluating the available opportunities in the most accurate way, we can be better prepared for unexpected events. Developments that are a threat to many people can even be an opportunity for us. As August Compte said: “To foresee, one must know; to be capable, one must foresee.”
It is with this promise that I wanted to offer this site to you. I cannot claim to read the future or to be prepared for everything. But I want to share what I see, my observations, and my experiences with you. In a sense, I want to connect the dots and convey to you what my various positions have offered me. Of course, the content of this site will take its ideal form based on both my experiences and your expectations. So please don't hesitate to send me your suggestions.

We want to show it's not about simply being a gifted kid. Every kid is gifted when they are shown a path that helps them reach for the stars without every feeling the burden of tests, pressure, or silent classrooms. 

 

Our classes are energetic, loud, difficult, creative, and brilliant. We study challenging

subjects like economics and physics when most people say, "That's too difficult,

they won't understand!". We don't agree. We believe in aiming for the stars

Aim high.

Description: We've all had 'em, those customer service experiences that are so bad they leave you wanting to run straight to your therapist's couch. Was it the wrong technology. structural issues, agent problems?  Listen in and find out.

Description:
Akademi.al is an education technology, award-winning startup looking to transform the education systems of countries in the Western Balkans towards digitalization and equal opportunities. 

Akademi.al is Albania's official online learning platform recognized by the Albanian Ministry of Education, Sports, and Youth. It currently has over 500,000 users, comprised of pre-university students and teachers, and it is being used in over 1,300 public schools. Akademi.al is all in Albanian, intuitive, and very easy to use by people of all ages and technical capabilities.

Besides Live Classes we also have created more than 20.000 video lectures available to all students for FREE. The video lectures that we offer are all tailored to the pre-university curriculum approved by the Albanian Ministry of Education and more than 3000 video lectures are translated into sign language, with added subtitles and high-quality voice-overs in order to make education accessible for everyone.

Description:
The Greater Manchester Cancer Academy aims to create a lifelong learning model for the non-medical workforce, across all care settings, to meet the needs of the population.

There is currently no standardised training and education programme for the non-medical workforce and often inequity in access to educational offers. 

Greater Manchester Cancer Academy aims to address this problem by listening to what the workforce wants / needs and developing educational offers in response to this.  By providing a joined-up approach to education across the cancer system, we will avoid education providers working in silo.

GM Cancer Academy will be the 'Cancer Education hub' for Greater Manchester.

Son objectif était de rendre l'apprentissage accessible à tous, tout en garantissant une véritable montée en compétences grâce à l'interaction directe avec des formateurs qualifiés.

Name: STEAM Drones
Description:
We provide everything you need (curriculum, drones, support, etc.) to quickly launch a STEAM / STEM educational drone program. We’re combining curriculum with a user friendly iPad / Android / Chrome app, and layering it on top of the line drones. The result is a scalable end-to-end solution for a project based learning environment.

Students will learn the basics of block style coding applying fundamentals of math, science, and logic. Students will test their code on small and indoor friendly drones that will fly autonomously in the classroom. Once students master the basics of block style coding they will move on to more advanced Python programming language. Python is an open source platform that is used worldwide especially in the robotics industry. This is new, fun, and exciting way to engage children in computer programing, coding, and drones.

STEAM Drones empowers STEAM leaders to educate in the context of unprecedented engagement.

Name: Scott's Bass Lessons
Description:
We believe that one platform can bring world-class bass education to bass players around the world.

The problems for bass players such as yourself, who are trying to push their bass playing to the next level are obvious. The gag is, you probably don’t even know about them. So let’s dig into this…

You can either enroll in a music school (but only if you don’t have any family commitments and you can afford it - it’s expensive!), or you can seek out a 'one-to-one' bass tutor, that you can only meet up with once a week, and unfortunately you’ll soon learn that most musicians teach to pay the rent, and for the most part are not interested in education at all. That’s a huge issue for people like you because up until now that’s the only two options you’ve ever had.

But wait, YouTube arrived. Yay! Well… not so much. Don’t get us wrong, YouTube is fantastic, hell, we have over half a million bass players subscribed to our YouTube channel and get around 1.5 million views per month. But, as a solid “educational platform” it’s seriously flawed, and in certain ways can do more harm than good. Ever felt you didn’t know what to work on next? Felt overwhelmed? Jumping between videos looking for that next “shiny object”? Felt totally lost in a sea of information?… Well, you’ve already experienced what we’re trying to highlight.

That’s why we created ScottsBasslessons. We have created a new type of educational platform that gives people like us (yep - we’re just like you!), access to a world-class education from the comfort of our own homes. If you’re too young for music school, too old, have a family and other commitments… does that mean that you shouldn’t have access to a stellar bass education - HELL NO!

For bass players like you, this is a completely new opportunity. Simply put, it's world-class bass education without boundaries.

Name: Shout Out Safety Ltd.
Description:
Shout Out Safety believes that Health and Safety compliance training needs to be far more engaging and delivered more effectively. 

Health and Safety Compliance training is currently addressed by expensive and disruptive face-to-face delivery, or by poor quality, remote e-Learning packages. Training Managers often find it difficult to source quality content for their workforce. To challenge this inadequate provision, Shout Out Safety produces entertaining Health & Safety training courses professionally created in HD video.

Our message is very simple: bored learners learn very little but if they’re presented with great content, they’ll be totally engaged and remember more. We believe that better training creates a more aware workforce and that in turn results in fewer risks at work.

Each Shout Out Safety course is created by Health and Safety professionals, written by an award-winning scriptwriter and filmed by a professional broadcast TV crew. We place our actors in familiar scenarios that trainees can recognize. We capture expert medical testimony and we let real people tell of the events which changed their lives. The result is a range of entertaining, effective and memorable courses that really work. 

Shout Out Safety is a member of the British Safety Council and every course is accredited by the CPD Certification Service; the Asbestos courses are endorsed by IATP. On successful completion of the course trainees and their employers can immediately download a personalized certificate with a unique reference number.

Name: Bookbot
Description:
Bookbot helps children build confidence in reading.  As a child reads aloud, the app follows along and highlights and helps with missed and mispronounced words.  We have augmented the eReader with accurate speech recognition and machine learning to learn how children learn.

Our vision is to help any child build reading confidence and improve literacy for tomorrow’s world. We understand that learning to read is one of the most significant stages of life and it is challenging for everyone. The World Literacy Foundation says that over half of all children truly struggle to read; either through learning difficulties or a lack of support from a competent adult.  As a result, today 1 in 5 adults globally still cannot read or write.

Bookbot exists for the children who need a little extra practice but don’t want to feel like a burden, or who feel a bit shy and want to practice alone. We want to make reading fun and engaging for all, particularly for struggling readers and people with dyslexia.

The team at Bookbot is now focused on using technology to help children build confidence in reading.  We can’t do it alone and need help from wherever possible.

Name: Atticus Education
Description:
Atticus Education bridges the gap between technology and learning. Founded in 2012, it enables Lord Puttnam to deliver audio-visual seminars to students all over the world from his home in West Cork. 

In recent years, distance learning has been poorly served by technology. When conceiving the idea for Atticus Education, Lord Puttnam felt that mentoring - one of the core building blocks of learning and predominantly a physical concept - was difficult to reconstruct in an online format.

To meet this challenge, he set out to advance the possibility of mentorship using technology enabling students not just to listen, but to engage, watch, converse, argue and reflect with both with himself and one another. As a result, Atticus Education offers far more than an online lecture programme: it allows illustrated conversations to take place, offering anyone seeking a career in the audio-visual world a connection with one of the industry’s most thoughtful exponents.
When the idea for Atticus Education was devised in 2012, Lord Puttnam set himself the most difficult technological challenge he could think of: to teach a class in Brisbane, south-western Australia from Skibbereen, in rural West Cork.

Today, after a great deal of work and research, video communication between Lord Puttnam’s base in west Cork and universities around the globe is facilitated using a Cisco TelePresence high definition video conferencing solution. This state-of- the-art connectivity allows for high speed uncontested internet access using BT fibre and a BT managed radio network; effectively extending that network into rural areas such as Skibbereen.

These technological solutions mean that Lord Puttnam can teach in an innovative and dynamic manner, using video clips, audio files and interacting with students in a two-way discourse throughout each seminar.

With several international awards and top rankings in the App Stores, we have set a new benchmark in language learning.

OUR LANGUAGE LEARNING APPS:

LearnMatch

LearnMatch is a highly motivational mobile language learning application. It combines advanced vocabulary training with social learning and gamification. Studying a new language can be all fun and games! LearnMatch currently includes 6 learning languages and almost 40 interface (native) languages. The unique LiveMatch feature has everyone competing in exciting and socially involving vocabulary matches with friends, family and members of the LearnMatch community. Furthermore, the app offers a powerful personalised dictionary, plug-in and translation technology tool that allow a unique language learning experience.

LearnMatch Business 

Proficient language skills and mastery of industry-specific terminology often play key roles in professional integration and career development. LearnMatch Business (in Germany: phase6 Berufe) focuses on vocabulary training for companies and industries with a high percentage of non-native German and English speakers – by providing them with their general languages skills as well as strengthening their industry-specific vocabulary. Companies profit from an improved level of internal communication, higher productivity and better quality of service and work due to our industry specific solutions.

Name: LiveLearning.io
Description:
Live Learning is a web application for educators to teach online.
It is free to use; there is no time limit. 
It is built on open source technologies for the in-built video streaming so no need to rely on third-party apps. 
But if teachers still prefer other apps, Live Learning also integrates with Google Meet, Spotify, and Google Drive.

What makes Live Learning special?
It has everything a teacher would need to teach online. Example:
Live video streaming, whiteboard, music while teaching, chat with students, two-way conversation, and no time limit. Organization tools like creating groups, invite students with one click, chat with students after class and more.

External Tools Live Learning integrates are Google Meet, Google Drive and Spotify. It allows users that are used to their Google ecosystem to continue using that but with an enhanced and teacher-centred usage.

Try Live Learning yourself at livelearning.io

Lekcje prowadzone są na żywo przez doświadczone lektorki, co gwarantuje autentyczność i różnorodność doświadczeń językowych  W Onlingo stawiamy na elastyczność harmonogramu zajęć, dostosowując się do Twojego życia i codziennych obowiązków 

Specjalizujemy się w nauczaniu języka angielskiego na różnych poziomach zaawansowania. Nasze kursy obejmują nie tylko General English, ale także specjalistyczne szkolenia, takie jak Business English, English for HR czy English for Sales  Naszym celem jest skuteczna edukacja, rozwijając nie tylko umiejętność językową, ale również komunikacyjną w kontekście zawodowym 

W Onlingo wierzymy, że nauka angielskiego powinna być dostępna dla każdego, dlatego zapewniamy łatwy i wygodny dostęp do naszych kursów. Oferujemy naukę dla różnych grup wiekowych, w tym dzieci i nastolatków, przygotowując ich do egzaminów maturalnych, 8-klasisty, FCE i CAE 

Dołącz do naszej społeczności i otwórz drzwi do skutecznej nauki języka angielskiego!

Biz :
 Farkında olduğumuz eğitimde fırsat eşitsizliğini biraz olsun azaltmak istiyoruz. Gönüllü öğretmen sıfatıyla ilkokul ve ortaokul öğrencilerinin  okul derslerine, kişisel ve hobi gelişimlerine yardımcı olmaya çalışıyoruz.
Kelimenin tam anlamlarıyla "kolaylaştırıcı" bir ekibiz!
Öğrenen bir topluluğuz. Hata yapabiliriz ama hata yapmaktan korkmayız. Çünkü, her hatadan mutlak ders çıkarır ve bir daha yapmayız!
"Mış" gibi yapmıyoruz. Gerçeğiz! Samimiyiz!
Bilgiyi "meslek sırrı" diye kendimize saklamaz, aksine paylaşırız. Çünkü, biliriz ki bilgi paylaşıldıkça çoğalır!
Odağımız "Çözmek" tir. Biz çok farklı alanlardan  üniversite öğrencisiyiz ve biliriz ki farkında olan öğrenci en iyi, en doğru ve en sürdürülebilir çözümü ortaya koyandır. Öğrendiğimiz çok bilgi var ama bilgiler aracımızdır. Amacımız değil!
Elbette profesyonelce çalışıyoruz ama en çok "kendimizi gerçekleştiriyoruz!"
Ne bildiğinden daha çok "öğrenme ve yaşamına anlam katma arayışını ve heyecanını " önemsiyoruz! Gerisi kendiliğinden gelir.
Üniversiteden yeni mezun da olsan, yeni başlamış  da olsan GEL ! 

Üstte yazılanlar "beni anlatıyor" diyorsan seni arıyoruz !

The innovative methodology born out of this venture was soon being taught in 12 languages and over 25 countries around the world. More than 4,000,000 learners and 10,000 teachers have embraced the Accelium Method to date.
 
The innovative game-based training and assessment tools inspired by the method combine personal coaching, team workshops, and mobile learning to develop strategic thinking and resilience. They create an engaging experience that inspires learners to continually practice effective strategies, to reflect, and improve their skills and performance.

Visualization
During the lesson our instructors transcribe what learners say into our platform and the learners can see the transcript of what they said complete with corrections in REAL-TIME. 

Personalized Content Homework
After each lesson our platform automatically generates personalized content homework (fill in the blank exercises) based on leaner's individual mistakes. 

Lesson-by-lesson tracking tools
We use 2 simple graphs to measure progress for each learner: If the learner gradually starts to speak faster while at the same time reduces his error percentage, this signifies that he/she is starting to think in the target language and no longer making the same mistakes. Sign up for a FREE Demo lesson now by going to www.octb.us

We leverage zoom and artificial intelligence (AI) technology, our platform delivers a learning approach which is on average 25% faster than traditional methods and each lesson costs less than what you would spend on Lunch. We've built and developed our platform by serving corporate clients in Europe, South America, Russia, and Japan and now we are bringing this approach to individual learners. Name: Integrative Palliative Care Institute
Description:
The Integrative Palliative Care Institute (IPCI) provide evidence-based, outcome-tested training for healthcare professionals in integrative therapies for hospice and palliative care.  

Sponsored by the National Cancer Institute (NCI), our flagship program, the “Integrative Therapies in Hospice and Palliative Care” was developed with the input and feedback of more than 800 multidisciplinary healthcare providers from across the United States. 

To test the program's effectiveness,  170 physicians, nurses, social workers, chaplains and other providers participated in a randomized clinical trial (RCT). Results from this RCT have been recently published* and showed:

 78% increase in confidence and understanding of integrative therapies. 
 58% increase in clinical practice activities incorporating these approaches.

The “Integrative Therapies in Hospice and Palliative Care” program teaches professionals all they need to know about research-backed integrative interventions, including:

 massage
 meditation
 guided imagery 
 hypnosis
 acupuncture
 tai chi
 qigong
 yoga 
 energy-based therapies (Healing Touch, Reiki, and more)

These interventions have been shown to improve symptom management, emotional well-being, and quality of life.

After participating in this program, healthcare providers will feel confident in their knowledge and skills to discuss these therapies with colleagues, patients and family caregivers. 

Learn more about this outcome-tested program: 
https://integrativepalliativecare.org/courses-professionals/

*Collinge W, Kozak L, Mist S, Soltysik R. Development and Outcomes of a Provider-Driven, Online Continuing Education Program on Integrative Palliative Care

Name: LabNEx
Description:
Somos un Centro Digital de Alto Rendimiento de Emprendedores/as que ayuda a emprendedores/as latinoamericanos/as a demoler con audacia las ficciones de su emprendimiento ("no puedo conseguir financiamiento", "mis ventas se estancaron", entre otros). 

Para demoler estas ficciones, debemos sentir que entre deportistas de élite y nosotros no hay diferencia. Es decir, debemos mantener ese alto rendimiento que nuestro emprendimiento requiere. Lo podemos lograr igual que ellos/ellas: cuidando nuestro cuerpo, alimentando nuestra mente, gestionando nuestras emociones y alimentando el espíritu. De esta forma podremos trabajar con motivación, energía, al máximo de nuestro potencial, cada día; y al mismo tiempo tener vida (algo que los/as emprendedores/as solemos sacrificar). 

Es importante reconocer que los cuatro aspectos están interconectados. Por ejemplo, en nuestra mente podemos albergar el pensamiento limitante que no conseguiremos fondos para nuestro emprendimiento (algo muy típico). Desde nuestra mente se dispara el estrés, disminuyendo nuestro bienestar e intoxicando nuestras emociones, afectando nuestro cuerpo generando Cortisol ("venenoso" en la sangre en el largo plazo), y afectando nuestro enfoque, nuestro espíritu. Y como este, miles de ejemplos más.

Por esta razón ofrecemos un entrenamiento de élite, orientado a mejorar nuestras acciones. Lógicamente, nada puede garantizarnos el éxito, así como tampoco nada garantiza a un deportista ganar un campeonato. Lo que sí es una certidumbre es que un entrenamiento de élite, orientado a la acción, aumenta las posibilidades de éxito. 

Aquí en labNEX encontrarás un ecosistema digital que, entre todo lo que ofrece y en todas sus funcionalidades, diseñado contigo en el centro, lograrás entrenarte como un deportista de élite, preocupado de tu mente, cuerpo, emociones y espíritu, logrando cada vez más con acciones más enfocadas y masivas.

We want to see more inspired people in the world who make dreams come true.

What do we know about leadership? We originally come from different international backgrounds: Philip worked in various supply chain positions and was a team leader in major corporations for almost a decade. Philipp coordinated a trans-European IT student network division and has been a leadership coach for several years. Now, we are both full-time career trainers and coaches.  

It's been a couple of months now that we've been providing valuable leadership advice here. We're grateful for all the encouraging comments and positive feedback from you folks. We really appreciate it.

So we decided to design an online course where you can find out the tweaks to a happy career. The course is about mindset, the foundation for inspiring leadership. 

Every career path is unique. So for you, the posts on LinkedIn might be all you need at this stage. And once you feel that you want to dig deeper and want to know more about our course, reach out to us.

We would love to accompany you on your journey, and pretty soon, you will discover the powers you have hidden in you.

Unleash your talents!

Name: KontentEdge
Description:
The ways of imparting learning are transitioning from classroom-learning to eLearning technologies because the latter helps improve performance at convenience, pace, and individual ability of the learner. Given the demand for meeting this progressive change, we at KontentEdge, a consultancy
firm based out of Gurgaon, India, have been developing and managing content using innovative approaches.

We help corporates, schools, institutions, and eLearning companies transform their content using strategic ID analysis and inventive methods.

“If you can’t explain it simply, you don’t understand it well enough.” A very true quote by Albert Einstein and we diligently follow this thought. Therefore, we understand and then analyze the customer needs before working on their content. This approach leads to mutually beneficial content development.

We design and build highly compelling and engaging digital content solutions on the principle of innovation to benefit the end-user, enhance the user experience, and derive customer satisfaction. Our motive is to help organizations achieve their business goals through their learning content and drive their business outcomes using our digital content solutions and services.

Are you looking to provide cutting-edge eLearning material for your students, colleagues, and learners? Do you want to bring learning closer to your students using training materials, ILTs, WBTs, self-paced courses? Come to KontentEdge, here we use patient listening, analytics, compelling storyboarding and course designing techniques to deliver content that’s easy to comprehend, and excellent in ensuring maximum engagement.

Explore our vast repository of case studies of eLearning course materials designed for K-12 students, higher education institutions and corporates, before you trust us.

We are TechLabs, a tech community for young digital shapers of all backgrounds. Each semester we recruit a new generation of young people and support them in gaining state-of-the-art tech skills in one of our four tracks: Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Web Development and User Experience.

TechLabs offers a unique learning experience for all participants, using modern e-learning tools, individual learning paths for each participant, and experienced mentors. The community is open to everyone – independent of their background or prior knowledge (in fact, most of our new participants have no or just very limited coding experience). Beyond that, TechLabs actively supports all community members to apply their new tech skills in practice.

The world needs digital shapers more than ever before – so let's build them now!

At Club Tangaza, we recognize that coding is a language that is best learned at a young age, much like English, French, or Chinese. By exposing young learners to the fundamentals of coding, we are empowering them with the skills and knowledge needed to thrive in today's rapidly evolving technological landscape.
