Description: Zucate has the vision to fundamentalising learning rather than schooling for all. We are focussed on primary and secondary school education for building concepts at nascency. We build concepts into the heart, so next time when the students are asked to reproduce the same; it is like another session of their favourite game where they just know the rules by heart. We let the students explain the concepts to the teachers based on our belief “If you know it thoroughly, then you can explain it simply.” Unlike others in this sector, our primary approach is laying the foundation of school education rather than mugging up and reproducing in competitive exams. Sky scrappers can always be built on strong bedrocks. Bedrocks is our bull’s eye with the teachers, the most underrated jewels of education system, serving as reinforcements. We create a unique Digital Education Ecosystem where students and their concepts, the cynosure; the teachers; and the parents constantly interact to bring about a balance. Description:

The site offers over 450 CADWorx and CAESAR II video tutorials with over 900 pages of lessons and exercises.  It is designed for corporate in-house training and also for designers who want to learn CADWorx and CAESAR II software at their own pace to further their careers.

The website has a "browse as you like" area where subscribers can access any video and lesson in any sequence.  This area is available 24/7 and plays on your computer, smart phone, or tablet.

There is also a "campus" area where you can take special online CADWorx Modeling, P&ID and CAESAR II Fundamentals and Statics courses.  These courses offer more detailed instruction, include quizzes, and the system automatically generates a certificate upon completion.

The site is a great alternative for companies that need an inexpensive high quality in-house CADWorx or CAESAR II training solution, and is an excellent alternative to expensive classroom training.

Our mission is to leverage the best technology and proven curriculum to empower young learners (K-3) with the basic reading and writing skills needed to close the literacy gap.
 
The result? Better outcomes for students, for the schools that serve them, and for society as a whole.  
 
And when students – even those with obstacles to learning – master the essential building blocks of literacy, doors open, and the achievement gap closes.

El CFPD, único en México
El Centro de Formación en Periodismo Digital (CFPD) es una entidad académica de UDGVirtual, de la Universidad de Guadalajara (UDG), la segunda institución pública de educación superior más importante de México.

Con el auspicio del Centro Internacional para Periodistas (ICFJ), el CFPD comenzó a operar en septiembre de 2008 como un centro especializado en periodismo digital. Desde finales del 2010, con el respaldo institucional de la UDG se ha convertido en una instancia académica única en su tipo en México y América Latina, al ofrecer formación especializada a nivel pregrado y posgrado y al ampliar continuamente su oferta de cursos de educación continua y a distancia.

Objetivos
Promover la profesionalización y formación de periodistas y comunicadores especializados en el uso tecnologías multimedia.
Propiciar la producción de un periodismo de calidad en Internet.
Impulsar la generación y la aplicación de conocimientos en el campo de la comunicación digital.

Name: IEEE Smart Grid Resource Center
Description:
What is the Smart Grid?
Smart Grid deployment is imperative, not just in the United States but around the globe. But the smart grid is a revolutionary undertaking—entailing new communications-and-control capabilities, energy sources, generation models and adherence to cross-jurisdictional regulatory structures. Successful rollout will demand objective collaboration, integration, and interoperability among a phenomenal array of disciplines, including computational and communications control systems for generation, transmission, distribution, customer, operations, markets and service provider.

What is IEEE Smart Grid? 
IEEE is the obvious entity to assume the critical unifying role in the smart-grid movement for a variety of reasons. It is the world’s largest and most comprehensive professional association. It has an unmatched diversity of global expertise across both established and emerging technologies, rich programs, proven standards and a lifecycle of related processes that promote technology adoption and open and build global markets. Finally, IEEE is a nonprofit that brings objective coordination among the huge cast of public and private organizations that will contribute to the smart grid’s development.

Name: ELNOR
Description:
ELNOR is an edtech startup that provides English learning materials and personalized tutoring to adults living in refugee camps. People in camps are amongst the most disadvantaged in the world, and while their immediate needs of food, shelter, and safety are the focus of international entities and governments, education welfare remains overlooked as a necessity. We believe that language learning allows for self-expression for those who are seeking relief and brings professional and social opportunities when establishing a new life.

ELNOR has begun a pilot program with a group of adults in Europe’s largest refugee camp, Moria, which after the fire in September 2020 has been relocated to other areas of the Greek island of Lesbos. Many people living in refugee camps have very limited access to formal modes of education, and the COVID-19 disruptions put them at a greater disadvantage as it disconnected them from in-person volunteer tutors while they have limited access to internet and electronic devices to participate in virtual learning programs.

Adapting the technology to fit the needs and wifi connectivity of our students, we have been innovating ways that we can connect with them and expand our services to reach more people within Moria and beyond.

AI verandert het onderwijs. Maar hoe zorg je dat je als school verantwoorde keuzes maakt, kansen benut én risico’s beheerst? Eduapp AI ondersteunt scholen bij het bewust en doelgericht inzetten van AI, met oog voor didactiek, veiligheid, duurzaamheid en innovatie. 

Het uitgangspunt van Eduapp zijn didactische scenario’s voor de inzet van AI (ondersteuning door AI en leren met AI). Een scenario beschrijft de meerwaarde van AI in het onderwijs, de uitgangspunten (sector, doelgroep, didactisch principe) en richtlijnen om vervolgens de passende AI-tools en benodigde competenties - AI-geletterdheid - te beschrijven bij dat scenario. Door samen te werken kunnen we zorgen voor de praktijkkennis en kennisdeling, maar kunnen we ook gezamenlijk de lasten dragen voor de check op veiligheid, privacy en security door het beschrijven van het risiconiveau en bijvoorbeeld de  uitvoer van DPIA’s en of FRIA’s.  Dit moet gekoppeld zijn aan een scenario om een goede check te kunnen uitvoeren. 

Op deze manier werk je als school, gebaseerd op je visie op onderwijs, naar een verantwoorde inzet van AI en voldoe je aan de AI-verordening (AI-Act).

Doe je mee? Dit initiatief/collectief is voor alle sectoren in het onderwijs, de uitgewerkte scenario's zullen soms per sector verschillen. Neem contact op via info@eduapp.nl

Name: DosedDaily
Description:
As an Otolaryngology-Head and Neck surgery resident, like all residents, I found that the performance of my clinical duties left little time for reading and learning. I decided early on that with a little time each day, I would try to answer just one question. That question might be clinical, basic science, or a pimp question I had missed from an attending.  This took only 10-15 minutes each day, but allowed me to research over 350 questions each year in a unrushed, unhurried fashion that improved my learning and retention. This was the best learning experience of my residency.

When I started my academic career, I began intermittently emailing questions to my residents and the term e-pimp was coined by one of them (now an Academic Otolaryngologist herself). The name stuck. I began doing daily e-pimps for my residents and then expanded to residents all over the country.

Before long, colleagues in practice were asking to be included. Recognizing what a great learning experience writing the questions was for my own practice, I had the service accredited for CME and the response has been phenomenal.

The name e-pimp caused some predictable problems with spam filters, so we are now known as DosedDaily and provide a service for Pediatrics and Family Medicine … and I hope we can make reading and learning a short, daily experience for more specialties over time.

- ERIC LENTSCH, MD

Name: Circles of Safety Education Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Every other child in India is sexually abused, very often by someone they trust. Children brave such horrifying scars alone. Ever wonder why? Partly because as a society we have denied its extent, as families we have missed opportunities for courage and sometimes as individuals we have actively covered it up at the expense of our children. It’s time we start feeling the pain of such violations and take the initiative to keep our children safe. 

Circles of Safety sensitizes the community on preventing this silent epidemic. The solution is clear: heightened awareness in the community and early intervention in the form of comprehensive sexuality education. We have developed a rights-based curriculum to provide age-appropriate and accurate education to young people. The curriculum informs students from grades 1 to 12 on an ongoing basis, on a variety of topics including puberty, gender stereotypes, healthy relationships, bullying, consent, and more.  It enables them to take responsibility for their own decisions and behaviours, and how they may affect others.

"Circles of Safety is my response to the years of self-blame, guilt, and lack of prevention knowledge. I firmly believe that the circle of adults around the child needs to be educated on the issue and empowered with simple strategies to reduce the risk of a child being victimized. Only then, can children grow up with their boundaries intact." - Anuja Amin | Founder, Circles of Safety

Description:
Le C.E.N.A – Ecole Masson, est une école qui a pour vocation de transmettre les valeurs de la naturopathie et de permettre à chacun le retour vers une santé autonome, dans le respect des lois de la nature.
Ses fondateurs, Sandrine Navarrete Masson et Robert Masson, naturopathes passionnés par tout ce qui peut améliorer la santé, partagent à travers le C.E.N.A. leurs connaissances et expériences à tous ceux qui souhaitent que la naturopathie devienne leur art de vivre. 

Devenir naturopathe implique un enseignement rigoureux, dispensé par des praticiens expérimentés. Fruit de plus de 60 années d’expérience, notre enseignement résulte d’observations rationnelles, de plusieurs milliers de consultations, de conseils prodigués aux personnes, et d’une logique de bon sens.

Au cours des séminaires et des cours par correspondance qui constituent notre enseignement, vous découvrirez ce qu’est la naturopathie, vous étudierez la nutrition, et une large part sera réservée aux grandes familles de maladies, leurs causes et leurs thérapies naturelles (phytothérapie, aromathérapie, gemmothérapie, organothérapie, oligothérapie, mycothérapie etc.).

La naturopathie C.E.N.A. c’est l’écoute attentive, l’interrogatoire du mode de vie, et des conseils toujours adaptés. Ces conseils ne sont jamais traumatisants et sont assortis de thérapies naturelles données en fonction du psychisme et de l’organisme de l’individu qui attend du naturopathe un peu de réconfort, beaucoup de discernement et une thérapie précise aussi efficace que le permettent les connaissances de la physiologie.»
Sandrine et Robert

Name: Instituto Casa de Criadores
Description:
O Instituto Casa de Criadores nasce como um espaço de ocupação e semeadura para novas formas de compreender, transmitir e fazer moda.

Entendemos a criação não como ato simplesmente individual ou a serviço de um mercado, mas como algo atravessado por uma dinâmica de afetos capaz de enlaçar relações pessoais, sociais, políticas e econômicas.

Nesse contexto, desejamos promover novos encontros a partir de uma reorganização radical de saberes.

É nosso dever fomentar e desenvolver pesquisas e dispositivos de escuta no sentido de transformar nossa prática educacional coletiva em um espaço fértil  e extremamente permeável a linguagens, lógicas, estéticas, tecnologias, histórias e formas de organização e afetividade que têm sido sistematicamente marginalizadas, corrompidas e silenciadas. 

Acreditamos em uma formação permanente, não no sentido de um monumento sólido e inteiro, mas de algo em constante movimento, algo que encontra sua verdade no processo vivo de construção. Um processo que enxerga diferenças, desvios, obstáculos e contradições como espaços de disputa na luta contra a desigualdade de direitos e suas estruturas colonizadoras.

Nesse sentido, nossas iniciativas, que poderão se apresentar nos mais variados formatos e propostas, devem ser pensadas para abraçar um público cada vez mais amplo, com o compromisso inegociável de chegar às pessoas que mais sofrem com os mecanismos de segregação econômica, racial e de gênero. Mais do que projetos gratuitos e acessíveis, o Instituto quer criar espaços de mudança e de abertura para novas ideias e outros paradigmas de protagonismo.

Ocupação artística, ocupação cultural, ocupação criativa, espaço onde a partir de vazios, excessos, transbordamento e transformação algo de novo possa se fazer dizer. Hackear as velhas estruturas da moda, analisar, absorver, derrubar, reprogramar, destruir para recriar em outras bases comuns.

Nosso trabalho é direcionado a artistes e estilistes, mas também a outres profissionais do setor. A

Name: Warren Academy: E-courses for clinicians/service-users/peer workers            www.thewarren.academy
Description:
Are you a mental health clinician or peer worker struggling to facilitate the kind of learnings and personal development for service-users and wanting to cultivate deeper understanding and connection with those you support? Curious about non-clinical approaches, more progressive models, and frameworks of understanding distress? I’m an LE teaching and assessing academic, mainly in the field of allied health (with a 10-year background in numerous LE peer worker roles) and I’ve founded Warren Academy to approach the sector twofold: 

1: Help clinicians and peer workers authentically engage with and support their ‘patients/clients’ in a more self-empowering manner through an understanding of CSX History, Mad Studies, and international peer owned models that were developed by clinicians, academics, and others with lived experience. Warren Academy has internationally certified trainers who can support your professional awareness and understanding of peer approaches that have been researched and successful around the globe. We can facilitate your critical exploration of models and frameworks that haven’t yet been embedded in most clinical services. 

2: Provide e-courses for service-users and community to have similar journeys of critical thought and self-empowerment within their experience of mental wellbeing challenges and whilst they’re navigating a confusing system.

If you’re a mental health professional, support your service-users by providing them with our website link. When they sign in, they’ll receive a FREE 10-Week MINI-Course in Mental Health Service-User Self-Advocacy! 

As a clinician, you too can sign into the Warren Academy to receive notification of when Warren Academy starts its courses and programs created specifically for the mental health medical and clinical professions. Please come and explore the Word Wide Warren, follow Warren Academy LinkedIn page, and connect with our LinkedIn Showcase Page to learn more a bout  our courses and programs.

Name: Author Wilhelmina rudin
Description:
Jag heter Wilhelmina Rudin, är författare, väktare och livsstilsfilosof. Under många år har jag haft pennan som vapen. Jag har skrivit en hel del inom personlig utveckling, HBTQ och stresshantering. Och är även igång med arbetsmiljö och psykosocial ohälsa. Jag är aktuell med självbiografin ”Veni Vidi Vici”, en bokserie på 2 böcker i dagsläget, där jag går på djupet med min bakgrund och tar upp det mesta jag kommer på med tankar och känslor i min historia. Dessa böcker går att både beställa genom mig personligen, via den här sidan, samt via Amazons olika sidor. Då tyskland verkar ha rätt kort leveranstid, så har jag börjat beställa hem böckerna från dem.

Jag är författaren och äger alla rättigheter kring det jag har skrivit.

Flera bokprojekt är på gång, varav 2 pågående. En fortsättning på min självbiografi, där jag tar upp framtiden och en bok inom stressfilosofi.

Jag har jobbat inom branscherna restaurang, butik, utbildning och bevakning, och har en blandad yrkeskarriär sedan 1993. Samt med en del ströjobb för att fånga upp mina timmar. För tillfället studerar jag till att bli larmtekniker. Studerar numera till larmtekniker.

Jag ser en framtid som författare, föreläsare och instruktör inom HBTQ, Mindfulness och personlig utveckling, främst inriktad på stresshantering och förebyggande.

/Mina Rudin

Oft liegt dies leider daran, dass IT-Strategie und Funktionsumfang der einzuführenden digitalen Lösung in den Mittelpunkt gestellt werden. Ein fundiertes Learning Management basiert jedoch vor allem auch auf der Auseinandersetzung mit dem eigentlichen Lernprozess, mit ganzheitlicher Sicht auf alle Lernenden und weiteren Beteiligten.

Das LMS Global Teach der Firma Swissteach steht für eine Erfolgsgeschichte von über 30 Jahren und war bei seiner Entstehung eines der ersten Lernmanagementsysteme überhaupt. Das genannte LMS dient dazu, Mitarbeiterentwicklung im Unternehmen effizient und nachhaltig zu machen, zu strukturieren und sowohl online- als auch Präsenzschulungen professionell und zielgerichtet zu organisieren. Namhafte Unternehmen und Organisationen weltweit haben das Produkt seit vielen Jahren im Einsatz und prägen dessen stetige Weiterentwicklung. Global Teach ist ein Produkt mit hohem Praxisbezug. Die Weiterentwicklung der Anwendenden steht hierbei immer im Fokus. So findet jeder einzelne den perfekten Weg zu seiner Entwicklung im Unternehmen.

Name: Platform Uit je hoofd, in je lijf
Description:
In 2014 is het platform 'Uit je hoofd, in je lijf' opgericht, met als doel om mensen  op een effectieve manier van stress af te helpen. Onze unieke manier van coaching MET een online leeromgeving zorgt al jaren voor IJZERSTERKE resultaten die duurzaam zijn!

Ervaren coaches
De beste resultaten behaal je wanneer je de training doorloopt MET een aangesloten coach van ons platform. Zij geven het programma vanuit hun eigen praktijk of organisatie en kunnen jou helpen bij alles wat je tijdens de training tegenkomt.

Direct beginnen!
De trainingen van het platform zijn direct beschikbaar voor iedereen die wil werken aan een balans tussen denken en voelen. Het helpt je stap-voor-stap om de rust weer terug te vinden in je leven. Je leert steeds beter luisteren naar je lijf en je gaat zelf bepalen wat je nodig hebt om die rust weer terug te vinden.

Door de online opzet kent het programma geen wachttijd en kun je na het aanschaffen van de inlogcode direct starten. Bovendien zorgt een online leeromgeving ervoor dat je zelf kunt bepalen wanneer en waar je inlogt om te oefenen en te leren.

Kenmerken digitale training:
V  Er is een online leeromgeving beschikbaar
V  De trainingen zijn helder en gestructureerd van opzet
V  Het bevat een combinatie van video, audio, theorie en opdrachten
V  De materie is nauw op elkaar afgestemd
V  Je leert stap voor stap je denken en voelen te integreren
V  Er zijn 2 trainingen beschikbaar: Aanpak van Stress en Grip op je Gedrag

Hoe te volgen?
In beide programma's leer je op een praktische manier ánders met je gedachten en gevoelens om te gaan. De structuur en de online leeromgeving zorgen dat je stap voor stap kunt toewerken naar een balans. 

Deze trainingen zijn op diverse manieren te volgen:
- individueel met een coach naar keuze
- in groepvorm: dat kan zijn in een Online Classroom of op een trainingslocatie 
- zelfstandig zonder begeleiding

Name: SIMTICS - cloud-based medical simulations powered by SimTutor
Description:
SimTutor Inc offers the SIMTICS library of innovative online simulations for learning how to perform procedures in the fields of medical assisting, dental assisting, respiratory care, sonography, radiography, basic life support, Year 1/Year 2 medical school and more. Learner performance is tracked and competence testing is built-in, with comprehensive reporting for faculty. 

SIMTICS is available from any device with a web browser and internet connection.

We pioneered the use of cognitive simulation in higher education with our interactive online simulator for learning the cognitive aspects of procedural skills. The simulations are supported by illustrated text, video demonstration, 3D anatomy model, and a quiz, creating a rich multi-modal learning environment to bring each skill or procedure to life. All integrated into a single learning environment.

Learners can easily navigate to choose their own learning pathways through the material, track their learning progress in their personal logbook, test their competence, and return later on to refresh those skills and avoid learning decay.

The SIMTICS library contains over 200 modules covering medical procedures, medical assisting procedures, dental assisting skills, respiratory care, basic nursing procedures, sonography scanning protocols, radiography positioning procedures, and basic life support for health professionals.

Visit our YouTube channel http://www.youtube.com/c/simtics for a virtual tour and to see samples of some of our videos. 

To find out more about how the SIMTICS Integrated Cognitive Simulator could benefit your organization and your students or employees, and/or to obtain academic pricing, please contact info@simtics.com.

Name: Master Geoforest
Description:
Spatial information of forests worldwide is key for sustainable management of forest resources.

The Master on Geomatics, Remote Sensing and Spatial Models Applied to Forest Management provide the required training to assess natural resources based on remote sensing, either using satellites or UAVs.

Its main objective is to promote early-carrier engineers, biologists, geographers and environmentalists in research and professional task related to GIS, remote sensing and spatial models for assessing forest ecosystems. Students will be able to carry out projects related to silviculture, forest management, forest restoration, monitoring of abiotic and biotic perturbations, adaptation and mitigation of forests to global change and land planning.

These skills allow MSc student to solve real problems related to management and assessment of forest ecosystems, by using new techniques such as GIS, remote sensing and forest modelling.

This Master’s Degree comprises a professional itinerary and a research one, which is required to access PhD courses. Doctorate programs endorsing this Master are:

“Biosciencies and Agrofood Sciences”, with quality seal (MEE2011-0166) from Spanish Ministry of Education
“Agroindustrial Plant Engineering” within the research lines “Geomatics and Natural Resources” and “Sustainability and Natural Resources”
Students enjoy high employability rates around 85%.

Interaktiv.

Compenser une situation de handicap cognitif ne pourra se faire sans une bonne formation des intervenants, familles, proches et professionnels auprès de ces personnes.

L’inclusion, dans leur environnement, des personnes en situation de handicap du fait d’altérations des fonctions cognitives.

Name: BookBites A/S
Description:
Hos BookBites tror vi på, at læsning er nøglen til at skabe en bedre verden. På vores kontor i Aarhus arbejder vi med digital- og motivationsbaseret læsning og læring. Med støtte fra bl.a. Undervisningsministeriet, Finansministeriet og KL udvikler vi et digitalt skolebibliotek og læseredskab, der får eleverne på landets skoler til at læse mere.

Gode læsefærdigheder har stor betydning for et videre uddannelsesforløb, men undersøgelser viser, at knap en femtedel af de danske skoleelever ikke lever op til læsekravene. For at blive bedre læsere skal eleverne læse mere.

Med BookBites har vi derfor skabt en ny tilgang til det at læse: Bøgerne bliver til tidsopdelte bidder, der tilpasses elevens læsefærdigheder og læsemønster. Derudover får eleverne indblik i egen progression, så de fastholdes i bøgernes verden og motiveres til at tage en bid mere. 

Som et redskab for læreren giver BookBites et præcist indblik i elevernes læsefærdigheder og -mønstre. Læreren har mulighed for at se den enkelte elevs statistik og få et samlet overblik over alle eleverne, så indsatsen kan fokuseres bedre. 
 
BookBites giver adgang til tusindvis af digitale bøger. De kommer fra mange af de største og mest populære forlag indenfor børne- og ungdomsbøger som bl.a. Gyldendal, Lindhardt & Ringhof, Rosinante & Co, Carlsen, Høst & Søn og Nyt Nordisk Forlag. 

Vi udvikler BookBites i et tværfagligt og dynamisk team af programmører, designere og specialister der forsker i og arbejder med læring og læsning som deres speciale. Med kombinationen af kompetencer og erfaringer fra tidligere projekter i både it-, biblioteks- og skoleverdenen ønsker vi at udvikle den gældende praksis på området.

BookBites var i foråret og sommeren 2016 i testforløb på en række skoler blandt elever og lærere, og er i brug på skoler over hele landet.
 
Vil du være med til at starte en ny læseoplevelse?
Du er altid velkommen til at kontakte os – ring, skriv eller kig forbi kontoret på Katrinebjergvej!

Name: Fundación Nómada
Description:
La Fundación Nómada es una institución con fines sociales no lucrativos enfocada a la investigación, capacitación y desarrollo; independiente, sin vinculaciones partidistas, sindicales o religiosas.
Entre sus principales premisas, Fundación Nómada es una organización que contribuye a la protección, prevención, defensa y expresión de la interculturalidad y el medio ambiente.
Tiene como fines y objetivos generales.
1) Diseñar programas y proyectos de capacitación en alianza estratégica con centros de investigación y formación académica dirigidos a diferentes sectores, favoreciendo la promoción de la cultura, de los derechos, de la comunicación y la tecnología así como el respeto a las diversidades aportando al desarrollo del talento humano.
2) Desarrollar investigaciones sociales y científicas orientadas a proponer alternativas de carácter cultural, formativo y en el ámbito socioeconómico.
3)  Generar espacios de debate académico, mediante organización y coordinación de seminarios, talleres, simposios, cursos de formación y capacitaciones en el campo sociocultural y otras áreas sociales.
4) Promover publicaciones que favorezcan el análisis, la investigación y la elaboración de estudios nacionales e internacional, sobre temáticas culturales y sociales en general.
5) Generar acciones e implementar políticas para la formación cultural y la inclusión social mediante proyectos de implementación en territorio.
6) Brindar asesoramiento y asistencia técnica a organizaciones sociales, empresas e instituciones públicas y privadas mediante proyectos de asesoramiento técnico en material cultural, comunicativa y socio-económica

Description:

By 2041 the ripple of our work is tangible with increasing rural populations in the regions where we work. We’ve documented and researched the findings and the impact of our work is profound - happiness of and contribution by rural women is now well recognised and the economic and social return is tenfold on the investment.
This unique initiative is being developed in Australia, with the view that it will be replicated in other countries, acknowledging the enormous impact supporting the next ‘small’ thing can bring to rural communities. 
Rural women around the world are #livinglocalgrowingglobal and #bloomingwheretheyareplanted.

Name: R3i Foundation (Residual Risk Reduction)
Description:
The Residual Risk Reduction initiative (R3i) is a worldwide, academic, multidisciplinary, non-profit, Swiss-law foundation established by international academic and clinical experts in recognition of the significant residual risk of macro-vascular events and micro-vascular complications, including risk from established risk factors (such as unhealthy lifestyles, dyslipidemia, high blood pressure, high blood sugar and obesity) as well as emerging risk factors, that persists in patients despite treatment with current, evidence-based medical care.

The R3i Foundation was formed to engage healthcare professionals in an innovative, global initiative focused on supporting academic research, professional and patient education and public health advocacy with the goal of significantly improving and extending the lives of millions of patients at risk for vascular events.
 
For more information about the R3i Foundation, please visit www.r3i.org

Name: Asil Okulları
Description:
Vizyonumuz
Öğrenci yaşantılarını ön plâna çıkararak geçmişten geleceğe bir köprü kurup diğer öğretim kurumları arasında öğrenen ve etkili bir okul olarak kendini yenileyebilme özelliği ile lider olan, örnek niteliklere sahip ve dışa doğru açılan, takım ruhuna önem veren bireyler yetiştirmeyi amaç edinmiş ve tüm paydaşlarıyla dostluk ortamında çalışmayı arzulayan çağdaş demokratik örnek bir kurum olmak.

Misyonumuz
Öğrencilerimizi yenilikçi yaklaşımlar içeren öğretim programlarımız ışığında bir üst kuruma ve yetişkinlik yaşamına hazırlarken; onları anadilinde başarılı, birden fazla yabancı dilde yetkin, farklı kültürlere hoşgörülü, fen ve matematik bilimlerinde geleceğe dönük, edebiyat, sanat ve sporla ilgili, etik değerleri benimsemiş, çevreye duyarlı, yaşam boyu öğrenen, tarihsel bilince sahip ve toplumsal analiz becerileri gelişmiş, teknolojiye ayak uydurabilen, bilgili, becerili ve özgüvene sahip, ülkesine ve tüm insanlığa yararlı, araştırıcı, üretici Atatürk ilke ve inkılâplarına bağlı nesiller olarak yetiştirmektir. Asil Eğitim Kurumlarının kalite politikası: Millî eğitim sistemimizin ilke ve amaçları doğrultusunda çağdaş, evrensel, laik ve bilimsel eğitim sunmak, bu eğitimin sürekliliğini ve gelişimini güvence altına almak, öğrenci, veli ve çalışanlarımızın memnuniyetini sağlamak, kurumumuzun işlevini, güvenilirliğini ve saygınlığını artırmaktır.

Name: Massage Mastery Online
Description:
The Textbook That's Better Than A Textbook!
Massage Mastery digital textbooks come alive with video, striking imagery, learning games, text translation, listen-along audio, critical-thinking scenarios, instant feedback, and more. Your students are about to “read” their massage textbooks and like it!

Designed to Motivate Adult Learners
Printed textbooks haven’t changed much in the last 1000 years, but adult learners have changed a great deal. Our digital textbooks use a segmented “chunked” structure that improves learner motivation and opportunities for brief, but effective, study sessions.

Students Live on Their Phones and Now Their Textbooks do Too!
If learning is just a swipe away, students are more likely to study in the margins of their busy lives – a practice that significantly improves knowledge acquisition.

Management Tools & Student Tracking Schools Appreciate
With a school account you can purchase textbooks at wholesale prices, organize your students into cohorts, and monitor student progress. You’ll know if students have completed their reading assignments, their exam scores, and how many attempts they made to pass an exam. If a student is falling behind, you’ll know it, and can intervene to get them back on track.

Get Started! Make the Move to Digital Textbooks
Visit our website and see how easy it is to get started with digital textbooks. Learn how to access review copies, how to purchase textbooks and assign them to students, how to access ancillary packages and how to view student progress reports.

Aujourd’hui, le COURS SERVAIS prépare à certains concours, de catégories B et C, pour la Fonction publique d’Etat ou la Fonction publique territoriale, couvrant ainsi une grande partie des postes proposés par les différentes administrations.

Pour multiplier vos chances de réussite, préparez votre concours avec le COURS SERVAIS. Vous bénéficierez en effet de nombreux atouts pour faire la différence :
- un entraînement complet : un programme de cours et de devoirs accompagné d’examens blancs pour être parfaitement prêt le jour du concours
- une assistance pédagogique personnalisée : par téléphone, par mail ou par courrier pour répondre à vos questions et vous aider à avancer
- tous les avantages de l’enseignement à distance : vous étudiez chez vous, au moment et au rythme que vous choisissez
- des corrections sur mesure pour chacun de vos devoirs : les commentaires de vos professeurs vous aideront à progresser
- une remise à niveau en orthographe et grammaire (projet Voltaire)

Vous l’aurez compris, notre objectif est VOTRE REUSSITE !
Les concours auxquels le COURS SERVAIS vous prépare :

Name: Author - Författare - Wilhelmina rudin
Description:
Jag heter Wilhelmina Rudin, är författare, väktare och livsstilsfilosof. Under många år har jag haft pennan som vapen. Jag har skrivit en hel del inom personlig utveckling, HBTQ och stresshantering. Och är även igång med arbetsmiljö och psykosocial ohälsa. Jag är aktuell med självbiografin ”Veni Vidi Vici”, en bokserie på 2 böcker i dagsläget, där jag går på djupet med min bakgrund och tar upp det mesta jag kommer på med tankar och känslor i min historia. Dessa böcker går att både beställa genom mig personligen, via den här sidan, samt via Amazons olika sidor. Då tyskland verkar ha rätt kort leveranstid, så har jag börjat beställa hem böckerna från dem.

Jag är författaren och äger alla rättigheter kring det jag har skrivit.

Flera bokprojekt är på gång, varav 2 pågående. En fortsättning på min självbiografi, där jag tar upp framtiden och en bok inom stressfilosofi.

Jag har jobbat inom branscherna restaurang, butik, utbildning och bevakning, och har en blandad yrkeskarriär sedan 1993. Samt med en del ströjobb för att fånga upp mina timmar. För tillfället studerar jag till att bli larmtekniker. Studerar numera till larmtekniker.

Jag ser en framtid som författare, föreläsare och instruktör inom HBTQ, Mindfulness och personlig utveckling, främst inriktad på stresshantering och förebyggande.

/Mina Rudin

mina@rudin.biz
https://www.facebook.com/wilhelmina.rudin

Our teachers are experts in delivering virtual instruction. As technology plays a large role in daily lives, it also has a large impact on World Language Instruction. Name: Disability Awareness
Description:
Disability awareness is an important part of establishing inclusion for people with disability. Often our fears and discomfort about interacting with people with disability is based on lack of knowledge, uncertainties, and stereotypes that can influence your attitudes. It makes sense that the more informed you are the more likely that you will feel comfortable communicating and interacting with someone with a disability at work or in your community.

Misconceptions about people with disability are often the result of lack of awareness.

Developed as part of the Australian Government initiative, National Disability Coordination Officer Program, Disability Awareness Training is an eLearning training freely available in Australia. Its content is ideal for someone who has minimal or no knowledge of disability, and can be used as a refresher course to be applied across:

The workplace: Incorporate into induction training for new or existing staff members. It complements cultural awareness and ethics training programs that you may already have in place. It can help you to achieve social equity targets by building the capacity of your staff to understand disability.

The community: Build confidence in your interactions with people with disability, learn tips for better communication, discover where to find out more information about particular disability topics and share your new knowledge with others.

Name: Conversation Exchange
Description:
Through Conversation Exchange you can practice your second language with native speakers living in your area.

But how exactly does it work?

Well, the best way to explain it is through an example.

Pedro is from Spain and has recently moved to New York. His English is a bit patchy and he would like to improve it. John is from New York and he is learning Spanish, but he never has the opportunity to listen and speak to native Spanish speakers. Now, John and Pedro could help each other out. For example they can meet up in a café once a week and have a conversation exchange, speaking half an hour in English and half an hour in Spanish. There is no cost or homework involved and you learn the language in a social environment. Furthermore, you are more likely to learn slang and other things about a culture that you do not usually learn in a formal language class.

Mission: To raise awareness of the common area between language and law

Vision: To be the most successful, specialized, market-oriented training center in the world in our areas of interest

LinguistLawyer is a unique training center with a very exceptional approach.

We are unique because we are the first-ever training center that mainly focuses on the common area between language and law (e.g. legal translation, legal English, legal drafting/writing  and legal interpreting)!

Our approach is very exceptional because our main objective is not only to provide specialized training in the above-mentioned domains but also to raise awareness of the GRAY area between language and law. We call it the "gray" area because it falls within the common boundaries of language and law. Legal translation, for example, is a mission that can never be accomplished in a professional way by a mere lawyer who is not armed with language skills.

We raise awareness through:

• Regular text posts on LinguistLawyer’s professional and social media on LinkedIn, Facebook and Twitter, etc.
• Guiding/educational videos on LinguistLawyer’s YouTube Channel

Say goodbye to disengaged learners with our interactive learning management system.

Pukunui, a company founded in Perth, Western Australia in the year 2000, has a clear mission to revolutionise education by providing cutting-edge e-learning solutions to institutions of all sizes. The company's team of experienced professionals from the education and IT sectors is committed to making education accessible to everyone, everywhere.

With a lead developer who played a crucial role in writing the core Moodle code, Pukunui has a deep understanding of the challenges facing educators today. The company recognised that traditional classroom-based teaching is no longer enough to engage and inspire learners, which led them to turn to Moodle, a local product of outstanding quality.

In 2004, Pukunui became an official Moodle partner, and although not currently a partner, we are still involved in the ongoing development of the core Moodle code, striving to make the platform even better for educators and learners alike. Today, Pukunui is a global enterprise with offices in Perth, Hong Kong, and Kuala Lumpur, and serves clients from around the world.

We understand that every institution is unique, and there is no one-size-fits-all solution when it comes to education. That's why we offer custom e-learning solutions tailored to the specific needs of each and every client. Our interactive learning management system, based on the core Moodle code, provides educators with the flexibility to create engaging and effective learning experiences that cater to the diverse needs of their learners. With Pukunui, say goodbye to disengaged learners and embrace active learning that is customised to your institution's requirements.

At Pukunui, the belief is that education is a lifelong journey, and the company is poised to assist learners at every step of the way. Be a part of Pukunui's mission to transform education and unleash the potential of learners worldwide.

Name: Institute of Management Specialists
Description:
The Institute of Management Specialists (IMS) was founded in 1971 and is a United Kingdom based professional qualification awarding body, listed in the Kogan Page publication ‘British Qualifications’. It is also listed in the BTEC Higher National Professional Recognition & Progression Directory and is on the UK Register for Learning Providers (Provider Reference Number 10035444).

The IMS is the professional body for Management Specialists and offers Specialised Manager designation to members in their specialist management field. 

Members gaining a Specialised Manager Award can then follow our CPD (Continuous Professional Development) programme and by submitting annual CPD reports can qualify for Certified Specialist Manager status.

The Institute has a multiple grade membership system which recognises the professional level of members, both through education levels achieved and through successful senior level career achievement. Individuals can apply for progression during the course of their membership and career. Grades available are: Student, Associate Member, Full Member, Fellow and Companion. 

A professional membership diploma is issued as visible evidence of commitment and professionalism. Members are also entitled to use the appropriate designatory letters after their name on business cards, letter headings etc. 

IMS issues an E-Journal free to members twice a year, in January and July, which keeps members informed about what is happening within the Institute and contains articles of interest to management specialists. 

Reciprocal membership arrangements are maintained with a number of other professional bodies to allow members the benefit of further developing their professional qualifications. The IMS also has an expanding network of Chapters in other countries.

Name: Academia Internacional de Psicologia Analítica
Description:
A Academia Internacional de Psicologia Analítica / International Academy of Analytical Psychology - IAAP, surgiu da necessidade em orientar estudantes de Doutoramento e de Pós-Graduação em Psicologia na área de especialidade de Psicologia Analítica, em Portugal. Não existindo quem fizesse o acompanhamento académico deste tipo de investigadores, foi fundado um núcleo independente de apoio com o objectivo de colmatar tão grande lacuna formativa. Entretanto, a ideia que preside à IAAP foi crescendo e engloba agora um conjunto de outros colaboradores e formações, bem como supervisão pedagógica e clínica quer na área da Psicologia Analítica como na área da Psicologia Clínica, únicas no seu género em Portugal.

Um pouco mais da nossa história e contexto
A abrangência dos pressupostos da Psicologia Analítica aliada aos mais recentes desenvolvimentos nas Neurociências, nas Ciências Cognitivas e na Etologia permite um ângulo mais abrangente de observação e compreensão das diversas questões da profundidade humana, nomeadamente as raízes filogenéticas/arquetípicas — mecanismos biológicos evolutivamente antigos — subjacentes ao comportamento humano e de como tais mecanismos se atualizam dinamicamente nos diversos contextos culturais.
A Psicologia Analítica, compreensivelmente, tem vindo a ser alvo de grande interesse por parte de muitos profissionais de saúde pelo mundo inteiro, devido ao seu caráter integrador e de eficácia terapêutica; lamentavelmente, encontra-se esquecida e, de uma forma séria e científica, pouco divulgada em Portugal. Daqui a salutar vantagem de difundir, discutir e aplicar os seus fundamentos e técnicas psicoterapêuticas, tão úteis face às necessidades da vida ocidental contemporânea.

Description:
O Tesla Concursos públicos para engenharia foi iniciado por alunos de pós-graduação da Universidade Estadual de Campinas com o objetivo de suprir uma folga que existe no ramo educacional de engenharia de atender engenheiros formados no sentido de facilitar sua preparação para concursos públicos.

A empresa começou de maneira simples montando uma equipe de pessoas preparadas e dispostas a estudar o assunto de maneira organizada e científica. As aulas começaram em parceria com o Curso Base de nosso amigo Américo Montenegro, um cursinho preparatório para escolas técnicas. Hoje o Tesla dispõe de espaço próprio e plataforma de ensino à distância pioneira no Brasil.

A idéia proposta é atender tanto ao público que sinta deficiências de formação para a realização das provas quanto àqueles já distantes da faculdade e meio acadêmico e que portanto precisam de uma revisão orientada de conceitos que constam das provas de concursos. Juntamente com a tarefa de cobrir essas folgas, o Tesla se propõe a identificar temas recorrentes e estratégias de prova de concurso elaboradas pela bancas examinadoras para dotar os  alunos de uma perspectiva otimizada e inteligente de prestar os concursos.

Name: OnlineBioinfo
Description:
Esse projeto surgiu do nosso desejo de compartilhar e trocar conhecimento sobre Bioinformática e Biologia Computacional com pessoas de diversas formações e das diversas regiões do país.

O objetivo principal desse projeto é motivar os bioinformatas sobre como a computação pode contribuir significativamente não só na organização e armazenamento dos dados biológicos, como também a resolver problemas em aberto nas ciências biológicas através do uso ou desenvolvimento de modelos, algoritmos e ferramentas computacionais. Além disso, devido à complexidade da grande maioria do problemas em bioinformática, essa área traz interessantes demandas para os cientistas da computação que são, muitas vezes, instigados a desenvolverem modelos e algoritmos inovadores.

Por ser uma área interdisciplinar, há diversas peculiaridades e dificuldades que um estudante interessado em ingressar na área precisa sobrepor. Acreditamos que a primeira e mais importante delas seja selecionar o conteúdo que precisa aprender, segundo a sua área de formação, priorizando os conhecimentos que precisa adquirir para desenvolver primeiramente as competências mais importantes para obter sucesso na sua empreitada de cruzar as fronteiras da sua área. Tenho convicção de que estes estudantes precisam receber uma formação base em áreas complementares à de sua formação. Para que seja bem sucedida, essa formação deve ser preparada especialmente para estudantes com determinada formação. Em uma fase posterior, após terem adquirido os fundamentos da sua área complementar, esses estudantes devem cursar tópicos mais avançados nos quais irão interagir com estudantes de diversas áreas de formação. Em resumo, em um primeiro momento, o estudante deve buscar adquirir fundamentos de áreas complementares, conquistando um vocabulário interdisciplinar e, no segundo momento, deve ser buscar interagir com pessoas de outras áreas para, em conjunto, discutir e resolver problemas significativos da área de bioinformática. Essa troca é essencial mas é preciso uma preparação mesmo que breve para que essa interação seja mais efetiva.

Description:
We have over 10 years of experience helping clients build meaningful careers and sky rocketing their income. 

Clients come to us because:

* They are either sick of applying for jobs and never hearing back
* Tired of being ghosted by recruiters
* Overwhelmed with perfecting each aspect of the job search (resume, networking, following up, interviewing, negotiating correctly, and everything else in between)
* Not knowing if they are making the right decision
* Confused by how to answer specific questions during interviews
* Or all of the above

This is where we come in:

Our customized coaching programs take the stress, uncertainty and hard work out of the job search. We work with you to determine and/or create your career goals and then put together an easy-to-follow roadmap to help you achieve your career goals. We don't just help you look for a job, but we make sure that your next job helps set you up for the rest of your career. 

We Offer 3 Programs:

Career Foundations:
Whether you are a recent grad, upcoming grad, just finished up a bootcamp, or simply looking to start over, this course is specifically designed to help you set the foundation you need to begin your new career the right way.

Career Evolution:
The Career Evolution course is right for you if you’ve established yourself in your career. The clients in this course range from professionals who have been working for in their respective fields for 5+ years, up to 15+ years. They now want to take the experience that they have gained and scale their career into a more senior-level position (including moving into the executive ranks). 

Private Coaching:
This program is designed specifically for perform better with one-on-one, personalized assistance. You will work directly with the Founder of CareerSprout, Gaurav Valani, to enhance and develop the tools, skills, and confidence you need to be successful in today’s job market.

Visit our website to learn more.

To tackle this issue of young people seeking knowledge in personal finance, Shyam created ithoughtwealth. We are a community that aims to educate young people in their 20s & 30s on personal finance. This community is for those who are curious, ambitious, and disciplined. With the right guidance, these traits will lead you to financial freedom.

This channel seeks to provide a holistic view of the financial world. We go beyond stock tips and hot picks. We believe in maintaining depth, quality, and objectivity in our financial analysis of both products and markets. 

We cater to those with no background in personal finance and to those who pursue it with a passion. Our content is original and free of conflicts. Our intention is to raise financial awareness and ask the questions that nobody is asking. 

We invite you to make this community yours by participating and bringing your friends here.

Name: New Neuromarketing
Description:
As marketing practitioners who love results, we love science.

But as schedules usually get tighter and tighter, most of us have little time to actually dive into the big bulk of science that gets published each month. And those that dare typically stumble upon long lists of obscure studies, filled with scientific mumbo-jumbo that’s often hard to decipher.

Monthly Bridging Science And Practice
New Neuromarketing bridges the gap between fuzzy science and straight solid application. Our team of writers uncover the biggest neuromarketing gems each month and transform them into clear bit-sized articles. No abstractions. No jargon. No p-values.

We Bring You The 5% That Matters
5%. That’s the number of scientific studies that actually offers some real world application. What remains is a large chunk of contrived experiments held in artificial lab settings that have no resemblance to the real world in which consumers buy our products and services.

Each month, New Neuromarketing carefully screens all articles published in journals on the neurosciences, behavioral sciences and marketing. We select only the ones that we believe are truly valuable to you, the marketer.

That’s where true insights come from.

An unserem Entwicklungszentrum in München konzipieren und erproben wir fortschrittliche Maßnahmen zur Beruflichen Weiterbildung, die der Dynamik des Technologiewandels sowie den Anforderungen des Arbeitsmarktes von heute in besonderer Weise gerecht werden. Mit mehr als 30.000 Absolventinnen und Absolventen verfügen wir über umfangreiche Erfahrungen in der Entwicklung und Durchführung von innovativen Bildungsangeboten.

Alle Kunden der ebam Akademie partizipieren in besonderem Maße an unserer individuellen Qualifizierungsberatung. Egal ob Fachseminar, Kurzlehrgang oder förderbare Weiterbildung – Live Streaming Education an der ebam Akademie ist eine jahrelang bewährte und zeitgemäße Form der Bildung, um auch komplexe Lehrinhalte zuverlässig vermitteln zu können.

Name: Fluent Football
Description:
Welcome to Fluent Football – the football-focused online English platform offering private English lessons for football professionals and fans.

Our goal is simple – to offer high quality, fun and professional classes that will allow you to gain confidence speaking English whilst focusing on the area that is more relevant to you – football!

All classes are delivered online – meaning you can learn from the comfort of your own home. Classes are always private (one-on-one) with your English teacher, maximising your learning experience and allowing you to improve quickly.

As for our teachers, they are experienced, TEFL-qualified and friendly native speakers….and, just like you, they are passionate about all-things football.

Do you want to improve your English and take your performances to a new level?
Are you interested in advancing your career in football and need the English to do so?
Or do you simply love discussing the beautiful game with others around the world?

Whatever your reasons, whatever your ability, our teachers are here to help.

TechLabs offers a unique learning experience for all participants, using modern e-learning tools, individual learning paths for each participant, and experienced mentors. The community is open to everyone – independent of their background or prior knowledge (in fact, most of our new participants have no or just very limited coding experience). Beyond that, TechLabs actively supports all community members to apply their new tech skills in practice.
The world needs digital shapers more than ever before – so let's build them now!

Name: Sociology Perspective
Description:
Sociology Perspective merupakan sebuah wadah bagi para penggiat sosiologi di seluruh indonesia dengan pendekatan yang berbeda dari biasanya. Tujuan kami ingin memperkenalkan sebuah sosiologi yang dikemas lebih menarik, simple dan lucu.

Ide ini lahir oleh seorang mahasiswa asal bogor yang menempuh studinya di kota malang. Didirikan oleh Lhotse Sumarno pada tanggal 5 oktober 2020. Kala itu muncul sebuah keresahan akan mendirikan sebuah akun sosiologi namun dibungkus hal yang lebih lucu dan simple, terlintas juga ingin memperkenalkan sosiologi lebih dapat diterima luas oleh masyarakat tanpa harus hanya diterima oleh segelintir elitis yang hanya bisa mempelajari sosiologi.

Berangkat dari keresahan tersebut kami juga melihat beberapa akun sosiologi di indonesia umumnya hanya menggunakan teori yang cukup terbatas dan memperkenalkan tokoh yang cukup terbatas, hal ini lantas membuat kami ingin membagikan sebuah teori yang lebih luas agar para pembaca tidak hanya mengenal tokoh klasik di dalam sosiologi tersebut.

Menindaklanjuti keresahan itu Sociology Perspective juga mengajak para penggiat sosiologi turut bergabung membantu perkembangan dari akun ini, dengan adanya akun ini diharapkan kedepannya dapat membangkitkan semangat dari para sosiolog untuk terus mengembangkan ilmunya agar dapat diterapkan di masyarakat

Name: Danaë
Description:
Wij koppelen missie en mensen voor een duurzaam resultaat. Dit doen we door blended leerconcepten en -producten te ontwikkelen en organisatieadvies te geven.

Een leven lang leren vinden wij vanzelfsprekend. Wist je dat iedereen uiteindelijk zelf bepaalt wat hij leert? Als je dan de juiste tools en expertise tot je beschikking hebt,  kom je waar je wilt zijn. Om een organisatie of een individu naar het volgende level te helpen, ga je op zoek naar de juiste tools, inhoud en begeleiding. Zo groeien we door te leren, het houdt nooit op. Danaë heeft daar haar specialisme van gemaakt. Want zeg nou zelf: moeiteloos meebewegen met veranderingen, wie wil dat nou niet?

Danaë ondersteunt onderwijsinstellingen en bedrijven bij het inrichten van educatie. Motiverend, inspirerend en gedegen onderwijs waarin sprake is van een evenwicht tussen structuur en vrijheid. Een evenwicht dat er toe leidt dat de deelnemers zich optimaal ontwikkelen. Danaë zorgt dat onderwijs werkt.

Danaë ondersteunt in elke fase van het groei-, verander- of implementatietraject en verbindt zich aan haar klanten door het opleveren van concrete producten na elke doorlopen fase.

Producten en diensten: e-trainingen, e-learning, blended learning, advies, maatwerk, opleidingen, (doorlopende) leerlijnen, digitale didactiek, edutainment, gamification.

Name: Instituto de Educação e Análise do Comportamento - IEAC
Description:
O IEAC é um instituto de formação avançada para profissionais da saúde e da educação, especializado em pós-graduações e treinamentos baseados em evidências científicas. Desde 2016, capacitamos equipes, escolas, clínicas e gestores com programas robustos fundamentados na ciência do comportamento, garantindo formação técnica qualificada e alinhada às demandas reais do campo.

Nossa atuação combina rigor metodológico, aplicabilidade prática e compromisso com o desenvolvimento profissional contínuo. Todos os nossos programas são construídos para elevar a qualidade dos serviços prestados no Brasil, apoiando instituições que buscam equipes mais competentes, seguras e alinhadas às melhores práticas internacionais.

O IEAC é parceiro oficial da IBCCES e reconhecido pela profundidade dos conteúdos, consistência acadêmica e clareza na transformação profissional. Nossa produção científica é fortalecida pelo Trylha Lab, a revista digital do IEAC dedicada à disseminação de conhecimento baseado em evidências, artigos acadêmicos e análises críticas do campo. Essa iniciativa reforça nosso compromisso permanente com a ciência e com a responsabilidade técnica na formação de profissionais.

Com pós-graduações, cursos livres e iniciativas editoriais, o IEAC mantém uma estrutura sólida, premium e orientada a resultados, atendendo instituições que desejam formar times mais preparados e promover práticas educacionais e clínicas com excelência.

Name: Lit Skills Learning
Description:
Lit Skills Learning, works to develop a suite of online educational resources for parents and teachers to successfully reach every student in the classroom and at home. Our goal is to provide the effective, affordable, easy-to-use tools that educators require to meet the needs of today’s diverse student population.

We understand the importance of keeping students engaged and thinking creatively. At Lit Skills we are constantly working on new ways to get students plugged into learning. We see the passion teachers bring to the classroom, and we try to exemplify that passion in the resources we provide to help them do their job.

Lit Skills seeks to ignite potential through a range of World Class educational offerings and services that cater to diverse needs. Lit Skills has evolved a very unique “Edu-tainment” (Education through Entertainment) model to help perfect education In-class and after class hours.

We focus on enrichment of the top of the pyramid and remediation of the bottom of the pyramid students globally.

Lit skills also works towards imparting the less tangible traits, as we may call them; core skills, non-cognitive skills, employability skills, character, social and emotional learning, 21st Century learning, and more. Each of these addresses similar and overlapping sets of strengths. These characteristics go a long way in supporting success in nearly any field, yet they are generally learned on the job or around the dinner table rather than in the classroom. At Lit Skills we focus on providing proper guidance and classroom activities to reinforce the importance of these skills and enable students to practice behaviors sought by employers.

Name: S'envisager autrement
Description:
Des parcours de formation dédiés au savoir-être et à la communication consciente !

S'envisager autrement vous propose des parcours de formation pour vous permettre d'acquérir et de développer des compétences essentielles autant dans la sphère personnelle que professionnelle, aussi connues sous le nom de "soft skills"

Souhaitez-vous vivre et/ou travailler dans un environnement qui privilégie une qualité de vie ?  Le savoir-être ouvre un espace où les rencontres respectueuses et harmonieuses deviennent possibles.

S'intéresser au savoir-être et à la communication consciente, c'est chercher la qualité de la relation à soi et Soi (la connaissance et la conscience de soi) : elle est essentielle car elle influence nos choix de vie. Et vouloir vivre un relationnel harmonieux avec les autres…

Le monde d'aujourd'hui nous invite à changer nos fonctionnements et modes relationnels. Tout changement est un défi à relever ! Il est essentiel de connaitre et donc pouvoir s'appuyer sur nos ressources intérieures et nos forces. 

Développer son savoir-être et une communication consciente est une étape incontournable pour interagir efficacement et sereinement avec les autres, être en capacité de s’adapter à n’importe quel défi et contribuer positivement à un environnement de travail ou à des relations interpersonnelles.

Nos parcours de formation facilitent le développement de vos ressources actuelles et futures, en respectant votre autonomie.
Ils sont conçus de manière hybride et interactive, offrant une expérience d'apprentissage unique.

Plus que des formations... des voyages riches de rencontres avec Soi et les autres ! "S'envisager autrement"
propose des Aventures Humaines et Humanistes !

Actuellement 5 parcours sont proposés :
Libérez votre voix !
Libérez votre voix... avec le chant !
Votre voix, un atout pour une communication efficace et consciente !
Prendre sa place
Parcours sur mesure

Name: Exploros
Description:
Austin, TX and Boston, MA

Exploros is an enterprise SAAS solution for K12 instructional improvement. 

Exploros drives student engagement in the live, teacher-guided classroom. As all students become active participants, Exploros automatically develops learning portfolios and Classroom Analytics at the student, class, campus, and district level. 

Administrators, curriculum coordinators, teachers, and students have greater visibility into curriculum and academic progress and are better equipped to improve outcomes.

In a recent Social Studies case study, 94% of campuses using Exploros for U.S. History instruction improved on state testing. The study, representing 19K students of all demographics, showed an average performance gain of 29%. These astounding gains are in comparison to nation decline in social studies performance, where NAEP warns that only 15% of 8th-grade students in the U.S. are proficient in Social Studies. 

This case study is just one example of how Exploros improves outcomes. "The reason Exploros impact is so significant is rather obvious," says Exploros CEO Bradley Heilman. "Today's student is not particularly engaged in school. By allowing students to securely use social media skills to share ideas in the live teacher-guided classroom, we give every student a voice. Students then engage in learning-standards-based interaction. Teachers see what students do and don't understand in real-time, and can guide dialog and other aspects of the classroom experience accordingly." In short, engaging students and assisting teachers during social instruction yields great results.

Exploros is the only teacher-guided instructional platform that enables the delivery of strong, social pedagogy. Exploros is a Google Partner, an Amazon EdStart Partner, and is pioneering real-time data interoperability and machine learning teaching assistance.

Name: Gwinnett Online Campus
Description:
Gwinnett County Online Campus is the oldest online program in Georgia, serving students since 1999. It has grown from serving 122 students in summer school or 7th period in 2000 to over 5000 segments in 2015. The program has expanded to include 175 secondary courses, middle grades courses, upper elementary courses, math support classes, online credit recovery, special entity support, and curriculum resources and support.


 In 2005, students were provided the option to take courses as a part of their regular school day. Each year the number of students taking courses online has increased. Gwinnett Online Campus has been one of the largest district level supplemental online programs in the United States for a number of years.


 In March of 2010, the Gwinnett County Board of Education voted to approve Gwinnett Online Campus as a full-time charter school. In April of 2011, the State Board of Education approved the GOC Charter.  Gwinnett Online Campus Charter School opened as a full-time option for high school students in the fall of 2011.  The next year, middle grades were added to the school.  In the fall of 2013, elementary students in grades four and five enrolled in Gwinnett Online Campus full-time. GOC is committed to build upon a high level of success as a world class supplemental program to become the best diploma-granting, online school in the nation.

Name: ilimi
Description:
ilimi is a new-generation platform for corporate and career-building courses. Over the next few months, ilimi will offer courses around cloud computing, advanced Java, big-data technologies, data analytics, software architecture and performance engineering. 

The ilimi course experience is unique. We offer a differentiated set of courses that enables our learners to accomplish real-world outcomes. We guarantee that an ilimi learner is ready to contribute what they have learnt in a project team. 

ilimi is truly focused on the learner. To begin with, ilimi’s courses are created by practitioners. They are therefore, rich with real-life experience and with what a student needs to know in their work. ilimi then supports individual learners with tutoring, with supplemental content and hands-on real-world exercises till they have mastered the concepts they need to know. The ilimi learning environment has video content, Q&A, live tutor interactions, quizzes and even a full-fledged programming IDE. 

ilimi is a MOOC platform with some significant differences. The earlier generation of MOOC technologies have been phenomenally successful at creating high quality courses. They however have not been as successful at ensuring that their students are trained. ilimi addresses this problem. At the heart of ilimi is technology that enables deep analytics, semantic computing and collaborative computing. This enables ilimi to be a pedagogic platform - not just an LMS and guarantee an individual learning experience for everyone even at MOOC scales of hundreds of thousands of learners. the ilimi model also makes it very simple for a practitioner to teach - our technology automates the task of converting a lecture video into a full-fledged learning object with assessment, related content, concepts etc 

The ilimi platform is available as a white-labeled, cloud based offering and is already in use with one of the largest education service providers.

Name: Machine Learning with scikit-learn Quick Start Guide
Description:
Deploy supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms using scikit-learn to perform classification, regression, and clustering.

Key Features

Build your first machine learning model using scikit-learn
Train supervised and unsupervised models using popular techniques such as classification, regression and clustering
Understand how scikit-learn can be applied to different types of machine learning problems

Book Description

Scikit-learn is a robust machine learning library for the Python programming language. It provides a set of supervised and unsupervised learning algorithms. This book is the easiest way to learn how to deploy, optimize, and evaluate all of the important machine learning algorithms that scikit-learn provides.

This book teaches you how to use scikit-learn for machine learning. You will start by setting up and configuring your machine learning environment with scikit-learn. To put scikit-learn to use, you will learn how to implement various supervised and unsupervised machine learning models. You will learn classification, regression, and clustering techniques to work with different types of datasets and train your models.

Finally, you will learn about an effective pipeline to help you build a machine learning project from scratch. By the end of this book, you will be confident in building your own machine learning models for accurate predictions.

Learn how to work with all scikit-learn's machine learning algorithms
Install and set up scikit-learn to build your first machine learning model
Employ Unsupervised Machine Learning Algorithms to cluster unlabelled data into groups
Perform classification and regression machine learning
Use an effective pipeline to build a machine learning project from scratch

Description:
The Tiger Global Case Competition (TGCC) is the first ever global, virtual, high school case competition brought to the community by Principal Partner, Tiger Global Management, Official Sponsor PricewaterhouseCoopers, and powered by Crimson Education. 

TGCC Committee is made up of over 70 students from 18 countries bringing this opportunity to fellow students around the world to support learning from home! 

The Tiger Global Case Competition brings the business case competition experience, usually reserved for university students, directly to high school students (aged 14 - 18) around the world! It will be held completely online, and is a chance for students to develop and test their creativity and entrepreneurial spirit on the global stage. 

The first TGCC was held in 2017 and attracted high school students from all over the world, culminating with the global finals held in Singapore. In 2018, TGCC expanded its reach even further and received hundreds of registrations from seven countries and 10 cities. A team of students from Vietnam ultimately became the global winners of TGCC after the finals round in Canberra, Australia. In 2020, the TGCC will be held completely online!

Case competitions are the perfect stepping stones to a career in any industry. Big corporations and startups alike need skilled problem-solvers. For the ﬁrst time, we are bringing a completely virtual case competition to ambitious high school students in every country around the world!

Our online learning platform is dedicated to enhancing the capacities of leaders and practitioners in advancing primary prevention efforts to stop the perpetration of violence. We currently offer a comprehensive set of five online modules designed to advance a shared understanding of primary prevention, the root causes and drivers of the perpetration of violence, the purpose and role of violence prevention policies and legislation, and how organizations and individuals can disrupt violence and discrimination in their own spheres of influence.

In addition to our online modules, we collaborate directly with system leaders, organizations and networks to develop tailored capacity building opportunities that address their specific needs to advance gender equity and violence prevention. Our goal is to support the creation of an exemplar prevention workforce across various regions, governments, and organizations within the anti-violence sector. We are open to discussing any ideas on how we can work together to achieve this objective.

Let's work together to build a stronger and more resilient prevention workforce. Email info@shifttolearn.com

Name: Lifestyle Al Cuadrado
Description:
Lifestyle al Cuadrado es el referente hispano en la formación de negocios online del conocimiento. Es decir, negocios basados en productos digitales, software y servicios. 

Nuestra misión es ayudar a los emprendedores digitales a impulsar sus proyectos para que vivan una vida más libre y plena, que no les exija ser esclavos de su tiempo.  

EN OTRAS PALABRAS, SOMOS UNA ACELERADORA DIGITAL.

Lifestyle al Cuadrado nació de la mano de Franck Scipion en 2010. Lo que entonces era solo un blog, hoy en día se ha transformado en un negocio online con una facturación anual superior al medio millón de euros y más de 3000 clientes de 25 países. 

Además, cuenta con un equipo de 6 personas a tiempo completo y colaboradores a tiempo parcial, que trabajan en remoto.

SIN BANCOS NI INVERSORES.

Esta es una empresa bootstrapping. Nunca hemos acudido a bancos ni inversores privados. Y tampoco pensamos en hacerlo. Al contrario, nos retroalimentamos de nuestras propias ventas para seguir creciendo.

MÁS SOBRE FRANCK SCIPION

Franck Scipion es un emprendedor reincidente. Lifestyle al Cuadrado es su tercer proyecto desde el año 2000.

Su recorrido profesional es algo atípico. Ingeniero en Aeronáutica de formación, ha llegado a tener bajo su responsabilidad diferentes equipos digitales (periodistas, e-marketers y técnicos) y cosechó cerca de medio millón de usuarios únicos mensuales en el sector de la salud, como estratega digital.

Ahora, se dedica a compartir su Know How para ayudar a otros emprendedores digitales a crear un negocio online.

En 2016, Franck publicó su primer libro: Revolución Knowmada. 

Se trata de una hoja de ruta, totalmente práctica para crear desde cero un modelo de negocio que permita a los lectores controlar su destino y vivir la vida que quieren.  Él lo define como una síntesis de todo lo que le hubiera gustado que le contasen cuando emprendió en Internet.

Síguenos en: 

https://www.lifestylealcuadrado.com/
https://www.linkedin.com/in/franckscipion/

Name: CELearning - eLearning System for Modern Teams
Description:
CELearning - egy hatékony e-learning rendszer, mely a munkatárs belépésének napján indul, és az utolsó záróvizsgával zárul. Automatikusan végigvezeti a munkatársakat a teljes képzési folyamaton. Előnye, hogy az összes oktatási anyag egy helyen található és interaktívvá tehető azáltal, hogy az egyes munkakörök számára szabadon hozzáférhető tudásanyag is feltölthető, legyen ez akár egy dokumentum, hangfile vagy video. 
 A CELearning rendszerben az ellenőrző lapokhoz hozzárendelt és automatikusan generált kérdéssorok megadott kérdésszámmal, kitöltésre rendelkezésre álló idővel és határidővel, automatikus kiértékeléssel érhetőek el. A tesztek automatikusan generált eredménye vagy az offline képzések oktatói által manuálisan feltöltött eredményei egyaránt hozzáférhetőek. A statisztikák egy kattintással lekérdezhetőek: munkakörök, áruházak/telephelyek, időszakok, oktatások szerint. Szabadon paraméterezhető automatikus emlékeztető e-maileket állíthatunk be annak érdekében, hogy a betanulók ütemezetten, a terveknek megfelelően haladjanak. 
_________________

CELearning is an effective learning management system that starts on the day the employee enters and ends with the final exam. It manages the entire educational process assigned to a position. All educational materials are in one place, and freely available knowledge materials can be uploaded for each position (document, sound file, video). 
In the CELearning system the series of questions assigned and automatically generated to the checklists are available with a specified number of questions, the time and deadline available for completion, and automatic evaluation. Both automatically generated test results or manually uploaded results from offline trainings are available. One-click query statistics by people, jobs, stores / locations, time periods, education. Freely configurable automatic reminder emails to keep learners on schedule.

Tijd voor Geschiedenis is een digitale methode voor het vak Geschiedenis voor alle leerlingen van het voortgezet onderwijs.

Tijd voor Geschiedenis werkt op alle (bring your own) devices.

Tijd voor Geschiedenis is volledig ingericht volgens het nieuwe examenprogramma (2015) met de historische contexten. Zo zijn de verplichte voorbeelden uit het nieuwe examenprogramma opgenomen in de tekst en opdrachten. Dit geldt eveneens voor de historische vaardigheden in het examenprogramma.

Wat Tijd voor Geschiedenis ook anders maakt, is het gebruik van de werkvormen van het team Actief Historisch Denken. Deze werkvormen zijn ze geïntegreerd in tekst en opdrachten en nog meer activerend, doordat de antwoorden direct zichtbaar zijn ter bespreking.

Name: Vital Links for Occupational Therapists
Description:
WHAT WE DO: At Vital Links we use sensory integration therapy to improve performance and functionality. With a deep understanding of sensation and how it impacts the body’s entire system, we help children struggling with functional limitations enhance their everyday performance and adapt more comfortably to their surroundings. We also offer continuing education courses for other passionate occupational therapists looking to mix science and art into their practices and think outside the box. 

WHO WE WORK WITH: Through our continuing education programming, we teach occupational therapists, families of our patients and anyone interested in enhancing everyday performance with sensory integration. 

HOW WE DO IT:  At Vital Links, we focus less on diagnosis and more on improving functionality and finding balance for each individual child. We look at how our patients use their senses to function within the world and create an individual sensory treatment plan that enables them to get the most out of their life. 

THE RESULT: The changes we see in the children we work with is what keeps us motivated. We’ve seen children who once couldn’t speak begin talking and have seen children be able to interact more comfortable within their environment after working with our team. Through our continuing education courses, we’re also able to pass on our 30+ years of clinical practice to other occupational therapists looking to enhance their practice with our treatment tools. 

OUR SECRET INGREDIENT/WHAT OTHERS SAY: “I’ve seen the value of Therapeutic Listening in the clinic where I work, so eager to use it myself. Well prepared, thorough responses to questions, helpful bridging from concepts to clinical applications.” - ERIN, Course Attendee

READY TO TALK? Whether you know of someone who could benefit from sensory integration therapy or are interested in joining one of our many continuing education courses, we want to talk. Contact Vital Links at www.vitallinks.net

Az óvónők számára megküldött statisztikák, pontosabb gyermekfejlesztést, tehetség gondozást, esetleg a gyorsabban felfedezett részképességzavarok korábbi kezelését teszik lehetővé. A szülők pedig szintén pontosabb képet kapnak arról, hogy gyermekeiknek milyen elmaradásaik, vagy épp rejtett tehetségeik vannak.

Óvodák számára fejlesztett játékunk, 16 képességet mér, ami 16 játékba van ágyazva. Használata nem igényel semmilyen IT tudást, az óvónők munkáját segíti a gyermekek fejlettségi szintjének felmérésében. A mérési statisztikák az óvónő e-mailjére küldjük havonta.

Segítsük együtt az óvodások fejlődését.
