Name: IMDG Code Courses
Description:
Our internationally recognized IMDG Code courses are didactically strong and rich in interactive content and clarification, with officialese text presented in everyday English. 

We have the right course for every role or function:

# Awareness course: for general management and ship’s crew
Provides a general overview of the provisions and requirements of the IMDG Code.

# Basic course: for anyone who is directly involved in maritime dangerous goods transport
Meets the mandatory training requirements of the IMDG Code.

# Function-specific courses: Basic course tailored to specific functions
In-depth training on parts that are essential to specific roles, supplemented with basic training on adjacent fields. All four meet the mandatory training requirements of the IMDG Code.

# Advanced course: for managers and safety specialists
The most comprehensive course. The Advanced course offers in-depth training in all aspects of maritime dangerous goods transport.

● eLearning Development: There is no such thing as a quick translation from an in-person to online learning experience. L’Art Learning à l’instar de la poésie se révèle comme le plus beau symbole de l’apprentissage. 

Le grain pédagogique est comme une rime orpheline.  

C’est à nous de jouer avec ces grains sur la forme et le sens tout en travaillant sur leur agencement et l’équilibre pour sublimer l’acte d’apprendre. 

La Poésie est avant tout le premier neurolearning utilisant le rythme comme aide à la mémorisation et à la transmission. 

Il ne faut donc pas oublier qui nous sommes en pleine époque de l’intelligence artificielle mais le symbole, la tradition et l’imaginaire feront toujours germer en nous une émotion irrationnelle mais tellement puissante.  

N’oublions pas non plus le grain de folie car comme dit Roger Talon "à force d'être rationnel, on devient stérile" donc soyons fou dans nos entreprises apprenantes car comme le jazz c’est mieux quand on improvise. 

Avant de conclure ce manifeste, comment ne pas rendre hommage aux Grecs et leur  « Kalos Kagathos » signifiant beau et bon en même temps qui devrait être le premier principe quand nous créons une formation. 

Ponctuant en paraphrasant Jean-Louis Frechin (le design des choses) : 

Pourquoi une formation existe, à quoi elle sert, comment on l'utilise, qui va l’utiliser, et quel plaisir aura-t-on à l'utiliser ?

O Que Oferecemos:

Após a conclusão do curso escolhido, você poderá solicitar seu Certificado, disponível tanto em versão impressa (enviada pelos Correios) quanto digital (enviada por e-mail). Este documento é um poderoso aliado para:

Educação Continuada: Mantenha-se sempre à frente com novas competências.
Titularidade para Professores: Avance na carreira docente.
Ascensão de Carreira ou Cargo: Destaca-se no ambiente corporativo.
Estágios: Conquiste as horas necessárias com facilidade.
Comprovação em Provas de Títulos: Tenha um diferencial em concursos públicos e seleções.
Enriquecimento de Currículo: Aumente sua competitividade no mercado de trabalho.
Segurança e Credibilidade:

Todos os nossos Certificados são emitidos em conformidade com a legislação vigente e registrados com um número único para garantir sua autenticidade. A verificação pode ser realizada facilmente em nosso site, por você ou por qualquer pessoa que necessite comprovar a validade do documento. Esse processo rigoroso elimina fraudes e assegura a confiança e credibilidade do seu Certificado junto ao mercado de trabalho e órgãos reguladores.

Educação Livre e Profissionalizante:

Nossos cursos são classificados como Cursos Livres, de acordo com a Lei nº 9.394, que regulamenta a Educação Profissional de Nível Básico no Brasil. Isso significa que oferecemos educação não-formal, flexível e acessível, com a duração que você precisa para alcançar seus objetivos.

Designers for Learning helps nonprofits and other social enterprises achieve their missions by targeting performance gaps impacting the organization. All students, faculty, and others participating on projects facilitated by Designers for Learning are volunteers of the served organization.

Our Motivation:

With over 2.3 million nonprofit organizations in the US, there is enormous opportunity for the instructional design community to offer performance improvement expertise to help social enterprises achieve their missions. Our Two-Part Mission:

1. To provide nonprofits with instructional design products that improve performance.
2. To provide instructional design students experience to develop their skills.

Name: SupDup Kids
Description:
How great would it be if there were learning mediums for your kids where it didn’t necessarily feel like they have to sit through it! 

Now, imagine if there were more creative ways than one to enable your kids to learn things that they need to build the right skill set! 

And now lastly imagine if that was easily available and accessible to your kids! 

What if we told you that all of these boxes can be ticked with just one App. 

It’s SupDup, India’s first-ever community for Smart Kids. 

SupDup is an app for Masti Bhi, Learning Bhi for the kids. It empowers your kids to learn beyond the traditional realms of gaining knowledge. It enables your kids to learn through 03 mediums. These are: 

Learn while Watching - Here, your children and you get to see what is happening out there in the world viz-a-viz what other kids are doing and simultaneously learning from them. 

Learn with Participation - SupDup has a channel for participation where your kids can participate and put out content just like their friends are doing in the watch section. While they participate in these, they simultaneously learn in the process.

Learn with Workshops - Learning has a 360-degree approach at SupDup because your kids also get to learn from mentors. Hence this section has different workshops, courses, classes, and seminars happening for your children to learn. 

We, at SupDup very firmly believe that learning is a process and one cannot define it in years or hours. Hence we have the best of avenues for your kids to shine through their talent and unleash their creativity- no matter what that is. 

Is your kid ready to become a SupDup kid? Let’s get in touch to discuss the same. We’d love to hear from you. You can reach out to us at support@supdup.app 

To straightaway download the SupDup app, you can head over here:
https://supdup.app/

Name: Thinking in English Podcast
Description:
Thinking in English is a podcast and blog designed for intermediate to advanced English learners. 

With listeners in over 170 countries, more than 20 million downloads, and a community of 500,000+ Spotify followers, Thinking in English is one of the world’s leading resources for ambitious language learners. The show also has nearly 100,000 Apple Podcast followers, 50,000 YouTube subscribers, and a thriving Patreon community of over 500 paying members and 2,000 supporters.

As part of the Airwave Media Network, Thinking in English has collaborated with major global brands including Lingoda and NordVPN, helping learners discover high-quality tools and opportunities to improve their English.

The idea behind Thinking in English is simple: once you reach an advanced level, traditional textbooks, basic language podcasts, and most teachers are no longer enough. 

To truly progress, you need to practice thinking in English, contemplating complex ideas, exploring big questions, and learning through English itself.

Do you want to keep practicing small talk about hobbies and weekend plans? Or would you rather learn how to discuss why the Taliban retook Afghanistan, debate whether the death penalty should still exist, or understand how humanity eradicated smallpox? 

If the second option excites you, then Thinking in English is for you.

Every week, I release episodes on topics including politics, international relations, economics, science, culture, and advanced vocabulary. 

Each episode is written at a native/advanced level but delivered clearly and accessibly, with transcripts and vocabulary explanations to help learners at every step.

Name: Games & Learning
Description:
We see a world where digital tools level the playing field for every child.

There is a clear and urgent need to support kids who are struggling with learning loss, particularly those kids who are also disadvantaged by poverty.

The best digital learning tools - games, apps, e-books, and podcasts - have the power to meet kids where they are, in the unique ways that they learn, and help them to become their best selves.

As edtech founders, our own kids benefit from the outstanding work of our colleagues and partners. But most kids are not connected to tools that are relevant to them and most mission-driven content providers struggle to reach a wide audience. Parents and teachers don’t have time to sort through misleading marketing speak, confusing processes, and predatory products.

We will help to connect students with best-in-class tools that work best for them, by building the home for apps with impact. It will be a place where parents and teachers can easily uncover a wide range of web-based tools, provided at no cost to those who cannot afford them. This work draws from our research with educators serving students in low-income communities, supported by a National Science Foundation Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) award.

We feel privileged to amplify the work of creative storytellers, passionate makers, and organizations on the front lines of educational equity. 

We also provide industry-leading analysis, planning and development services. We understand the needs of students, families, and educators, and the challenges of delivering social impact through media, curriculum, and programs. Our decades of expertise and our extensive network span nonprofits, preK-12 and higher education, afterschool programs, children’s media, technology, and entertainment.

As a social enterprise, we plan to reinvest the majority of our profits to achieve our social mission.

T.E.A.C.H. believes...

2. Teaching Artists are heroes (without steady income).
3. When teachers and teaching artists collaborate to design curriculum incredible connections happen. ie: The physics and music making, learning empathy through history, the mathematics of hip hop!

Is an rare opportunity to connect and share knowledge with fellow creative thinkers and kindred spirits from around the globe! Join us!

Name: Gifted Resources
Description:
Gifted Resources connects parents within a vibrant, interactive community that is designed to encourage and empower them to master the art of raising gifted children.  The framework supports parents to become a strong ally with their children, adapting to their unique needs, providing an architecture that supports their infinite potential, aggregating the best social, emotional, and academic resources, and supporting them as they build affinity with other intellectual peers who truly understand them.  
Gifted Resources was founded by Dr. Brandi Maynard, affectionately called Dr. B by her students, who is passionate about talent development.  She began teaching gifted children in 1997 and built the first online gifted education program in 2002.  The framework that came from her dissertation research morphed into an instruction manual for supporting gifted children that is grounded in research on the best practices of both gifted education and servant leadership.  
Brandi believes that people should lead with their strengths and her superpower is the ability to make connections. She is deeply curious and asks the right questions that lead to powerful connections for her clients.  In a single coaching conversation with Brandi, a mom may come away with everything from concrete strategies she can try the very same day to a warm introduction with another mom because she understands the connection needs to happen for both woman to take the next step in their transformational journey of parenting a gifted child.  Brandi compares her keen ability to connect people to the print, digital, and human resources they need in the moment to the algorithms they use at Match.com.  
Dr. B's  ability to connect others is priceless when helping children find intellectual peers and mentors. She knows how to build vibrant, interactive communities where children are energized by like-minded peers who understand them. Join Dr. B in a community that nurtures gifted children and their parents.

Name: Communication Junction Indonesia
Description: Communication Junction Indonesia has been operating out of Semarang since 2018, focusing on the needs of adult learners. Our "Work Hard, Dream Big" motto drives us to do more smart business and inspires our company to grow year on year. We are now serving multiple divisions of society, extending from professional, corporate, and teens. Our blended learning system characterises us. Blended learning is an instructional strategy that mixes online training with conventional coaching. It requires the physical presence of both teachers and students, with several factors controlling students over time, including location, route, and speed. While students are still attending face-to-face sessions, combining classroom practice with computer-related internal work can result in a faster accumulation of knowledge. This medium is experimental, as well as original, utilising the latest technology from Pearson Education — merging digital multimedia with personalised, face-to-face sessions. Extremely able experts teach in an immersive English speaking setting. CJI also creates seminars and workshops that develop fellowships, where members can build their professional networks, make friends, learn new skills and socialise. Students can also practise their English in a trustworthy and welcoming atmosphere. CJI prides itself on being part of the new start-up culture in Indonesia, assisting in making Indonesians stronger, smarter, wiser, and more competitive provincially, as well as abroad. Other courses just aren’t comprehensive enough for beginners, and after years of using Houdini as our go-to software, we realised it just needs to be better explained. So we made our own to help 3D professionals thrive. Straightforward, high quality training that progressively builds deep understanding.

All Hipflask courses are based on four core principles: structured learning, true depth of knowledge, clear explanations, and real-world skills. This isn’t a quick how-to guide that teaches you to make one thing. With a carefully designed learning path, Hipflask turns years of learning into clear, bite-sized tutorials, unpacking the vital stuff other courses breeze over and putting all crucial learning in one place. We cover the fundamentals in depth, show you why these principles are so integral to Houdini and just how to wield them in crafting, finessing and refining your own original work. 

Mastering Houdini is a big investment of time, so we make sure you’re learning as effectively and efficiently as possible, so that your investment pays off. It’s all about logically building solid generalist skills to take into real-world production.

Name: TutorAlly Inc
Description:
Look. We get it. Your employees have a million other things to do than waste their time learning about stuff they'll forget when they need to use it.

We make sure your employees know exactly what they need to know, when they need to know it, to best do their jobs.

𝗙𝗮𝗰𝘁: End-user training is usually the last thing that people think about.
In the 20+ years that we Oracle financial systems for 20 years, it’s always the same story. On a good project, they’ll have set aside from budget to train end users. But everyone is so involved in trying to get the system right off the get-go, that they seldom think about the people who are left running it for years to come.

𝙏𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝙞𝙨 𝙬𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙬𝙚 𝙝𝙚𝙖𝙧 𝙢𝙤𝙨𝙩 𝙤𝙛𝙩𝙚𝙣: 

“Just do it this way. I don’t know why. This is what I was taught.” 

“We don’t have a central place for training… it’s all squirreled away in people’s desks from when it originally went live.”

“Sure we have the training, but it’s all out-dated. No one’s accountable to update it.”


If you hear these phrases, how can you be sure that you have a systematic and tangible way to ensure that your employees know what they need to know to do their job?


𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘀𝗲 𝗨𝘀?

In the vast number of years that we have trained business users in Oracle, we have noticed several key success factors. 

1. Training needs to be relevant to users’ role in the system. Otherwise, quite simply, people don’t give a damn. Who can blame them?

2. Training is best delivered in bite-sized pieces of material for best retention. 

3. You know it when your body knows it. Being able to practice instead of watching passively goes a long way.

4. Training needs to be delivered by knowledgeable subject matter experts.

Follow us for more awesome content

Name: Professor Ferretto
Description:
Ajudamos jovens de todo o Brasil a conquistar a tão sonhada vaga na universidade!

Daniel Ferretto ou "Professor Ferretto", é um professor e ex-policial federal que ficou conhecido pelo seu canal no YouTube, o Ferretto Matemática, que hoje conta com mais de 2.8 milhões de inscritos, sendo o maior canal de matemática da América Latina.

Ferretto lecionou como professor de curso pré-vestibular por 10 anos, até 2012, quando foi aprovado em concurso público e ingressou na Polícia Federal. Não se sentindo satisfeito com a carreira policial, decidiu lecionar novamente, e em abril de 2014 criou no YouTube o canal "Ferretto Matemática".

Inicialmente, o canal era uma maneira de conciliar sua paixão por lecionar com a sua carreira na polícia. Com o crescente sucesso na internet e os relatos positivos de estudantes do Brasil inteiro, após dois anos no YouTube, Ferretto decidiu então investir no seu sonho. Realizou um empréstimo e criou uma plataforma de estudo online para conteúdos pagos por meio de assinatura, e assim nasceu a empresa Professor Ferretto.

Nós crescemos! O sonho de uma pessoa se tornou o de muitas, hoje contamos com um time de professores renomados, especialistas em Enem e vestibulares, que oferecem conteúdo de qualidade sobre Matemática, Ciências da Natureza e Ciências Humanas. Além de um time de colaboradores que se dedicam todos os dias para entregar a melhor experiência aos nossos alunos, através de uma educação acessível e de qualidade.

Name: Karman-Line Acceleration Program
Description:
The Karman Line marks the boundary between Earth and space—where limits end, and new possibilities begin. Named after Theodore von Kármán (1881-1963), a Hungarian-American engineer and physicist, this line symbolizes the leap into the unknown and the drive to break barriers.

At Karman Line Acceleration (KLA), we provide a comprehensive curriculum and hands-on support to help founders launch, grow, and scale their startups. Our program combines technology frameworks, tools, connections, and practical knowledge to equip entrepreneurs with everything they need to accelerate their ventures.

As a registered not-for-profit corporation, KLA is dedicated to empowering entrepreneurs—especially new immigrants, fresh graduates, and visible minorities—by providing the education and support they need to succeed in Canada’s business landscape. Our goal is to help founders build powerful, globally competitive ventures that drive innovation and economic growth.

That’s why we are expanding our impact with a new vision for K-12 learning—one that redefines education, inspires curiosity, and prepares students for the future. Our K-12 initiative is designed to bridge the gap between traditional education and real-world skills, providing young learners with the critical thinking, adaptability, and problem-solving abilities they need to thrive in an evolving world.

This new hope for K-12 learning ensures that students—regardless of background—have access to dynamic, future-ready education that encourages them to explore, innovate, & lead. By integrating modern learning frameworks, cutting-edge resources, and industry connections, we are shaping a new generation of thinkers, creators, and problem-solvers.

Do you dream of becoming an entrepreneur, starting your own venture, or being an innovator?

No matter where your entrepreneurial or educational journey takes you, KLA has the programs, resources, and support you need to succeed.

Where Startups Scale & the Future of Learning Begins

Description:
Actif dans la formation à distance depuis plus de 50 ans, l'Institut Domi a su s'adapter à travers le temps et les évolutions de la formation. Cette dernière est l'un des facteurs de pérennité l'entreprise.

Depuis le début, l'Institut-domi a cherché à se démarquer des autres écoles en donnant une alternative aux formations traditionnelles (en présentiel).
Pendant de nombreuses années, les cours proposés par l'Institut-domi se donnaient sous forme de correspondance.

En 2008, un virage important a été entrepris. Le format papier et envois des documents par courrier postal a été abandonné au profit de l'informatique et des courriels. La formation en ligne a pris toute son ampleur.

Avec l’Institut Domi vous avez accès désormais à diverses formations supérieures :

-	La Maturité Suisse
-      Diplôme de comptable

Profitez d’outils performants spécifiques au e-learning, avec :
-	Une plateforme consultable en tout temps pour faire le point.
-	Un corps professoral spécialement formé à l’éducation en ligne
-	Un suivi continu par mail, par téléphone ou par visio-conférence
-	Des supports de cours en ligne ou papier.


Fort de nos nouvelles connaissances et compétences, nous espérons que notre savoir-faire réponde à vos attentes.

Egal ob Grundlagen oder spezielle Anwendungsgebiete - hier ist für jeden Geschmack und jedes Level etwas dabei. Dazu kommen ständig neue Kurse, neue Trainer*innen, neue Themen.

Unsere Vision ist es, das Wissen um die herausragende vegane Küche durch ehrliche Wissensvermittlung und ohne künstliches Zurückhalten von Informationen an maximal viele Menschen auf diesem wundervollen Planeten weiterzugeben. Den Fokus in den Kursen richten wir auf den Inhalt aus und vermitteln mit Leichtigkeit und Freude. Wir wollen mit dem Märchen, dass Essen nur mit tierischen Produkten lecker ist, aufräumen. Denn ob ein Essen schmeckt, hängt maßgeblich von den Fähigkeiten & Wissen derjenigen Person ab, die es zubereitet.

Name: FunEasyLearn
Description:
FunEasyLearn is the world’s most powerful vocabulary builder and the most accessible language learning app. 

Our foremost mission is to make language education accessible for everyone. This means building apps that can help people with different social, cultural and financial backgrounds learn new languages in a fun, fast and effective way. 

We’re making it happen. Founded in 2013, FunEasyLearn has now to offer 34 language courses. All of these courses can be learned from 62 native languages, or 95% of the world’s population.

The cornerstone premise of the FunEasyLearn method is combining the expertise of highly-qualified professionals with technology and innovation. 
Our team of certified linguists, experienced teachers and methodologists take a scientific and data-driven approach to analyzing how people learn. There’s no doubt it’s important to adapt the teaching process to each type of learner in particular, so that’s what they base their work on. By studying and experimenting with comprehensive vocabulary training, proven memorization techniques and groundbreaking gamification tools, they came up with a new, effective game-based approach designed to be fit to the needs of any type of learner, both child and adult. 

Reaching millions of users from 190 countries, we are determined to make the best language learning app ever, by offering: 

* The widest language variety 
* World’s biggest vocabulary builder: alphabet with reading rules, 6,000 words & 5,000 sentences (still growing)
* 4.7 / 5 star rating from 1,000,000+ reviews on Google Play & App Store 

FunEasyLearn has been bootstrapping from its very first days and has grown its user community organically and through the word-of-mouth. 

Join our mission and help us improve the way people learn or teach languages all around the world. For more information, visit www.funeasylearn.com or download the apps in the App Store or Play Store.

Name: MAP - Meio Ambiente na Prática
Description:
O MOVIMENTO

Movimento criado para promover a educação ambiental voltada para a capacitação técnica, jurídica e de desenvolvimento de carreira de profissionais da área ambiental, tendo por base a ética, contribuição e profissionalização da temática ambiental. Com o objetivo de mostrar que é possível se trabalhar com Meio Ambiente, transformando informação em instrumento de trabalho e fomentando uma rede de profissionais ambientalmente engajados.

Com o Propósito de Fortalecer o Mercado de Trabalho Ambiental, temos como missão a educação para capacitação de pessoas que atuam ou pretendem atuar em prol do meio ambiente.

A área ambiental requer atuação multidisciplinar e integra diferentes profissionais com distintas formações acadêmicas, que trabalham de forma complementar. O movimento "Meio Ambiente na Prática" vem para dar voz a esses profissionais e mostrar como eles atuam, acreditando na sinergia dessas ações.

O MAP pretende agir como facilitador para a expansão de consciência ambiental, gerando reflexões e interações entre os profissionais da área.

Nossos diferenciais
•    Ajudamos o maior número de pessoas a realizar sua faculdade e curso dos sonhos. 
•    Fazemos a captação ativa de novos alunos, não esperamos o alunos vir até nós, nós vamos até o aluno!
•   Nosso foco é trabalhar para que não tenham vagas remanescentes dentro das instituições.
•    Atendimento rápido e eficaz, após inscrição em até 24h, o aluno recebe uma ligação direcionando para uma faculdade.
•    O aluno paga apenas 75% da mensalidade para aderir ao programa.  
 
Como funciona:
 -  Captação
Temos uma metodologia única de realizar a captação de alunos.
Contamos com uma equipe comercial bem preparada, e uma equipe de marketing buscando sempre novas estratégias online.
- Inscrição
De forma simples e eficaz o aluno se inscreve no site com informações do seu curso.
- Contato
Após inscrição em até 24h, o aluno receberá uma ligação direcionando para uma faculdade.
- Pagamento
Depois de encaminhado aluno pagara normalmente sua matrícula e mensalidade para a faculdade com o benefício. Para o programa o aluno pagará apena uma taxa única de adesão.
- Estudar
Pronto a partir de agora o aluno está apto a fazer o vestibular e se aprovado apresentar a carta do programa e realiza sua matrícula.

Principal Propósito
Acertamos quando falamos que o maior pesadelo de um reitor é uma cena uma sala em pleno período letivo com uma sala vazia ou quase vazia? Pois então... O nosso principal propósito é uma sala cheia.

Sonhamos com um mundo onde a população brasileira não empobreça por falta de conhecimento e tenha uma mentalidade de crescer, nosso maior objetivo é proporcionar a melhores oportunidades  de estudos e poder ajudar  o maior número de pessoas a REALIZAR seu curso dos sonhos. Name: Cluster
Description:
Cluster S.r.l.: dove l'innovazione digitale incontra la sicurezza sul lavoro

Cluster S.r.l. non è una semplice azienda che si occupa di sicurezza sul lavoro.

Siamo un'avanguardia tecnologica che ha rivoluzionato il modo di approcciarsi alla salute e alla sicurezza nei luoghi di lavoro.

La nostra missione? Rendere le aziende più sicure, efficienti ed efficaci, coniugando la profonda conoscenza delle normative sulla sicurezza con le potenzialità delle più avanzate tecnologie informatiche.

Come lo facciamo?

·         Unendo le nostre anime: Da un lato, siamo esperti di salute e sicurezza, con anni di esperienza nel supportare le aziende a rispettare gli adempimenti di legge e nella informazione/formazione/addestramento del personale anche utilizzando sistemi di coaching innovativi basati sui protocolli di BBS (Behavior-Based Safety) e sviluppati con un team di psicologi del lavoro.
Dall'altro, siamo innovatori digitali, sempre alla ricerca di soluzioni tecnologiche all'avanguardia per semplificare i processi e migliorare l'efficienza.
·         Sviluppando soluzioni uniche: Abbiamo creato un software middleware, modulare, altamente personalizzabile, che funge da ponte tra diverse applicazioni, strumenti e database. Grazie a questa piattaforma, siamo in grado di offrire alle aziende servizi integrati e su misura, semplificando la gestione della sicurezza e favorendo un maggiore coinvolgimento di tutti i dipendenti.
·         Pensando in maniera innovativa: Abbiamo iniziato con le prime versioni web e oggi siamo all'avanguardia nel cloud computing, sfruttando linguaggi di programmazione come .NET per creare soluzioni sempre più performanti e scalabili.

 

Il risultato ma anche il nostro obiettivo in termini di miglioramento?

·         Maggiore sicurezza: Riduciamo il rischio di infortuni grazie a strumenti intuitivi e coinvolgenti che promuovono una cultura della sicurezza diffusa.

Name: Edson Burger - S. I. M.
Description:
Olá, meu nome é Edson Burger, cofundador e presidente da Sociedade Internacional do Mindset. Venho contar um pouco da minha história, pois acredito que seja muito importante, que você, meu caro leitor, entenda como eu me tornei essa pessoa que sou hoje e qual é a base de todo esse aprendizado que eu venho compartilhando com você há algum tempo.
Tudo começou no final da minha adolescência, quando eu comecei a pesquisar sobre a Lei da Atração e busquei livros sobre esse tema. Imagine só como era difícil para mim, na época existia pouco conteúdo a minha disposição e eu não tinha internet. 
Com 20 anos de idade, pela primeira vez eu ouvi falar em Programação Neurolinguística (PNL). Claro, fiquei encantado com esse conceito, mas infelizmente, não pude fazer cursos ou me dedicar ao estudo. Contudo, a ideia não saiu da minha cabeça, pois eu sabia que aquilo poderia transformar a minha vida um dia. Foi como se uma sementinha fosse plantada.
Os anos foram passando, eu tive muitas dificuldades em minha vida. Cheguei a um grau de obesidade extrema e diversos problemas de saúde. O ano era 2009 e se não bastasse, passei também por dificuldades financeiras. Nesse período,  eu tinha um filho pequeno para criar e não conseguia me dedicar como pai. Haviam cortado a minha luz, também, com três contas de luz atrasadas, como não cortariam? Sem falar no meu carro com busca e apreensão, além do aluguel atrasado. 
Quer conhecer toda minha história?
Copie e cole o link https://osimtransforma.com.br/edson-burger-por-que-a-minha-historia-pode-transformar-a-sua-vida/ e leia meu artigo na íntegra!

• Manufacture all-in-one kits across four clubs: Paint It, Sculpt It, Thread It, Tinker It

Why it matters
Mental-health headlines keep shouting; endless “solutions” keep scrolling by. A 20-minute hands-on activity, though, calms cortisol and subtly teaches soft skills. Finish one small project and the confidence kick is real. That’s the gateway we’re building.

Join the ride
– Follow for hobby hacks, kit sneak peeks, and behind-the-studio chaos

Name: Facilitation with Laura Greenfield, Ph.D.
Description:
WHAT I DO

I help introverted college educators develop unstoppable courage and transformative class facilitation skills in order to engage students equitably and advance social justice powerfully. 

My primary focus is to help educators build on their existing strengths in order to recognize the potential they already have to be powerful facilitators.

I also help them to develop their own facilitation praxis by introducing them to theories and methodologies they can grow during and beyond our work together.

HOW I DO IT 

I offer a growing suite of resources, including online courses, e-books, a podcast, and a private Facebook group to provide practical solutions to everyday challenges in the college classroom.

My approach is not prescriptive (I don't believe there is one "right" way to facilitate). Instead, I offer a process for aligning one's values and vision with tangible methods.

My process is derived from a radical loved-based teaching philosophy (I am deeply inspired by critical education theorists such as Paulo Freire and bell hooks).   

By providing concrete instruction, leading with empathy, and modeling conviction and humility, I send my students off feeling confident to lead in their unique teaching contexts.

 
WHY I DO IT 

I understand how challenging it can be to facilitate meaningful class discussions that reach every student and get everyone talking while also trying to recognize biases, interrupt microaggressions, and build community when you feel nervous speaking and you haven't yet learned best practices.

I also know how transformative it can be--for you and your students--to experience the humanizing connection that comes from powerful facilitation.

I truly believe such experiences are a component of the work of resisting oppression and healing the planet, and it would be an honor to support you in your vital role.

Name: Computer-Based Math
Description:
Computer-Based Math is a project to build a completely new math curriculum with computer-based computation at its heart—alongside a campaign to refocus math education away from historical hand-calculating techniques and toward relevant and conceptually interesting topics.

The importance of math to jobs, society, and thinking has exploded over the last few decades. Meanwhile, math education is in worldwide crisis—diverging more and more from what's required by countries, industry, further education... and students.

Computers are key to bridging this chasm: only when they do the calculating is math applicable to hard questions across many contexts. Real-life math has been transformed by computer-based calculation; now mainstream math education needs this fundamental change too.

Computerbasedmath.org is the project to perform this reset. We're building a completely new math curriculum with computer-based computation at its heart, while campaigning at all levels to redefine math education away from historical hand-calculating techniques and toward real-life problem-solving situations that drive high-concept math understanding and experience.

Name: Path2Integrity
Description:
The background of Path2Integrity is:

With the European research landscape rapidly changing, it is becoming increasingly essential to emphasise research integrity and to start handling new scientific techniques in a clear and accessible way.

Research integrity is an integral part of innovation, growth, and high-quality jobs. It results in more efficient, appropiate, useful, and reliable scientific evidence for policy-makers and entrpreneurs, where decisions based on research results can lead to a better future.

The aims of Path2Integrity are:



Path2Integrity will support formal and informal learning methods and will contribute to establishing a culture of research integrity by:

*  Establishing excellent learning paths with research integrity role-models and rotatory role-playing by developing and disseminating a Path2Integrity handbook of instruction;

* Raising awareness of scientific  facts about research integrity and role-models in educational organisations through a widespread Path2Integrity campaign;

* Achieving wide-spread implementation of excellent learning paths, by using existing and successful educational practices as a foundation and international collaborations across four continents, along with robust assessment methods;

* Creating units for learning research integrity that address everyone either directly or indirectly involved in research, inlcuding secondary school students, undergraduates, graduates, and young researchers.

It's a consortium of 8 partners from 5 EU member states:

Hochschule Coburg, Syddansk Universitet, 3C Compliance, Pensoft Publishers, Fundació Catalana per a la Recerca i la Innovació, EUREC office gUG, Christian-Albrechts-Universität zu Kiel, Instytut Badán Edukacyjnych.

Our experts are from Mexico, Canada, Zambia, Austria, Germany and Taiwan.

Path2Integrity receives funding until 31st December 2021 from the EU Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme.

Este curso também ensina os ambientes de tradução (CAT Tool e QA Tool) usados para trabalhar. Os alunos que receberem o Certificado neste curso obterão descontos para adquirir as ferramentas.
 
Técnicas de Tradução: Software e TI

Nesse curso, você aprende conceitos e noções básicas da especialidade, obtém a terminologia básica do setor, conhece os erros frequentes de português e tradução cometidos por freelancers no início da carreira (para não cair nessas ciladas), pratica revisão e pratica tradução por meio de exercícios interativos.

Ao final deste curso de especialidade, você pode fazer um teste qualificatório. Seu bom desempenho vale indicação para a agência de traduções parceira da Geronymus na especialidade que você escolheu - uma oportunidade de já começar a trabalhar na área.

Em breve lançaremos o curso Ciências da Vida e Indústria Farmacêutica, não perca!

La société a donc été conçue comme une entreprise à impact visant à transmettre aux professionnels de santé les connaissances des meilleurs spécialistes et chercheurs grâce à des formations e-learning d’excellence.

Nos premières formations, à destination des chirurgiens-dentistes ont reçu un accueil exceptionnel de la profession. En un an, Schiller Advisory est devenu le partenaire de formation continue de plus de 5% des dentistes en France et enregistre un taux de satisfaction de 98%. 

Nous souhaitons désormais conquérir à court terme 10% des professionnels de santé tous métiers confondus (médecins, infirmiers, pharmaciens, etc.) grâce à un large catalogue de formations et un accompagnement de tous les instants.

Name: Aro Crypto Consulting
Description:
Parti à la découverte de #Bitcoin en 2019, j'ai effectué de nombreuses recherches sur les #cryptomonnaies en général. Comprenant que ce nouveau monde proposait une alternative au monde financier actuel, j'ai également décidé de comprendre les rouages de celui-ci. 
Ce n'est qu'après deux années de recherches sur les enjeux géopolitiques, techniques et financiers , que j'ai décidé de me lancer en indépendant. 
Le futur est incertain, personne ne sait comment s'orientera la finance demain. Il y a néanmoins fort à parier que Bitcoin et la  #DEFI (finance décentralisée) y joueront un rôle. 
A défaut de tout miser dessus, il est temps pour chaque entreprise de maîtriser de quoi on parle quand on discute #crypto. C'est ce que je propose, une vue à 360 degrés de ce nouveau monde.

Name: CFA Exam Level 3 - Hack the Test
Description:
Our goal with these notes is to help you put the grueling CFA exam process behind you as efficiently as possible. We do that by telling you what you need to know, explaining how it’s been tested before, and then giving you comprehensive yet concise notes that explain the material clearly. The idea is to work smarter, not harder.

Specifically, this guided review of the 2015 CFA Level 3 curriculum covers all of the core concepts in detail while still managing to condense the material into under 250 pages. It includes every required equation, dozens of summary tables, and key lists, as well as draws detailed thematic links between different topic areas in order to facilitate both memorization and broader understanding of how the Level 3 subject matter has been put together.

In addition to a thorough subject review, the notes also explicitly highlight how material is likely to be tested based on past exams, practice problems, topic weightings, and hundreds of hours spent evaluating the readings.

Name: Gifted English
Description:
We are a social service dedicated to providing Africans with better access to education. We set up an orphanage for 60 orphans in Uganda as well as an English and maths school.  At Gifted English we bring together people from all over the world who speak English - they now act as teachers. Each teacher takes a group of 10 Ugandan children or teenagers and teaches them online English lessons twice a week. 
We think this is a wonderful idea - we are already making a change, we already are moving forward! 

In the very beginning our colleagues in Uganda did not have any computers, Internet was rare and slow. Of course, educational process was struggling. Nevertheless, we did not give up and we were doing English lessons through WhatsApp, using voice messages, as video call is always breaking because of lack of net. And you know what - it worked! Improvisation and creativity hehe :) 

Couple of months ago we collected money to send to Uganda so guys there bought their 1st laptop and a proper router. Now our studying process is really improving!

If You want to join the project and give English classes - welcome! You don't need any degree, if for example you just recently started speaking English, you will get a group of kids and teach them basics! 

Hugs, "Gifted English" Team.
Location: Figueira da Foz, Figueira da Foz

Name: MatheMind
Description:
Willkommen bei MatheMind – Wo Mathematik lebendig wird! 

Gegründet von Johannes Mensing und Josef Naber, steht MatheMind für eine Revolution in der Art und Weise, wie wir Mathematik lernen und erleben. Seit unserem Start im Jahr 2019 haben wir es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, die Welt der Zahlen, Formeln und Gleichungen in ein fesselndes Abenteuer zu verwandeln, das jeden begeistert.

Unsere Geschichte

Von zwei Mathematik-Enthusiasten ins Leben gerufen, ist MatheMind aus der einfachen Idee entstanden, dass Mathematik für jeden zugänglich und verständlich sein sollte. Mit unserem Buch "Mathe kann jeder", das es auf die Spiegel-Bestsellerliste geschafft hat, und unserer Online-Plattform haben wir bewiesen, dass Mathematik nicht nur nützlich, sondern auch unglaublich spannend sein kann.

Was wir bieten

Lernvideos mit Impact: Unsere Plattform bietet Zugang zu einer umfangreichen Bibliothek von Lernvideos, die komplexe mathematische Konzepte in klare, verständliche und vor allem unterhaltsame Lektionen verwandeln. Mit über 250 Millionen Aufrufen sind unsere Videos nicht nur ein Beweis für ihre Beliebtheit, sondern auch für ihre Wirksamkeit.
Online-Nachhilfe: Wir bieten personalisierte Unterstützung durch über 50 engagierte Nachhilfelehrer, die jeden Monat hunderte Schüler betreuen und ihnen helfen, ihre mathematischen Fähigkeiten zu verbessern und ihre Ziele zu erreichen.
Community: Bei MatheMind findet ihr eine lebendige und unterstützende Gemeinschaft, die die Liebe zur Mathematik teilt. Hier könnt ihr Fragen stellen, Erfahrungen austauschen und Inspiration finden.
Unsere Vision

Wir träumen von einer Welt, in der die Angst vor Mathematik der Vergangenheit angehört und jeder die Schönheit und Kraft der Mathematik nutzen kann, um seine Träume zu verwirklichen. Unsere Mission ist es, diesen Traum Wirklichkeit werden zu lassen.

Werde Teil von MatheMind

Name: English for Life
Description:

Name: The Science of Cannabis Institute
Description: Headquartered in Seattle, WA, The Science of Cannabis Institute (SCI) was created in 2014 to prepare professionals to work and succeed in the legal cannabis industry. Name: Sympli Works
Description:
You don’t have to do it alone.

Far too often, small business owners get stuck. They hit a barrier - sales, scaling, HR, marketing, to name a few - and have no idea where to turn. It’s isolating and overwhelming. It can also be damaging to a business’s present and future. 

But who really gets it? Business owners need business owners in their corner to help them navigate some of the most common constraints. 

They need somewhere to turn. That’s Sympli Works. Name: My Menopause Transformation
Description:
MyMT has been set up for one reason – to help women around the globe proactively manage their own menopause symptoms through scientifically evidenced, lifestyle change solutions. No longer should menopause symptoms impact on their life. MyMT also has courses for Health Professionals wanting to learn more about menopause and earn CEC/CPD points. 

“If you’re feeling frustrated by your changing health in menopause, even though you are exercising and eating well, then I totally understand! For years, menopause symptoms have been looked at in isolation, however, menopause, isn’t ‘just’ about hot flushes! If you’re not sleeping, experiencing weight gain, sore joints and muscles, heart palpitations, mood swings or lack of energy then be assured, these are a result of your changing hormones through menopause. If your seeing these symptoms in your clients, then I can help you upskill in menopause management as well.”

Hi, I’m Dr Wendy Sweet [PhD], MyMT Founder.  For decades menopause has been seen as a ‘sickness’ and not so well talked about, and my goal is to change that. 

When my own symptoms overwhelmed me, despite taking supplements, medications, eating and exercising well, I realised that nobody was taking a ‘whole-body’ approach to menopause symptoms.  Despite menopause being a natural life event, no one was taking an evidence based, lifestyle approach.

That’s when I knew I had to use my physiology and healthy ageing knowledge and experience, not only as a former nurse, but also as a leading exercise specialist in New Zealand, university lecturer, and women’s healthy ageing researcher, to figure out how to turn around menopause symptoms and my health.

That’s how MyMT began nearly a decade ago. I designed it for me, but it’s now available for women around the world. My programmes have attracted 15,000+ women who wanted what I wanted myself …. and that is to feel like ourselves again.

I invite you to get in touch or explore the website for further information.

Description:
We are on a mission to help children across the world develop critical communication and language skills. We are building a global language school that connects the best native speaking teachers with kids around the world in a live, small group format. Our fun, interactive programs focus on opportunities to learn and practice languages through games, role plays and discussions on topics that kids love. 

Learning to communicate well across multiple languages allows children to build empathy, improve mental acumen and discover the world in its true richness. Long term, it also improves their opportunities for work and life. 

Traditional language education in schools and in after school programs focuses on the teaching of grammar with limited opportunities to practice the language and understand its usage in real world settings. Additionally, the usual "in-person" programs are guided by where the kids live or go to school, and limit the ability for kids to learn from diverse native speaking teachers and classmates from different parts of the world.

Imagine a group of kids from 5 different countries learning to communicate better in English or Mandarin or Spanish, learning from and with each other, while discussing their favorite topics like football or space or Legos. As our vision comes to life, this won't be something anyone has to imagine anymore.

WRK has more than 40 years of combined workforce experience to meet your needs.

WRK Mobile Learning Platform (MLP) enables unemployed and under-employed individuals obtain the necessary digital literacy and self-management skills the marketplace demands. By using a comprehensive solution and workforce preparation activities, we empower the economically disadvantaged to become self-sufficient.  It is delivered via filtered internet connected devices and includes all the necessary support during the entire time the customer is enrolled in the program. We also use a Participatory Learning Process (PLP) wherein enrolled customers are challenged throughout their program on utilizing learned competencies to resolve real world workplace issues. In a leader led participatory environment, our educational moderators will provide weekly workforce challenges that customers are required to address and offer feedback to other customers' resolutions to specific workplace issues. Customers receive feedback from the moderators based upon their discussion contributions.

WRK for Employers is an employment driven customizable training curriculum addressing a variety of skills sets that many employers need their employees to possess in today's marketplace. From entry level positions, to management, our Curriculum Developer will craft the training modules customized to each unique employer. A better trained workforce results in more efficient employee production and opportunities for career advancement and retention.

Name: Tulane Journal of International and Comparative Law
Description:
The Tulane Journal of International and Comparative Law was founded at Tulane University Law School in New Orleans, Louisiana, as an outgrowth of that institution's historical tradition as a signpost in the academic world for international and comparative law. The Journal is dedicated to discussing and debating all facets of international law, from human rights to transnational commerce to the historical evolution of current global law. The Journal is one of the leading law reviews in international and comparative law, and in terms of citation, is in the top quarter of all journals in the nation.   


Subscriptions & Ordering

With subscribers in over fifty nations, spread over six continents, the Tulane Journal of International and Comparative Law enjoys a diverse and extensive readership. To be responsive to this constituency, the Journal is dedicated to publishing international and comparative articles that are academically accomplished, commercially practical, and ultimately citable by courts across the globe.


Subscription Rates

The rates for a subscription to the Tulane Journal of International and Comparative Law are as follows:
 
Domestic Subscriptions: US $30.00
Foreign Subscriptions: US $35.00


To Subscribe

To subscribe to the Journal and/or to place an order, visit the following website: https://tlsstore.law.tulane.edu/Products/journal-of-international-comparative-law-articles

Our idea was simple: to build a mobile platform that would essentially make it possible for every university in the world to build their own Netflix, with their own content. In a nutshell, we provided tools that made it easy for instructors to record lessons, and share them privately with their students.

Over the next 4 years we assembled a formidable team and built a product that won over 20 awards internationally, raised over $6.5M in venture capital, grew significant revenue, and served over 100 of the worlds largest and most prestigious universities including Yale, Brown, Columbia, Penn State and Stanford.

Name: Ikigai Coach
Description:
In Japan, millions of people live their Ikigai (pronounced Ick-ee-guy)— a reason to jump out of bed each morning.

It leads us to powerful questions :

1  What is the purpose of your existence? 
2 What is your reason for being?
3  What’s your reason for getting up in the morning?

The Japanese island of Okinawa , where ikigai has its origins, is home to the largest population of centenarians  in the world. 

Could the concept of ikigai contribute to longevity? 

What are the top  secrets behind Ikigai? 


“Your ikigai is at the intersection of what you are good at and what you love doing,” says Hector Garcia, the co-author of Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life. He writes,“Just as humans have lusted after objects and money since the dawn of time, other humans have felt dissatisfaction at the relentless pursuit of money and fame and have instead focused on something bigger than their own material wealth. This has over the years been described using many different words and practices, but always hearkening back to the central core of meaningfulness in life.”

Want to find your Ikigai? Ask yourself the following four questions:
1. What do I love?
2. What am I good at?
3. What does the world need?
4. What can I be paid for now — or something that could transform into my future hustle?

Discovering your own ikigai is said to bring fulfilment, happiness and make you live longer!

Name: History Ink / HistoryLink.org
Description:
HistoryLink.org is the first and largest encyclopedia of community history created expressly for the Internet. It is an evolving online encyclopedia of state and local history in Washington state.

HistoryLink.org provides a free, authoritative, and easily accessible history reference for the benefit of students, teachers, journalists, scholars, researchers, and the general public. With a few noted exceptions, all essays and features on this site are original works prepared exclusively for HistoryLink.org by staff, contract writers, volunteers, and consulting experts. The encyclopedia contains more than 5,200 essays and is constantly expanding, with new essays added every week.

The site debuted with demonstration content on May 1, 1998, and its original Seattle-King County database became functional on January 15, 1999. HistoryLink launched a parallel Washington database with initial content on March 2, 2003, making it the nation’s first original online encyclopedia of state history. On October 14, 2004, HistoryLink.org launched a redesigned and merged database to provide easier access to its essays and Web features. On September 8, 2008, HistoryLink.org was again updated with new design and other improvements. 

Like the communities and state it chronicles, HistoryLink.org is a work in progress. We add new features and essays continuously to fill gaps and enlarge on selected subjects, and existing essays are often expanded or corrected to reflect new information.

HistoryLink.org is produced by History Ink, a Washington non-profit, 501(c)(3) tax-exempt corporation. It was established in 1998 to undertake innovative approaches to historical research, education, and publishing. In addition to producing the HistoryLink.org encyclopedia, History Ink engages in other research and publishing.

Name: BlackED Movement
Description:
BlackED was birthed by 7 Black Female Students at the University of Edinburgh following a successful petition to update the University’s anti-discrimination policy. 

The Movement began following a monumental loss within the black community on the 25th May 2020. This was George Floyd’s tragic murder. This was a very impactful and painful moment, not just within the black community, but also the general public. It was a moment that sparked more conversations on race with many people and various institutions opening up dialogue on racism and discrimination. As it seemed, the University of Edinburgh did not immediately join in this dialogue and this drove the Founders to focus their discussions more generally on how the University deals with racism on campus. 
In discussing the University's current policies and response to racism and discrimination, the Founders discovered that there were areas the University could improve on to better support BAME students. As a result, they came together and decided to draft an open letter to the University, specifically Vice-Chancellor Mathieson, highlighting these key areas for improvement and potential solutions. The petition garnered over 8,000 signatures in support from both students and staff. It was also publicly endorsed by Edinburgh University Student’s Association, the Sports Union, the BAME Staff Network and other Societies and Senior Managerial Staff. 

The Founders, thereafter, formed what is now known as the BlackED Movement to ensure implementation of those aims and continue to work alongside the University and staff networks to improve the climate at the University, and the push towards equality for BAME students.

Out target market is the Massive Online Open Courses (MOOCs). The problem is that MOOCs students do not have access to meaningful and effective help contributing to a huge dropout rate of 85%. 

MOOCTORS provides personalized help for a fee when need it most (ad-hock/scheduled) and is up to 280x faster than alternative forms of help such as student-forums. We use AI to empower tutors' work by providing supportive content that matches student’s inquires for help, while simultaneously training our AI tutoring agents from tutor feedback and student-tutor interaction. Esse aprendizado acontecerá por meio da gameficação, do desenvolvimento da pronúncia, da acumulação e fixação de vocabulário e hábitos.

Aqui, identificamos e respeitamos o ritmo de cada estudante. Nosso objetivo é descomplicar o inglês, proporcionando uma jornada prática, intuitiva e, acima de tudo, divertida para nossos alunos com uma abordagem única e moderna com programação cuidadosa, revisões sistemáticas e reforços para construir memórias auditivas sólidas. 

Nossa plataforma digital inovadora oferece uma experiência de aprendizado personalizada, com atividades interativas, jogos digitais e aulas 24/7, tornando o inglês acessível, memorável e, acima de tudo, divertido. 

Contamos com a Duda, nossa professora digital, especialista em inglês moderno, pronúncia e análise de voz, ela oferece orientações personalizadas para que os alunos falem inglês com confiança, assertividade e fluência. 

Na Inglês Edu, descomplicar é nossa proposta. Somos mais do que uma escola; somos uma comunidade que celebra o aprendizado, a diversidade e a descoberta de um novo mundo através do inglês. Vem com a gente, pois a jornada de aprendizado pode ser tão incrível quanto o destino!

Name: Groxio
Description:
We do one thing - teach functional programming with Elixir! 

We help programmers level up their Elixir skills. Companies can grow their own senior developers without having to go outside to hire new talent. Groxio offers small group intensive classes for corporate teams needing to increase their Elixir skills and 4 times a year we offer live Elixir and OTP training open to the public.  

For self guided courses, The Programmer Passport is a subscription-based programming language learning system for the curious and wise developers. Join the thriving Groxio community and say good bye to endless days of working alone and working on the same language day after day.  Get out of the rut!

Social Impact. We work for equity and justice to diversify the programming community. To this end we run a mentoring group for underrepresented folks in programming. We are developing a curriculum so others can also start groups.

We are building community connections through our conferences, Gig City Elixir and LoneStar Elixir.  We want to see you there!

Come join us! grox.io

José Valim, creator of Elixir, read Seven Languages in Seven Weeks and used those langauges for inspiration for Elixir. Evan Chaplicki drew heavily on ML for Elm inspiration. Joe Armstrong and the Erlang team based initial versions of Erlang on Prolog, and Robert Verding from the same team has built another inspired language, Lisp-Flavored-Erlang. You don't need to be a language designer. You'll get inspired too.  Groxio's system will give you just enough experience so you can get beyond kicking tires and into what is special about each individual language. 

Programming has become a social endeavor. A great way to get better faster is to spend time with other great developers, and see how they solve problems. The Programmer Passport will take you beyond our digital walls and into other communities of programmers where you'll learn together.

Name: Mediapharm
Description:
Mediapharm Academy makes it easy for pharmacy owners to train their team and track certifications.

Pharmacy is a highly regulated business that requires staff to complete statutory and mandatory training. Owners must provide evidence that staff are trained to the right standard and are up to date.

The problem is that many of the courses required are dispersed across different sites. This makes it hard to track and confusing for learners to know what training they need to do and when.

That's why we created Mediapharm Academy. Signing up means you can track all your pharmacy training in one place. Built by pharmacists, it enables you to:

- Track individual and team performance on one dashboard
- Schedule reports to meet regulatory requirements
- Instantly access GPhC accredited courses to reduce costs
- Deploy regular training to improve skills
- Automate enrolments to save time
- Set alerts and notifications to improve compliance 

Meeting mandatory training requirements is time consuming and costly but Mediapharm Academy let's you do it in minutes so you can spend more time growing your business.

Name: Olus Education
Description:
We support digital learning in two key areas:
1) The Olus Learning Portal supports development of core digital skills in primary and secondary schools
2) Advanced digital learning and computer science skills at home (extracurricular)

The Olus Learning Portal is a student-led learning tool that enables schools to excel with digital learning.  An essential part of the success of the Olus Learning Portal in schools across the UK and Ireland, is that it also supports teacher training and professional development for digital learning at the same time. Enabling teachers in a unique manner such as this, addresses critical global problems facing successful implementation of digital learning environments in primary and secondary schools, including: the vast majority of teachers lack sufficient digital learning training, and the various challenges facing schools in providing traditional training to build teacher expertise in the area.

With the Olus Learning Portal, students from age 7 upwards can immediately learn digital literacy, I.T., coding and online safety/wellbeing skills.  As a Google professional development partner, all of our Google Workspace content on the Olus Learning Portal is aligned to Google's 'Certified Educator' programmes. Olus is also a Canva for Education partner, one of five across the UK and Ireland. 

Our focus in schools is to support device and software agnostic learning environments, so our programmes support iPads, Chromebooks, Windows devices and more!
Hear from our schools:
 - London primary school: https://www.olus.education/success-stories/hounslow-heath
 - Irish primary school: https://www.olus.education/success-stories/corracrinn-ns
